name: Madeleine Dean (mobile)
subject: Our upcoming meeting:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mad4PA PAC
body:
It’s Mad reaching out one last time before our deadline at midnight. The team just called and let me know that we’re only $1,350 short of our goal.

As you know we’ve got a polling strategy meeting next week, and we’re focused on making sure we have the budget to get in the field.

Only if you’re able, would you consider giving anything you can before midnight tonight? Here’s a personalized link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/md_mayeom24#Peter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86050094/476666759/767428743?amount=25&refcode=05312024_md_eom_fr_7&refcode2=571aa6ec-a91f-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzFhYTZlYy1hOTFmLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-Smb0dvS8fJD6eMIFgCKUvGzX8H0q1JKEScGOB7pERM=)**

With my sincere thanks,

Mad

Sent from iPhone

* * *
_Madeleine is an attorney, professor, mother, grandmother, and Member of Congress, representing Pennsylvania’s 4th Congressional District of Berks and Montgomery Counties. She is an outspoken leader who champions progressive priorities such as education, universal access to healthcare, gun safety, and ethical government.**Madeleine Dean has built a reputation for getting things done, and we need her to continue to be our voice to serve us in Congress.**_ _We are excited to have you on Team Dean! Our campaign is funded by people who care about our democracy and want to see continued progress in our community and in our country. name: Gloria Johnson
subject: I am nervous.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee
body:
This is waaaay too close for comfort.

| I’m on edge over here. We're only a few hours away from our May fundraising deadline, and no matter which way I crunch the numbers, we're on track to fall short of our $200,000 goal tonight. That’s unless you can help me ASAP. Can you rush a donation (of any amount) before midnight to help bridge our fundraising gap? 👉 **_[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gj_em_bax?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86050289/476667543/209297649?refcode=ea.561aa6ec-a91f-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.561aa6ec-a91f-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjFhYTZlYy1hOTFmLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fvqyuUR6WoRTnPSWhv_Ot9DufEutT3icO5T1vs7c3Ls=)_** Look, the GOP and Marsha Blackburn are ready to throw everything, including the kitchen sink, at us to keep this Senate seat and maintain their power. So we need to work overtime to build up our grassroots momentum and take on Marsha’s corporate PAC allies. If we want to unseat one of the most extreme Republican senators in the country and bring real change to Tennessee, I need your help today. Plain and simple. I’m humbly asking... Can you please rush a donation of any amount before the deadline to help defeat Marsha Blackburn and move Tennessee forward? **_[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gj_em_bax?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86050293/476667565/209297649?refcode=ea.561aa6ec-a91f-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.561aa6ec-a91f-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjFhYTZlYy1hOTFmLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fvqyuUR6WoRTnPSWhv_Ot9DufEutT3icO5T1vs7c3Ls=)_** I can’t thank you enough for your help. Gloria Johnson _Sent from my iPhone_

name: Deadline Tonight (via AOTL)
subject: You’re one of our most dedicated supporters
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
We’re giving you a closer look at where we stand
|
---

Friends,
We’re running out of time to reach our $10,000 May fundraising goal. So here are 3 reasons why we’re urgently asking for your support:
1. The Supreme Court just dealt a major blow to fair elections by greenlighting a racial gerrymander in South Carolina – proving that our work is still more important than ever.
2. We need to be prepared to mobilize our grassroots network to ensure the rest of our 2024 programming can continue going strong.
3. There will always be anti-democratic forces attempting to roll back the progress we’ve made — just look at the recent attempt to undo a new Voting Rights Act-compliant map in Louisiana — and we have to fight back.

While we have a LOT of ground to make up between now and midnight if we’re going to reach our goal, if we’re able to reach it — or even surpass it — we’ll be able to fully invest in organizing for fair maps.
**But if we don’t, we might have to face hard choices.**
We know we can reach this important goal with a donation from you! Click here to donate before midnight:
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eom-may24](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86050381/476668114/-1171450310?refcode=don_aotl_redite_email_mayfun_email_20240531-AOTL-EOM2_&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjViMWFhNmVjLWE5MWYtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=r_5EHTI9WuyDYVuJHWW7zfFe1H5m6ld3PrM0eZjOVvo=)**
Thank you,
All On The Line

**_[All On The Line](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86050382/476668115/-1578943632?refcode=don_aotl_redite_email_mayfun_email_20240531-AOTL-EOM2_&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjViMWFhNmVjLWE5MWYtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=r_5EHTI9WuyDYVuJHWW7zfFe1H5m6ld3PrM0eZjOVvo=&emci=11cd4287-bd1e-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=5b1aa6ec-a91f-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=8431045) is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. name: Joe
subject: A few more supporters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Salerno for Congress

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 5/31/2024
body:
Your daily rundown of REAL news for REAL Coloradans.
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
What a crazy 24 hours it's been for our country. We're working on some unique articles and perspectives regarding the Trump verdict, making sure you get quality information as this all unfolds. Stay up to date via the newsletter and make sure you're following us on social media.

This is the Mountain Minute for Friday, May 31, 2024.
- Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
| | **TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
---
**['Rigged from the beginning': Candidates for 4th District express deep concerns with Trump verdict](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
It is a largely rural area of Colorado, where cattle outnumber voters and where [Donald Trump won by an 18.6% margin](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) in his second bid for the presidency in 2020.
One pollster [termed the 4th District "MAGA Country"](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), for the area's affinity toward the 45th President of the United States. In rural areas of the district, semi-truck trailers in numerous communities are retired to fields and painted in tribute to Donald Trump, and it is not uncommon to see a pop-up corner market of MAGA merchandise for sale on a weekend near busy intersections in places like Fort Morgan.
Whether rural or urban, there's not a significant difference in Republican opinion toward the former President in the district.
So, it may come as little surprise Republican candidates for the 4th Congressional District seat, opened by the resignation of Rep. Ken Buck earlier this year, had [strong feelings]() when a unanimous verdict of a New York jury was announced Thursday, handing Trump 34 felony convictions and the potential for jail time in a case with various Constitutional and legal failings.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Greg Lopez Withdraws from Republican Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Greg Lopez, originally scheduled to participate in the "Republican Rumble with a Twist," withdrew from the event citing a [lack of endorsement from the sponsoring organizations](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) as his primary reason for the decision.

* Despite his withdrawal from the debate, the event will still proceed with debates for [Colorado's 8th and 4th Congressional Districts](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), including a special election debate for the 4th District to find a successor for ex-U.S. Rep. Ken Buck.
* The ["Republican Rumble with a Twist,"](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) co-hosted by the Republican Women of Weld and the Lincoln Club of Colorado, is scheduled for tomorrow June 1st from 11 a.m. to 5 p.m. at the Grizzly Rose in Denver.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[President Trump still facing 54 criminal charges after guilty verdict in New York case](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [THE HILL](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Former President Donald Trump, recently convicted in a New York hush-money trial, faces [54 additional criminal charges](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) related to election interference and mishandling classified documents across Georgia, Florida, and Washington, D.C.

* In Georgia, Trump faces 10 charges under [racketeering laws](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) for allegedly conspiring to overturn the 2020 election results, with ongoing appeals affecting the case's progression.

* Trump also deals with four federal charges accusing him of manipulating federal resources and officials to contest the 2020 election results, with the Supreme Court set to decide on his [claim of presidential immunity](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.).

* Additionally, Trump is charged with 40 federal counts in Florida for [improperly handling classified documents](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), with no trial date set due to continuous legal delays.

* Trump's legal team is exploring all options to appeal the New York conviction, highlighting the significant influence of the upcoming general election on his legal and political situations.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Lone Tree residents scrap Douglas County probation office location](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [FOX 31 DENVER/KDVR](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Residents of Lone Tree, Colorado successfully opposed the [relocation of the Douglas County Probation Office](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) to a densely populated area near multiple schools, citing safety concerns due to the potential presence of criminals, including sex offenders.
* The relocation was part of a broader initiative as Douglas County prepares to [establish its own judicial district](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), separate from the 18th Judicial District, effective in 2025, aimed at better addressing the local needs of Douglas, Elbert, and Lincoln counties.
* The decision on the new probation office location was [met with surprise and disapproval](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) from both the community and local officials, leading to the consideration of alternative locations such as the Justice Center in Castle Rock and the county's human services building, with emphasis on accessibility and appropriate spacing.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Ascent Colorado Classical Schools signs agreement with Hillsdale College to become member by 2026](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Ascent Colorado Classical Schools, a network of four tuition-free charter schools in Colorado, has [partnered with Hillsdale College](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) to enhance its educational offerings, becoming Candidate Member Schools to fully utilize Hillsdale's resources in curriculum and school leadership training.
* Hillsdale College will provide Ascent schools with no-cost resources and training in governance, curriculum, instruction, and school culture, aiming to [elevate educational standards](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) and integrate a comprehensive classical curriculum developed by Hillsdale.
* This partnership is a [big win for conservative charter schools](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) in Colorado, especially amidst the nationwide effort to infiltrate public schools and shut down the school choice movement.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Commentary: At CU you can get a domestic terrorist scholarship](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JON CALDARA, [COMPLETE COLORADO](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
_Canceling college loan debt isn 't enough!
_ _
__You heard me. Confiscating money from people who never went to college, as well as those who foolishly paid off their own college loans, to give the booty to those who knowingly agreed to pay back their loans isn 't enough.
_ _
__Why? Well, duh -- it doesn't memorialize acts of violence perpetrated in the name of social justice!
_ _
__If you had a modern college education, you 'd understand that.
_ _
__Colleges and universities around the country should follow the lead of the University of Colorado and give out scholarships in the name of domestic terrorists.
_ _
__I survived CU Boulder in the 1980s, and even then it was a propagandist arm of the socialist movement. But now it is literally celebrating acts of violent terrorism by awarding scholarships in the name of those who bombed buildings in Boulder in the 1970s._ __
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
|
---
**ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️**
**[Three disqualified, one withdraws from state primary election, Secretary of State announces](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **BY BRIAN PORTER | STATE | MAY 31** _Three candidates have been disqualified and a fourth has withdrawn from the state 's primary ballot, the Secretary of State's elections office announced Friday._
**[Rep. Boebert announces mobile office hours in 3rd District during June](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **BY BRIAN PORTER** **| STATE | MAY 30** _There will be a number of opportunities in June for those in the 3rd District to connect with the staff of U.S. Rep. Lauren Boebert, R-Silt._
**[Overbeck: How to stop biological boys from dominating girls' sports in Colorado ](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **BY JOY OVERBECK**** | COMMENTARY | MAY 30** _With the Colorado legislature 's huge Democrat majority passing a flood of bills pushing radical gender-switching dogma for children, the only way to fight back is with ballot initiatives._

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [brian@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:brian@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\)) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
**🤔 DID YOU KNOW?** **Jolly Ranchers** were invented by a Colorado resident by the name of Bill Harmsen in 1949.
|
---
|
---
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY**
"Injustice anywhere is a threat to justice everywhere. We are caught in an inescapable network of mutuality, tied in a single garment of destiny. Whatever affects one directly, affects all indirectly."
-- Martin Luther King Jr.
|
---
Make sure to follow us on social media to stay in the loop on all things RMV 📲

name: Joe Biden
subject: Will you chip in your first $25 -- or even just a few bucks -- to my reelection campaign before tonight’s official FEC deadline? More than 1.8 million Americans have stepped up to power this fight, and I’m hoping you’ll join them. Each one of those contributions, no matter the size, means the world to me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
| | |

name: The Team at No Dem Left Behind
subject: Thank you, your support means everything to No Dem Left Behind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC
body:
Winning the rural vote is going to be more critical than ever in 2024.
---
| | | |
---
| | | |
---
| | | |
## Together, we can change the landscape of America.
---
America needs a green future, and that includes rural America. No Dem Left Behind has the answer on how to go green across America.
|
---
Democrats are pushing for a better relationship with the environment, and rural America can be at the forefront of this sustainable progress. Well-thought-out city planning is not just for urban cities. Rural America needs to be a part of this change, and No Dem Left Behind has actionable policy initiatives that can be used across the United States:
* **City Parks:** Allowing nature in the center of our towns. Making space in city planning for city parks will improve the landscape of our towns and improve our relationship with local nature.

* **Community Gardens:** Making the landscape more green and providing food for communities. Using public areas to grow valuable produce will improve communities in a multitude of ways.

* **Green Roofing:** Restoring nature in places we have never thought before. Current roofing features can be used to establish gardens, plant trees, and can be used to reduce temperatures in urban and rural areas.

* **Planting Trees:** It doesn't get more simple than this. Trees reduce carbon emissions, reduce temperatures in towns, and

In movies, we often see futuristic cities portrayed as chrome skyscrapers and endless concrete. However, the real future of cities should be different. It's time to integrate nature back into our towns and cities, creating a landscape where nature thrives alongside modern innovations. Imagine a future where parks, community gardens, green roofs, planting soils, and tree-lined streets are seamlessly incorporated. This shift from the bleak scenes of chrome and concrete to vibrant environments can enhance the lives of Americans and redefine our approach to city planning. [**Please consider making a generous donation to No Dem Left Behind today. We can make a better future for rural America and the environment, and it starts with you!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ndlbwinningruralamerica?refcode=high)
| If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

| | Thank you for your commitment to democracy. With your support, we can make history in 2024. — No Dem Left Behind

body:
I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 - here's the gist:

| |

---
| | | Hey - I'm Byron Donalds.

The Republican National Committee named me the Co-Chairman of their most important initiative for the next election.

_**[I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024- here's the gist:](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=e7cee6908137419d8eb49a9688d268ae&_e=5uu_yV2jphcWSy2ykMEDE8XCo8v0JXuZOHHKhZE5yqLE-DEnhmODLiRgDYh9gVIw2fS5eRyjW9A2bbYM6I9D6Snkm3ArTKqQoM9i61dOEhnDaeSBIJcUEaAmuML4m9wmBnYUggT5JRLQeautBUthHGoIr9Fuaq_MfkK5EBsM0EurK7WdytdHdhTZ5jis1ivlefUFiWdUOxgS4KqpYPEYJ_JtEI7O5gnwGO6nLPd1jgMaPynqUBm6Q5cXIBQgvZyGh-APbgm8jTINnfTshStZKF0ZY4u-est8LJicRK4RMeE4U8ac9Et5liYREp0BquVffrYO16_rpNaQNqMxFYvo3rZIms5meVsn6GdG2jr1ZUVNUUuxyMFa12ui_2SOu0W4oFp4ibxULvAOH5WzNji6REv6baleKDz1zYwpdwpWHyc%3D "I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 – here’s the gist:")**_
* If the Democrats vote early, we should push early voting too
* If they can ballot harvest, we should ballot harvest even better
* Invest in an 80,000-person team to ensure your vote is protected
* Mobilize GOP voters through neighbor-to-neighbor contact
* Expand voter contact efforts to connect with young Conservatives
* **Fight BAD ballot harvesting laws - let's make it easy to vote but hard to cheat**

I am proud to lead these efforts and help Conservatives WIN BIG up and down the ballot. These efforts will not only allow us to confront bad actors and stop cheating but will help our Party appeal to younger voters and swing-state independents.

There's just one problem: campaign operations like these are EXPENSIVE. It's not cheap running ads, printing flyers, recruiting volunteers, and expanding voter contact efforts.

_**[That's why I'm coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=e7cee6908137419d8eb49a9688d268ae&_e=5uu_yV2jphcWSy2ykMEDE8XCo8v0JXuZOHHKhZE5yqLE-DEnhmODLiRgDYh9gVIw2fS5eRyjW9A2bbYM6I9D6Snkm3ArTKqQoM9i61dOEhnDaeSBIJcUEaAmuML4m9wmBnYUggT5JRLQeautBUthHGoIr9Fuaq_MfkK5EBsM0EurK7WdytdHdhTZ5jis1ivlefUFiWdUOxgS4KqpYPEYJ_JtEI7O5gnwGO6nLPd1jgMaPynqUBm6Q5cXIBQgvZyGh-APbgm8jTINnfTshStZKMwDLMQyPbysxJ1bfNiB_zCDm_38YSP8ulOIScrbFNsq-ntLdREoDeDKwkYrkMlMLGc2sVu7j2X6vOmaFe5wzPXwUD-dTJjNvLSSMZhAxoRovRCqppBVWHhqVC5ivcQP05SBz-nQsM2WZcHsXSyvdbM%3D "That’s why I’m coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?")**_ I know it's a lot to ask but I can promise you this: it'll be worth it when we have **1)** a Conservative House Majority, **2)** a Conservative Senate, and **3)** a Conservative in the White House.

_If that doesn 't convince you to want to help, I don't know what will! Are you in?_

name: Laura (personal)
subject: “You get what you get and you don’t get upset.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| Hi Friend,

This has been a month filled with legislative action in Sacramento, including some major victories I’ll be sharing in the upcoming days. Two weeks ago was our bill “Suspense” day, which is when legislators find out which bills are moving to the floor and which are dead. This process can delay - but never stop - critical progress. For the past 7 years, to reassure myself on Suspense day, I recite the mantra Rachel’s preschool teacher taught her students: _“You get what you get and you don’t get upset.”_

I’m taking that approach to another suspenseful deadline – our end-of-month fundraising period, which hits tonight. After Friday, we’ll have less than 30 days until our quarterly report is due with the FEC.

I can’t control whether you contribute, but I want you to know that anything you give right now helps us to expand our reach and strengthen our campaign.

Can you use the personalized link below to chip in $3 before midnight? **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lf-q2-2024?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86051595/476677246/1636625507?refcode=em-5.31.24-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2Q1MWZhMTMtYWMxZi1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cbZKWHTMj96HhGk0sI3UrecmPu75u2F73Whav03MR7E=)**

If we want to fight for Democratic values in Congress, we need resources. And although it may be hard to believe, a lot of our funds come from emails like this.

That’s why your support today is so valuable. If you can, please consider sending in a donation before midnight to help us reach even more voters next month.

Here’s the link again to chip in: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lf-q2-2024?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86051596/476677254/1636625507?refcode=em-5.31.24-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2Q1MWZhMTMtYWMxZi1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cbZKWHTMj96HhGk0sI3UrecmPu75u2F73Whav03MR7E=)**

Thank you,

Laura

clean_body: | Hi Friend, This has been a month filled with legislative action in Sacramento, including some major victories I’ll be sharing in the upcoming days. Two weeks ago was our bill “Suspense” day, which is when legislators find out which bills are moving to the floor and which are dead. This process can delay - but never stop - critical progress. For the past 7 years, to reassure myself on Suspense day, I recite the mantra Rachel’s preschool teacher taught her students: “You get what you get and you don’t get upset.” I’m taking that approach to another suspenseful deadline – our end-of-month fundraising period, which hits tonight. After Friday, we’ll have less than 30 days until our quarterly report is due with the FEC. I can’t control whether you contribute, but I want you to know that anything you give right now helps us to expand our reach and strengthen our campaign. Can you use the personalized link below to chip in $3 before midnight? = If we want to fight for Democratic values in Congress, we need resources. And although it may be hard to believe, a lot of our funds come from emails like this. That’s why your support today is so valuable. If you can, please consider sending in a donation before midnight to help us reach even more voters next month. Here’s the link again to chip in: = Thank you, Laura | | Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress Laura's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: I have to get this off my chest
body:
I was tossing and turning all night...
Dear Pro-Life Friend,

I was tossing and turning all night.

Frankly, I've written and rewritten this message to you several times already _(I had to edit out some choice words)._

What happened yesterday was an embarrassment.

I'll be the first to admit that President Trump is no angel.

**But anyone who thinks this was a fair and just trial is either completely oblivious or lying.**

And if you think the radical Left is going to stop at President Trump, you're wrong, wrong, WRONG!

After all, President Biden's Department of Justice has already thrown peaceful pro-lifers in jail for praying outside of abortion facilities.

They'd rather persecute parents concerned about schools peddling racist garbage or radical gender ideology than prosecute real crime.

Pro-Life Friend, I'm worried about the future of our nation.

I'm worried what a two-tiered justice system means for my children.

**And, if I'm honest, I'm worried about what it means for me and all of our _Students for Life Action_ team as we're on the front lines of the most controversial issue in American politics today.**

But I'll tell you what we can't do right now.

We can't back down.

No, we need to DOUBLE DOWN!

The stakes heading into November were already high, but they just got ratcheted up even more.

Over the next 48 hours my team and I will be on constant meetings and zoom calls discussing how we can ramp up our 2024 Election Year programs.

I want to ramp up everything – door knocking, Vote Pro-Life First digital ads, phone banks, text messaging, our "Almost Aborted" national billboard campaign plus several other plans I have up my sleeve I haven't yet told you about.

But all this hinges on one thing:

Resources.

Resources I just don't have laying around in _Students for Life Action's_ bank accounts right now.

I'll give you the link to donate shortly, but before I do, I have something more to get off my chest . . .

Pro-Life Friend, I consider you an important part of our team.

So, I want to be honest with you.

My sense is the pro-life grassroots has been depressed in recent months.

It's not totally unwarranted.

Between the Abortion Lobby scoring victories on ballot referenda in Ohio and other states and supposedly pro-life politicians caving in left and right, _it often seems like you and I are alone standing for truth and giving a voice to the voiceless_.

But please be encouraged.

As I wrote you last week, we’ve been scoring numerous victories in state legislative primaries and even fighting back against the Abortion Lobby in some state houses.

There are tens of thousands of dedicated pro-life Americans just like you praying, speaking out, and contributing their time, talent, and treasure every day.

And though we may not be able to match the Abortion Lobby's deep pockets, or be willing to stoop to their lows by weaponizing the entire judicial system against political opponents, **you and I both know the victory has already been won.**

So, please pray for our nation.

Pray for our team and my family.

And if you can, please make an emergency gift to _Students for Life Action_ to help us DOUBLE DOWN on all our 2024 Election Year programs.

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, _Students for Life Action_

[**Donate to _Students for Life Action_ >>**](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-gavjd-duchtdja-y/)
Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization.

**

**

body:
A partisan judge oversaw a sham prosecution by a corrupt District Attorney for a bunch of made-up crimes.
We need to talk about yesterday’s outage after the sham verdict against Trump...

| |

| | | My fellow Americans - this is Steve Scalise.

_We need to talk about yesterday 's platform outage immediately after the sham Trump verdict came down... _

I was over the moon seeing how many strong American Patriots dropped everything to support President Trump at a moment like this. So many stepped up that our system was completely overwhelmed.

Now we're in a serious pinch. Our final May fundraising deadline is TONIGHT and we're dangerously behind our goal.

**This deadline was important before ... But now that they convicted Trump over nothing, this might be the single most important goal in American history. **

The outage set us back but it's not too late to turn it all around.

I am still fuming over the disgraceful Trump trial.

A partisan judge oversaw a sham prosecution by a corrupt District Attorney for a bunch of made-up crimes.

**Our Founding Fathers would be rolling over in their graves.**

So when I saw our system crash from the tidal wave of strong American Patriots wanting to help, it was inspiring. But the platform going offline was a setback nonetheless. _**[If there is ANYTHING you can do to help, now is the time.](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=fe0c4a0261524c8b9b4a3592929e5188&_e=X_R3drTUyWaSUtBM5tX3H6BBTrwYh2-dBdE19qkXo3h-gbN8ZkewySRcIJ9KH2rTQzcJaU0v0lWyMSS5zdNcNkjEf60Rm6QSO0S52QK38c_6fOnQjF2EIwfGAm-QqksEML9y-Tj-OicVcTObopO45xEC_qI2jMVxuC94Nz1dcSyEAa6II4EcEIwFyNNIxUXcZggAV6e7YVXnaQutjs9_u2ydkkXPnuI3JvOfOeV1B6vjZotRyH1c2ewm9RXhsoOX5Bh6MBzVLleYpcXuC2l0FoyLbfOotCdB1J6vXlu0HypjxlwW6cj8KnV7axFeM5mqzH3B5_rcxIWpzu1gZeLt6mUPhO7cGSOOtwLjekpTFbBoIPpQawIGMTMwSO-vHtqtwYdRha0ngwcAmXtXdeKjPg%3D%3D "If there is ANYTHING you can do to help, now is the time. If we shatter an all-time fundraising record right now, it will strike fear through the hearts of every Radical Democrat claiming victory after the verdict.

clean_body: A partisan judge oversaw a sham prosecution by a corrupt District Attorney for a bunch of made-up crimes. We need to talk about yesterday’s outage after the sham verdict against Trump... | | | | | My fellow Americans - this is Steve Scalise. We need to talk about yesterday 's platform outage immediately after the sham Trump verdict came down... I was over the moon seeing how many strong American Patriots dropped everything to support President Trump at a moment like this. So many stepped up that our system was completely overwhelmed. Now we're in a serious pinch. Our final May fundraising deadline is TONIGHT and we're dangerously behind our goal. This deadline was important before ... But now that they convicted Trump over nothing, this might be the single most important goal in American history. The outage set us back but it's not too late to turn it all around. "Would you be willing to pitch in a few bucks to save the day right here and right now?" | "Stand with Trump and House Republicans" I am still fuming over the disgraceful Trump trial. A partisan judge oversaw a sham prosecution by a corrupt District Attorney for a bunch of made-up crimes. Our Founding Fathers would be rolling over in their graves. So when I saw our system crash from the tidal wave of strong American Patriots wanting to help, it was inspiring. But the platform going offline was a setback nonetheless. "If there is ANYTHING you can do to help, now is the time. " If we shatter an all-time fundraising record right now, it will strike fear through the hearts of every Radical Democrat claiming victory after the verdict. Are you in? Thanks for all you do. Majority Leader Steve Scalise | | | "Please take my Election Year Check-In!" I'm launching my brand new "ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN"** - this gives you an open line of communication directly with me and my team. Hello,
$2.
That’s the amount I am humbly asking you to chip in to my campaign before midnight to help me win this critical House seat. Yes, just $2.
$2 because in 2022, I lost to Lauren Boebert by just 546 votes in the closest race in the entire country.
$2 because we scared off Boebert, but now this race is going to be a lot harder to win.
$2 because all the pundits say that this time, we absolutely _can_ win this seat.
And $2 because the Super PACs are already attacking me, and I need your help to counter their lies if we’re going to win.
I know $2 might not seem like much, but together with tens of thousands of other grassroots donors like you, we can take on the corporate PACs and special interests. We cannot stop here or let up.
We’ve set a goal to raise another $150,000 before our end-of-month fundraising deadline, but right now, we are still short.
[**Please, can I count on you to chip in $2 or more right now – before my critical fundraising deadline – to help me win this critical House seat, replace Lauren Boebert in Congress, and finally restore some sanity to Washington?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86051782/476683119/1610638071?refcode=em20240531pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=a7b1bb88-ad1f-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhN2IxYmI4OC1hZDFmLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pETNhOb9Oh-eJE4GC8HRCb5WCxiSZKaIyyFbio0qE4o=)

We’ve set a goal to raise another $150,000 before our end-of-month fundraising deadline, but right now, we are still short. = Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = It means the world to know I have the support of people like you on this journey again. Thank you so much in advance. With gratitude - Adam ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Well Peter,

clean_body: Peter – in a moment, I'm going to ask you to consider = But first, I want to tell you a bit about this campaign and what your support means to me: I’ve proudly dedicated my career working to find real solutions for everyday folks all across our district. As the proud son of a police officer and county civil servant, public service has always been in my DNA. And in 2018, I was elected as Missouri's first African-American top prosecutor. It was a tough fight, but with you by my side, we made history. Together, we’ve taken a strong stand against violent criminals while empowering our community. I've worked with the Department of Justice to reform Ferguson's criminal justice system, improved police training, introduced body cams, raised police pay, and overhauled the court system. I’ve also created the North County Police Cooperative – a community-policing model – and expanded diversion programs with a nearly 90% success rate. But Peter, beyond this, if you take anything away from this email, here’s what I want you to know: My drive to fight for St. Louisans has only grown since launching this people-powered campaign. I’m committed to strengthening our economy, lowering health costs, reinvesting in rural areas, protecting reproductive freedom, supporting seniors, and fighting climate change. That's why I'm running to represent everyday St. Louisans in Congress. But in order to cross the finish line on Election Day, I’m going to need all hands on deck: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you! Wesley Bell = = PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI 7253 WATSON RD #1115, ST LOUIS, MO 63119

body:
CIA Cover-Up on Hunter Biden

[INSIDE JW]

Judicial Watch Denounces the Absurd Trump Verdict

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=68527&L=32538&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj00Mlg4c01NM0tIUSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=87e6d0eceedd2b1fb002e56b0e47724d685538f8ce26d843c9f2f7e4e22f1d0b]
Pure corruption. Judicial Watch denounces this absurd guilty
verdict and Soviet-style criminal proceeding that has so abused
President Trump. What just happened to Trump up in New York is
criminal.

The verdict is no surprise considering the rigged, kangaroo court
proceedings run by a biased, conflicted judge and an unethical,
politicized Democratic Party prosecution team. May 30, 2024, the day
the verdict came down, was a terrible day for the rule of law that
will go down in infamy. This whole process is compromised, and this
verdict should be overturned in an emergency fashion.

The evidence shows that Trump committed no crimes, and this is a
prosecution about “nothing.” This and other Democratic
Party-political prosecutions of Trump are an abomination under law and
are destabilizing to our nation.

Judicial Watch will continue to expose in court the truth about these
attacks on the rule of law, free and fair elections, and the U.S.
Constitution. In the meantime, our elections have officially been
compromised by this politicized prosecution.

We have several Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuits related to
the prosecutorial abuse targeting Trump.

In March 2024, we filed a Georgia Open Records Act
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=68527&L=32346&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZmFuaS13aWxsaXMtY29tbXVuaWNhdGlvbnMvXWxhd3N1aXQ/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=5a1a0a0688f94528cc07ee30d503c59ecf5428331eecb60d6b837e31ef41f25b
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=68527&L=31661&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZmFuaS13aWxsaXMtY29tbXVuaWNhdGlvbnMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=2d67ec90cc33e53c10668f6c6065ddbf2c2a63c92f21462d7f15f9a4bf41702c]
against
District Attorney Fani Willis and Fulton County, Georgia, for records
of any communication Willis and the county had with Special Counsel
Jack Smith and the House January 6 Committee. The lawsuit was filed in
the Superior Court of Fulton County after Willis and the county denied
having any responsive records.

In February 2024, the U.S. Department of Justice
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=68527&L=32347&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbmFtZXMtb2YtdG9wLXN0YWZmLWFudGktdHJ1bXAvXWFza2VkP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=4499e4f3bff5f8cb11888b644e11b869a764fe7d117a67cb6715637f758302c7
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=68527&L=31981&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvbmFtZXMtb2YtdG9wLXN0YWZmLWFudGktdHJ1bXAvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdlZWtseSt1cGRhdGUmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=f983bb930d170366a97627dca8c343257ec206b62fce008c7bee21f62e8ad904]
a
federal court to allow the agency to keep secret the names of top
staffers working in Special Counsel Jack Smith’s office that is
targeting former President Donald Trump and other Americans.

(Before his appointment to investigate and prosecute Trump, Special
Counsel Jack Smith was at the center of several controversial issues,

scandal
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=68527&L=28485&F=T&&hash=7d304403d871da9d079a66ed9ab4db4e2cf362db0486ad344a7df1a16d0ee34a]

[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=68527&L=28716&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvanctZ3VpZGUtdG8tY29uZ3Jlc3Npb25hbC1pbnZlc3RpZ2F0aW9ucy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=3cb9ceabc2b051a3443b24c8ce0623fb5229f954135b4a914b33c6f71413008e]
revealed that top IRS officials had been in communication with Jack
Smith’s then-Public Integrity Section about a plan to launch
criminal investigations into conservative tax-exempt groups. Read more
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=68527&L=32350&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYWJjcy1pcnMtbWVzcy1qdXN0aWNlLWRlcHQtdGFpbnRlZC9daGVyZT91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9QU1qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNEJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj13ZWVrbHkrdXBkYXRlJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=785a0efe8342bc929d476c912d065c8e6e2c824f15d47d625624bd0813021f31
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=68527&L=28702&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYWJjcy1pcnMtbWVzcy1qdXN0aWNlLWRlcHQtdGFpbnRlZC8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=9ed8deea73b100efa959715399410668bbe1ab82033f763fc7deb8d74f0e300b].)

Hunter Biden faces two separate criminal trials in June. Biden’s
trial on gun charges in Delaware is scheduled to begin on June 3. On
June 20, his trial on various tax charges begins in California.

against
the National Archives for Biden family records and communications

BIDEN AGENCY RELEASING SUSPECTED TERRORISTS THREATENS MILITARY BASES,
INFRASTRUCTURE

The recent incident involving two Jordanian nationals trying to breach
the Marine base at Quantico is concerning. And it highlights the
national security risk of the Biden administration permitting a border
invasion, as our _Corruption Chronicles_ blog reports
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=68527&L=32558&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGhzLXJlbGVhc2luZy1zdXNwZWN0ZWQtdGVycm9yaXN0cy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=713e525aadb852ae0b8fee64fbd941642b1eb6b1a8f255e30f42a16d10d614e2].

> Under the Biden administration the Department of Homeland Security
> (DHS) has a pattern of releasing suspected terrorists at the
> southwest border resulting in national security risks that include
> threats to U.S. military installations and critical infrastructure,
> a congressional committee affirms. Federal lawmakers reveal that
> since Biden took office the U.S. Border Patrol has encountered at
> least 351 illegal aliens on the Terrorist Screening Data Set coming
> into the country between ports of entry. Among them are two
> Jordanian nationals who recently attempted to breach a military base
> not far from the nation’s capital. The men drove a truck to the
> main gate of Marine Corps Base Quantico earlier this month and
> ignored guards’ orders to stop when they could not provide
> credentials required to gain access to the facility. The Virginia
> base is about 35 miles south of Washington, D.C.
>
> Now the House Homeland Security Committee, established nearly two
> decades ago to ensure that the American people are protected from
> terrorist attacks, is investigating the matter and demanding action
> from administration officials charged with safeguarding the nation,
> including the secretaries of Homeland Security (Alejandro Mayorkas)
> and Defense (Lloyd Austin) as well as FBI Director Christopher Wray.
> In a letter
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=68527&L=32559&F=T&&hash=1a4e54bb21bb63ffdc165626e13aadda6f03f806041b364f5da7171d990c4ddb]
> to the Biden officials, high-ranking committee members including
> chairman Mark Green of Tennessee, ask for documents and other
> pertinent information to aid in their investigation into threats
> posed by foreign nationals to U.S. military bases and other critical
> infrastructure. That includes communications such as text messages
> and electronic mail between DHS, DOD and the FBI related to the May
> 3 incident at Marine Corps Base Quantico, documents to identify the
> names and countries of origin of the truck’s occupants and their
> current alien file. The committee also wants files with all
> derogatory information in the Terrorist Screening Data Set
> associated with any individual who attempted to breach the military
> compound and all files containing notes from Immigration and Customs
> Enforcement (ICE) officers and prosecutors referring to the
> individuals involved.
>
> The attempted breach at the Marine Corps base reflects a possibly
> more dire reality for the state of U.S. national security, the
> committee members write, adding recent congressional testimony
> delivered by the FBI director. “As Director Wray stated in a
> recent Senate hearing, ‘a wide array of very dangerous threats . .
> . emanate from the border, requiring ‘much greater vigilance’ to
> protect the country.” The legislators point out that DHS’s
> relaxed vetting standards, which complement Biden’s avowed desire
> to surge the border with inadmissible migrants, have created an
> environment ripe for exploitation by individuals aiming to undermine
> the United States at its most critical points. “If individuals on
> the terrorist watchlist are so emboldened to attempt to breach a
> Marine Corps base, the Department of Homeland Security and the
> entire executive branch must act swiftly to identify, apprehend, and
> detain such hostile actors on American soil,” the letter states.
>
> The recent incident in Virginia appears to be part of a broader
> security issue involving U.S. military bases and foreign intruders.
> Less than a year ago a mainstream newspaper published an alarming
> exposé
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=68527&L=32560&F=T&&hash=668befb80380fabcd3ca01937f2a20ddbc63594db8347a141fd8457e66e18370]
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=68527&L=32561&F=T&&hash=d850d4dbcbe0b70593f2a0cc212f30caeddbab508d401207f04f67643dbd8909
> Chinese nationals, sometimes posing as tourists, accessing military
> bases and other sensitive U.S. sites as many as 100 times. In the
> story U.S. officials, from agencies such as the FBI and DOD,
> describe the incidents as espionage threats designed to test
> security practices at U.S. military installations and other federal
> sites. Examples include Chinese nationals—required to report back
> to the Chinese Communist Party (CCP)—crossing into a U.S. missile
> range in New Mexico to scuba divers swimming in murky waters near a
> U.S. government rocket-launch facility in Florida. The same Homeland
> Security Committee also initiated an investigation into the Chinese
> breaches after learning about them in the media. In a September 2023
> letter
>
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=68527&L=32562&F=T&&hash=736b6c06c5422fe53121adaa436be301eca88b6cbf9d5bf4c22a7681a7583c50]
> to Mayorkas, Wray and Austin, the committee points out that the
> “persistent and multi-faceted threats posed by the CCP to U.S.
> homeland security have only intensified under the Biden-Harris
> administration.”
>
Until next week,

clean_body: CIA Cover-Up on Hunter Biden [INSIDE JW] Judicial Watch Denounces the Absurd Trump Verdict [] Pure corruption. Judicial Watch denounces this absurd guilty verdict and Soviet-style criminal proceeding that has so abused President Trump. What just happened to Trump up in New York is criminal. The verdict is no surprise considering the rigged, kangaroo court proceedings run by a biased, conflicted judge and an unethical, politicized Democratic Party prosecution team. May 30, 2024, the day the verdict came down, was a terrible day for the rule of law that will go down in infamy. This whole process is compromised, and this verdict should be overturned in an emergency fashion. The evidence shows that Trump committed no crimes, and this is a prosecution about “nothing.” This and other Democratic Party-political prosecutions of Trump are an abomination under law and are destabilizing to our nation. Judicial Watch will continue to expose in court the truth about these attacks on the rule of law, free and fair elections, and the U.S. Constitution. In the meantime, our elections have officially been compromised by this politicized prosecution. We have several Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuits related to the prosecutorial abuse targeting Trump. In March 2024, we filed a Georgia Open Records Act [ [] against District Attorney Fani Willis and Fulton County, Georgia, for records of any communication Willis and the county had with Special Counsel Jack Smith and the House January 6 Committee. The lawsuit was filed in the Superior Court of Fulton County after Willis and the county denied having any responsive records. In February 2024, the U.S. Department of Justice [ [] a federal court to allow the agency to keep secret the names of top staffers working in Special Counsel Jack Smith’s office that is targeting former President Donald Trump and other Americans. (Before his appointment to investigate and prosecute Trump, Special Counsel Jack Smith was at the center of several controversial issues, the [ scandal [] among them. In 2014, a Judicial Watch [ [] revealed that top IRS officials had been in communication with Jack Smith’s then-Public Integrity Section about a plan to launch criminal investigations into conservative tax-exempt groups. Read more [ [].) In January 2024, we filed a [ [] against Fulton County, Georgia, for records regarding the hiring of Nathan Wade as a special prosecutor by Willis. Wade was hired to pursue unprecedented criminal investigations and prosecutions against former President Trump and others over the 2020 election disputes. In October 2023, we [ [] the DOJ for records and communications between the Office of U.S. Special Counsel Jack Smith and the Fulton County, Georgia, District Attorney’s office regarding requests/receipt of federal funding/assistance in the investigation of former President Trump and his 18 codefendants in the Fulton County indictment [] of August 14, 2023. To date, the DOJ is refusing to confirm or deny the existence of records, claiming that to do so would interfere with enforcement proceedings. Judicial Watch’s litigation challenging this is continuing. Through the New York Freedom of Information Law, in July 2023, we received the [ letter [] showing New York County District Attorney Alvin L. Bragg paid $900 per hour for partners and $500 per hour for associates to the Gibson, Dunn & Crutcher law firm for the purpose of suing Rep. Jim Jordan (R-OH) in an effort to shut down the House Judiciary Committee’s oversight investigation into Bragg’s unprecedented indictment of Trump. You can expect that the government abuses targeting Trump will not stop and will only increase – and you can also expect that Judicial Watch will not stop investigating and exposing this dangerous threat to our republican form of government. DEFENSE DEPARTMENT RECORDS SHOW U.S. AIR FORCE HOSTED ‘DRAG STORY TIME’ Your nation’s military is being ruined by woke ideology. Judicial Watch received [ pages [] of records regarding drag shows, drag story hours and other pride events for military personnel and their dependent minors organized and paid for by the U.S. Air Force. We obtained the documents through a May 5, 2023, Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) request submitted with [ [] Civic Action to the U.S. Department of Defense (DOD). The Defense Department issued at least half a dozen “no records” responses to the FOIA request prior to finally releasing these records. We requested: All emails and text messages sent to and from the Secretary of Defense, Lloyd J. Austin, III, the Deputy Secretary of Defense, Kathleen Hicks and the members of the Joint Chiefs of Staff regarding drag shows and drag story hours on U.S. military installations ... All Department of Defense documentation, including but not limited to PowerPoints, flyers, handouts, that were or are being used to promote any drag shows and drag story hours on U.S. military installations ... All Department of Defense documentation regarding the funding of drag shows and drag story hours on U.S. military installations ... A June 10, 2021, [ media post [] by the Ramstein & Vogelweh Air Force Libraries advertises: We’re celebrating PRIDE month with our very first DRAG STORY TIME! Our local Drag King, Sauvage, will be reading some of our favorite stories about what makes each of us special. Story time begins at 1030! Graphics included with the post include a rainbow flag and two books from which Drag King Sauvage intends to read. The first book is titled “I Am Perfectly Designed [ by Karamo Brown. The second book is titled “The HIPS on the DRAG QUEEN Go Swish, Swish, Swish [ with a depiction of three males in dresses. The records also include a graphic for a June 2 “Drag Queen Story Time [ event at the Ramstein Library. An advertisement for an 18 and older event on June 4 called “Drag Karaoke [ at “Club E” with “special guest from Monarchy of RoyalTEA” announces prizes for “best dressed” and drink specials. An advertisement for a seven-week [ reading program [] re-promotes “Drag Queen Storytime” on June 10 and shows each week given a different color identification for events that include virtual story times, teen socials and scavenger hunts. The newly obtained records include several additional [ for adult events [] (e.g. Bingo Night, Karaoke Night and D&I Pride Night) at “Club E” and the “Galaxy Club.” A [ [] from the marketing department of the 100th Force Support Squadron discusses proofs of brochures, posters and tickets for a “LGBT Obsurvance [sic] Event” to be held at the Galaxy Club on February 25, 2022. The names of all participants in the chain are redacted. One individual requests: Can you pretty please with a cherry on top please add, Drag In front of Show? Drag Show: 7:pm, I will need it on the tickets as well. Will I be getting a proof for the 250 pre-sale tickets? Please advise. Later in the chain, an individual states: I just had TSg [Redacted] in my office requesting LGBT Observance removed and changed to Drag Show. She claims she spoke to the FSSS [Force Support Squadron] commander. If you like [sic] to confirm with her before changing. I will pick up what is printed. I will not need anymore [sic] printed material except for an electronic sli.de with the change so they can print as they wish. I will take the 60 tickets and all printed material. It will work. No more printed material we are fine with what was done. May 2022 [ minutes [] from an international diversity and inclusion group called “Pathfinders” lists an extensive number of upcoming Pride Month and Diversity Day events that will be supported at Ramstein Air Force Base. A May 2022 [ [] with redacted sender and recipient(s) and subject line “Diversity and Inclusion Events” contains a list of upcoming events: Luau at the Crown – Asian American Pacific Islander Heritage Month (AAPIHM) Lei Making at the CDC (RAFA & RAFC) Luau at the Stukeley (AAPIHM) Lunch and Learn (AAPIHM) Origami at the Youth Center (RAFA only) Color Run (RAFC) Juneteenth (RAFA & RAFC) Drag Show Bingo (RAFA) Glow Party/Karaoke (RAFA) Diversity Day (All bases) – Strat Calendar In a May 30, 2022, [ [] with redacted sender and recipient and the subject line “Drag Events” the sender writes: I have attached our posters, FSS [Force Support Squadron] Calendar, and screen shots of the Facebook events. I’ve also attached a screenshot of the video the drag queen sent us to promote the events. The full video is too big for the NIPR server. The images are too big for the server so I am sending this in 2 emails. Also, I’m sure we also did at least one e-blast but I can’t seem to find it in my email. Let me know if you need anything else. A June 2022 [ [] for $400 covers booking Miss Lexi Andrews, Drag Queen, for an appearance at “Drag Queen Bingo” on June 23 and a performance at a “Glow Party” the following day. “The Department of Defense has once again proven that radical leftist ideology is more important than military preparedness and protecting Americans from tangible threats at home and abroad,” said Tim Huelskamp, Ph.D., CatholicVote senior advisor. “After an entire year of stonewalling, the DOD finally returned materials from just one command in one branch, which confirmed what we feared – that taxpayer funds were being used to promote drag shows and radical gender ideology on military bases, with full approval from Air Force leadership.” How on Earth is it appropriate to spend our limited defense dollars on promoting these sexually themed events for children and adults rather than on advancing the military’s mission? JUDICIAL WATCH SUES CIA FOR RECORDS ON HUNTER BIDEN INVESTIGATION Judicial Watch is digging into reports that federal agencies interfered in investigations of Hunter Biden. In our latest effort, we filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) [ [ [] against the Central Intelligence Agency for all agency records relating to the Department of Justice or Internal Revenue Service investigations of Hunter Biden and all records relating to efforts to interview lawyer Patrick Kevin Morris regarding Hunter Biden (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Central Intelligence Agency [] (No. 1:24-cv-01537)). Los Angeles-based lawyer [ [] is reportedly a friend of Hunter Biden’s, who allegedly loaned the president’s son millions of dollars. Since 2019, Morris has allegedly [ [] him approximately $4.9 million for “personal expenses,” including federal taxes. We sued in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after the CIA failed to respond to two FOIA requests. The first, dated March 22, 2024, asks the agency for: All documents and communications referring or relating to the Department of Justice or Internal Revenue Service investigation of Rober Hunter Biden, DPOB: February 4, 1970, Wilmington, DE. All documents and communications referring or relating to Attorney Patrick Kevin Morris, including but not limited to requests or efforts to interview Mr. Morris concerning Robert Hunter Biden. The second FOIA request, dated March 27, 2024, asks the CIA for: All records of communications including, but not limited to, emails and text messages between officials of the CIA and officials of the U.S. Justice Department regarding Hunter Biden and/or Hunter Biden’s lawyer, Kevin Morris. In March 2024, House Judiciary Committee Chairman Jim Jordan and Oversight and Accountability Committee Chairman James Comer [ [] that a whistleblower disclosed to the committees that the CIA intervened to stop the IRS from interviewing Morris: Recently, the Committees received information from a whistleblower alleging that the Central Intelligence Agency(CIA) intervened in the investigation of Hunter Biden to prevent the Internal Revenue Service (IRS) and the Department of Justice (DOJ) investigators from interviewing [Morris]. We therefore write to request relevant material from the CIA. As part of the impeachment inquiry, the Committees are investigating, among other things, whether President Biden “abuse[d] his power as President to impede, obstruct, or otherwise hinder investigations or the prosecution of Hunter Biden.” As background, for years, the IRS and DOJ had been investigating Hunter Biden for tax crimes. The Committees have documented how the DOJ deviated from its standard processes to afford preferential treatment to Hunter Biden. The Committees learned about the deviations in the spring of 2023 after two brave whistleblowers testified to Congress that DOJ officials deviated “from the normal process that provided preferential treatment, in this case to Hunter Biden . . . .” Among other deviations, DOJ officials restricted what investigative steps the investigators could pursue, tipped off Hunter Biden's attorneys about investigative steps, and even prevented investigators from conducting witness interviews. The whistleblowers’ testimony about the preferential treatment provided to Hunter Biden has been corroborated by testimony from other witnesses and documents the Committees have received. Hunter Biden faces two separate criminal trials in June. Biden’s trial on gun charges in Delaware is scheduled to begin on June 3. On June 20, his trial on various tax charges begins in California. It is more than interesting that the CIA is stonewalling our Hunter Biden-related request. We have several FOIA lawsuits and information requests focused on Biden family corruption. We sued the FBI for records regarding the gun owned by Hunter Biden that reportedly was thrown in a trash can behind a Delaware grocery store. In a [ status report [] to the court, the FBI stated it would not produce records about the incident due to an “ongoing criminal investigation.” In February 2023, from a separate lawsuit, we [ records [] from the United States Secret Service that implicate the FBI in the unusual action to help Hunter Biden. In response to a February 24, 2021, [ [] inquiry from Politico reporter Ben Schreckinger regarding the Secret Service’s involvement in the investigation of the Hunter Biden gun incident, the Communications Department asks for “more information or documentation.” Schreckinger responds: “Sure thing. Agents visited StarQuest Shooters & Survival Supply and asked to take possession of the paperwork Hunter had filled out to purchase a gun there. The FBI also had some involvement in the investigation.” In October 2020, The Blaze [ [] that in October 2018, Hunter Biden’s handgun was taken by Hallie Biden, the widow of then-presidential nominee Joe Biden’s son Beau. In 2021, Politico reported [ Hallie took Hunter’s gun and threw it in a trash can behind a grocery store, only to return later to find it gone. Delaware police began investigating, concerned that the trash can was across from a high school and that the missing gun could be used in a crime, according to law enforcement officials and a copy of the police report obtained by POLITICO. But a curious thing happened at the time: Secret Service agents approached the owner of the store where Hunter bought the gun and asked to take the paperwork involving the sale, according to two people, one of whom has firsthand knowledge of the episode and the other was briefed by a Secret Service agent after the fact. In June 2023, we sued [] the CIA for all communications of the spy agency’s Prepublication Classification Review Board (PCRB) regarding an October 19, 2020, email request to review and “clear” a letter signed by 51 former intelligence community officials characterizing the Hunter Biden laptop story as having “all the earmarks of a Russian disinformation campaign.” In July 2023, we sued [] the DOJ for records from the Office of the Attorney General and Office of the Deputy Attorney General regarding the Internal Revenue Service investigation of Hunter Biden. In June 2023, we filed a lawsuit [] against the Department of Justice for a copy of the FBI FD-1023 form that describes “an alleged criminal scheme involving then-Vice President Biden and a foreign national relating to the exchange of money for policy decisions.” Judicial Watch also asked for communications about the FD-1023. In May 2023, we filed a FOIA lawsuit [] against the National Archives for Biden family records and communications regarding travel and finance transactions, as well as communications between the Bidens and several known business associates. On October 14, 2022, we sued the DOJ [] for all records in the possession of FBI Supervisory Intelligence Analyst Brian Auten regarding an August 6, 2020, briefing provided to members of the U.S. Senate. Ron Johnson (R-WI) and Chuck Grassley (R-IA) raised concerns that the briefing was intended to undermine the senators’ investigation of Hunter Biden. We filed a lawsuit against the U.S. State Department on April 20, 2022, for messages sent through the SMART [] (State Messaging and Archive Retrieval Toolkit) system that mention Hunter Biden. In December 2020, State Department records [] obtained through a Judicial Watch FOIA lawsuit showed that former U.S. Ambassador to Ukraine Marie “Masha” Yovanovitch had specifically warned in 2017 about corruption allegations against Burisma Holdings. In October 2020, weh forced the release of State Department records [] that included a briefing checklist of a February 22, 2019, meeting in Kyiv between then-U.S. Ambassador to Ukraine Marie Yovanovitch and Sally Painter, co-founder and chief operating officer of Blue Star Strategies, a Democratic lobbying firm which was hired by Burisma Holdings to combat corruption allegations. At the time of the meeting, Hunter Biden was serving on the board of directors for Burisma Holdings. BIDEN AGENCY RELEASING SUSPECTED TERRORISTS THREATENS MILITARY BASES, INFRASTRUCTURE The recent incident involving two Jordanian nationals trying to breach the Marine base at Quantico is concerning. And it highlights the national security risk of the Biden administration permitting a border invasion, as our Corruption Chronicles blog reports []. Under the Biden administration the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) has a pattern of releasing suspected terrorists at the southwest border resulting in national security risks that include threats to U.S. military installations and critical infrastructure, a congressional committee affirms. Federal lawmakers reveal that since Biden took office the U.S. Border Patrol has encountered at least 351 illegal aliens on the Terrorist Screening Data Set coming into the country between ports of entry. Among them are two Jordanian nationals who recently attempted to breach a military base not far from the nation’s capital. The men drove a truck to the main gate of Marine Corps Base Quantico earlier this month and ignored guards’ orders to stop when they could not provide credentials required to gain access to the facility. The Virginia base is about 35 miles south of Washington, D.C. Now the House Homeland Security Committee, established nearly two decades ago to ensure that the American people are protected from terrorist attacks, is investigating the matter and demanding action from administration officials charged with safeguarding the nation, including the secretaries of Homeland Security (Alejandro Mayorkas) and Defense (Lloyd Austin) as well as FBI Director Christopher Wray. In a letter [] to the Biden officials, high-ranking committee members including chairman Mark Green of Tennessee, ask for documents and other pertinent information to aid in their investigation into threats posed by foreign nationals to U.S. military bases and other critical infrastructure. That includes communications such as text messages and electronic mail between DHS, DOD and the FBI related to the May 3 incident at Marine Corps Base Quantico, documents to identify the names and countries of origin of the truck’s occupants and their current alien file. The committee also wants files with all derogatory information in the Terrorist Screening Data Set associated with any individual who attempted to breach the military compound and all files containing notes from Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) officers and prosecutors referring to the individuals involved. The attempted breach at the Marine Corps base reflects a possibly more dire reality for the state of U.S. national security, the committee members write, adding recent congressional testimony delivered by the FBI director. “As Director Wray stated in a recent Senate hearing, ‘a wide array of very dangerous threats . . . emanate from the border, requiring ‘much greater vigilance’ to protect the country.” The legislators point out that DHS’s relaxed vetting standards, which complement Biden’s avowed desire to surge the border with inadmissible migrants, have created an environment ripe for exploitation by individuals aiming to undermine the United States at its most critical points. “If individuals on the terrorist watchlist are so emboldened to attempt to breach a Marine Corps base, the Department of Homeland Security and the entire executive branch must act swiftly to identify, apprehend, and detain such hostile actors on American soil,” the letter states. The recent incident in Virginia appears to be part of a broader security issue involving U.S. military bases and foreign intruders. Less than a year ago a mainstream newspaper published an alarming exposé [] [ Chinese nationals, sometimes posing as tourists, accessing military bases and other sensitive U.S. sites as many as 100 times. In the story U.S. officials, from agencies such as the FBI and DOD, describe the incidents as espionage threats designed to test security practices at U.S. military installations and other federal sites. Examples include Chinese nationals—required to report back to the Chinese Communist Party (CCP)—crossing into a U.S. missile range in New Mexico to scuba divers swimming in murky waters near a U.S. government rocket-launch facility in Florida. The same Homeland Security Committee also initiated an investigation into the Chinese breaches after learning about them in the media. In a September 2023 letter [] to Mayorkas, Wray and Austin, the committee points out that the “persistent and multi-faceted threats posed by the CCP to U.S. homeland security have only intensified under the Biden-Harris administration.” Until next week, [Contribute] [] <a href="" target="blank"><img src="" style="width:100%;height:auto;" alt="advertisement"></a> [32x32x1] [] [32x32x2] [] [32x32x3] [] [32x32x3] [] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2024, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [] |

Fellow Patriots,

I hate to be the bearer of bad news, but I just spoke to my finance team, and they shared some upsetting news with me. **_They told me if I don’t reach my monthly fundraising goal, we will have to make serious changes that will make it difficult to win._**

They told me to reach out to my most loyal patriots, so friend, I am reaching out to you. I knew you would not let me down since you have always been a loyal supporter through good times and bad.

The verdict in the Trump trial yesterday made it crystal clear: failure isn't an option. The only chance we have to save our country is a MAGA sweep this November. And that can only happen if we all work together to defeat everything the left has lined up against us.

[**I need to raise $6,000 in the next 12 hours, or we could hand the Left serious momentum at the worst time. I need your support now more than ever. Can you rush an emergency donation of $15 or even $25 before midnight tonight?**](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=a539d69fbe4c413cacb1374f5c3871c7&_e=QoLS6jwjXjrZxMdOlOHrFnsxgsLgrnVF8rDqRJyVTIBJJWHN38xsD6e_7vqKozsWXzP3xcVuOui45S1uyk8Taiz1wZVjkrVA-k26WRVnvJQaX6Pn7Mw-RlObXFdt1UpRKrIw2ORDuq59fjM4Nd8jq25KKZX-JHVrRLxsWxYEk1TV0hPhHKfLPbgTFEUizGDFpnFT4zyf0kWjPv8-MZdCKEr0ic1MfVZKR6mK6ChKSmOedmnSzEUCqWxYM4O3cs1h88JR-E8COXuLB4SfInwIk9ebMKRFocKfQxBURiXKF3dkIyyIM8kxBZkIEfc7k7S5)

**We will win this, but I need your immediate support. It all starts with FLIPPING the Senate RED and taking back the majority.**

[**_Again, if everyone who receives this email donates JUST $15 or $25, we can send a message to the Democrats that their BS ends in November._**](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=a539d69fbe4c413cacb1374f5c3871c7&_e=QoLS6jwjXjrZxMdOlOHrFnsxgsLgrnVF8rDqRJyVTIBJJWHN38xsD6e_7vqKozsWXzP3xcVuOui45S1uyk8Taiz1wZVjkrVA-k26WRVnvJQaX6Pn7Mw-RlObXFdt1UpRKrIw2ORDuq59fjM4Nd8jqyvD0QWk_urlh23wh-dbrIljypiOuxgYEyufv4YoMfTCGptXQpO7crLJyX7l57umF5ySeGnzDzEz7lRxByihBFjfLrcdr9rZN_FwpmFoU9yOYYjv1fZIacixhxpPPid7ugNzFS6u9Mp6E4OeW9WTu2NZAO_lOsxw4tzNrKvCNwwu)

Falling short now simply isn't an option. With less than a month until the primary, my opponent, and his allies, are pouring an influx of money into this race. I'm counting on folks like you to come through at this critical moment.

The stakes couldn't be higher, so I'm asking one last time: Will you please make a gift of $ or any amount to help me win on June 25th and meet our end-of-month fundraising goal?

body:

# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=6578%2E5257348%2ElmU_cE)
Hi Derek, it’s Adam. I had to reach out to you one last time before my campaign’s monthly fundraising deadline at midnight tonight.
The main House GOP super PAC just announced it is reserving $30 million in fall advertising in California to match their entire spending from 2022. More than in any other state. And there could be more coming.
Not to mention, Trump’s campaign outraised Biden’s by $25 million last month as Trump leads in most battleground state polls.
If we’re going to stop Trump’s momentum and defeat the MAGA movement, it needs to start right here, right now. **I’ve set an emergency deadline goal of generating 482 online donations before midnight so we don’t fall short of our May goal.**
Can you pitch in? Use my personal link: **[[secure.actblue.com/donate/may2024_abs_em?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=may2024_abs_em.HG8rlH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20240531_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=6578%2E5257348%2ElmU_cE)** There are 482 towns and cities across the Golden State — and with more than half a dozen competitive House races and $30 million in GOP super PAC spending, we’ll need to make our presence felt in every one of them. **[[Here’s that fundraising link before our midnight deadline one more time.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=may2024_abs_em.HG8rlH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20240531_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=6578%2E5257348%2ElmU_cE)** Thanks for pitching in. — Adam [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=may2024_abs_em.HG8rlH&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20240531_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=6578%2E5257348%2ElmU_cE) | | [DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=may2024_abs_em.L1LaEy&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20240531_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=6578%2E5257348%2ElmU_cE)

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: The numbers don’t lie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
Derek — We
only have a few hours left to reach our end-of-month fundraising goal, but
my team just let me know that we’re not on track.

So today, I’m asking you to chip in $3 — and no, that’s not a typo!

You might be thinking, there’s no way $3 can make a difference. Not when
our megamillionaire Republican opponent, Eric Hovde, is writing his
campaign seven-figure checks and outraising our campaign.

But while Eric Hovde is Eric Hovde’s largest donor, our campaign is fueled
by grassroots supporters like you.

Don’t believe me? Well, the numbers don’t lie: 96% of all donations we
received last quarter were under $200.

$3, $5, or $10 might not seem like much in the grand scheme of things. But
when thousands of supporters chip in to help defend our Democratic Senate
majority, it all adds up and helps us build the resources we’ll need to
keep this seat blue.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2254?refcode=EM_NBI_TE_20240501_FR_EOM_0_3MO_TonyEvers_NA_NA_EOM1.5&t=1001&akid=6721%2E1827488%2EZmBLy1 ]Before the deadline, will you split a donation of $3 (or more!) between
Tony Evers and my campaign to help me stop my self-funding megamillionaire
