name: sent from Stefanie's iPhone
subject: bumping this email from my boss
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
there's still time to answer Kirsten's call before her end-of-month deadline

---
Hi there, did you see Kirsten's email? She reached out to personally ask committed supporters like you to donate before her end-of-month deadline at midnight tonight.
But there are just over 3 hours left to hit her $125,000 goal, and you still haven't answered her call!
**This is the last email that you'll get from our team before we close the books on our final end-of-month goal before we head into end-of-quarter. Kirsten can't afford a single misstep. So please, can you rush a gift now to help her make up the gap before it's too late? Here's a personalized link to make your donation:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs_fr_defend-senate-2024](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86052303/476695261/-1789327584?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk5089-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjY5OGJlNy1iMDFmLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HmFaFBRvlA8dMakFPdVcO7HLp3ALNDqwgTJrsF51OnU=)**
This election cycle is already shaping up to be one of the most expensive in history — _and New York is on the GOP's list of top-targeted seats._ GOP megadonors are already pouring MILLIONS into this race. Kirsten refuses to accept a cent from corporate PACs, so she's counting on strong, early support from grassroots donors to fight back.
There's still time to answer Kirsten's call and stand with her — but the clock is ticking. **Please, can you chip in anything you can spare before May ends to help us hit our deadline at midnight? Here's that ActBlue link again:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs_fr_defend-senate-2024](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86052306/476695264/-1789327584?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk5089-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjY5OGJlNy1iMDFmLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HmFaFBRvlA8dMakFPdVcO7HLp3ALNDqwgTJrsF51OnU=)**
The path to a blue Senate AND a blue House runs through New York. That means the GOP will jump on any signs of weakness in Kirsten's campaign. We cannot let ourselves fall short here.
Thank you so much,

Stefanie

From: **Kirsten Gillibrand**

| | |

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86052309/476695267/-1789327584?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk5089-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjY5OGJlNy1iMDFmLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HmFaFBRvlA8dMakFPdVcO7HLp3ALNDqwgTJrsF51OnU=)
---
Friend, I wanted to reach out to personally thank you.
I have so much to thank you for, so this message is a bit longer than usual. But in case you're short on time, I have to make sure that you see this first: **My end-of-month deadline is less than 48 hours away, and we're still pacing dangerously short of my $125,000 goal.**[**I hate that I have to ask, but this is incredibly important: If you have anything extra to spare, can you chip in $5 to help me hit this goal? We’ve made so much progress together already, but I need your help to make sure that we can continue this work for years to come.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86052311/476695269/-1789327584?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk5089-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjY5OGJlNy1iMDFmLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HmFaFBRvlA8dMakFPdVcO7HLp3ALNDqwgTJrsF51OnU=)
| | [DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86052312/476695274/-1789327584?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk5089-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjY5OGJlNy1iMDFmLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HmFaFBRvlA8dMakFPdVcO7HLp3ALNDqwgTJrsF51OnU=)
---
If you have the time to keep reading, I hope that you'll take a moment to celebrate our recent wins.
In 2023, we really got to work. I introduced legislation to create a national paid leave program — legislation that I first introduced 10 years ago and have continued to advocate for since then. You immediately rallied behind me, voicing your support for this long-overdue legislation. **And today, support for paid family leave is higher than ever before** — including 85% of all voters in battleground states! Thank you for making this possible.
I also**released my Strategic Plan on Aging to make sure that our seniors can retire with dignity and financial stability.** From expanding existing programs like Medicare to helping more seniors remain in their homes, these proposals would drastically improve the quality of life for millions of seniors. Thank you for supporting my work to make this happen.
I'm also incredibly grateful for the outpouring of support from this grassroots team after **I introduced a resolution to finally certify the Equal Rights Amendment.****** This amendment would establish protections against gender-based discrimination in our constitution, once and for all, giving us a legal basis to restore reproductive rights. Activists have been fighting for the ERA for 100 years, and it is truly an honor to carry forward their work today. Thank you for standing beside me in the fight for gender equity and reproductive freedom.
Lastly, I fought tirelessly to make sure that the National Defense Authorization Act included a pay increase for service members, investments to clean up toxic PFAS contamination and funding for hundreds of spots in my brand-new cyber security academy at over 400 schools. Thank you for helping me ensure that our veterans and service members get the benefits they deserve.

There have been so many other moments when you've stood beside me, and I am grateful for every single one of them. But our fight for progress is far from over. And now, Democrats are in the most difficult election year in recent memory.
Here in New York, Republicans just had their best election cycle in years. Now, they're directly targeting my seat. With a narrow 51-49 majority, we cannot afford to show any signs of weakness. **Missing this end-of-month goal would be sending a crystal clear message to the GOP that this seat is up for grabs.****[_So please, will you donate $5 or whatever you can spare before 11:59 p.m. to help me continue our fight for progress this year? Because I refuse to accept corporate PAC money, I'm counting on your help to make up the gap._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86052313/476695275/-1789327584?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk5089-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjY5OGJlNy1iMDFmLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HmFaFBRvlA8dMakFPdVcO7HLp3ALNDqwgTJrsF51OnU=)**

clean_body: there's still time to answer Kirsten's call before her end-of-month deadline Hi there, did you see Kirsten's email? She reached out to personally ask committed supporters like you to donate before her end-of-month deadline at midnight tonight. But there are just over 3 hours left to hit her $125,000 goal, and you still haven't answered her call! This is the last email that you'll get from our team before we close the books on our final end-of-month goal before we head into end-of-quarter. Kirsten can't afford a single misstep. So please, can you rush a gift now to help her make up the gap before it's too late? Here's a personalized link to make your donation:= This election cycle is already shaping up to be one of the most expensive in history — and New York is on the GOP's list of top-targeted seats. GOP megadonors are already pouring MILLIONS into this race. Kirsten refuses to accept a cent from corporate PACs, so she's counting on strong, early support from grassroots donors to fight back. There's still time to answer Kirsten's call and stand with her — but the clock is ticking. Please, can you chip in anything you can spare before May ends to help us hit our deadline at midnight? Here's that ActBlue link again:= The path to a blue Senate AND a blue House runs through New York. That means the GOP will jump on any signs of weakness in Kirsten's campaign. We cannot let ourselves fall short here. Thank you so much, Stefanie \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Kirsten Gillibrand Subject: personally reaching out | | | | = Friend, I wanted to reach out to personally thank you. I have so much to thank you for, so this message is a bit longer than usual. But in case you're short on time, I have to make sure that you see this first: My end-of-month deadline is less than 48 hours away, and we're still pacing dangerously short of my $125,000 goal.= | | = If you have the time to keep reading, I hope that you'll take a moment to celebrate our recent wins. In 2023, we really got to work. I introduced legislation to create a national paid leave program — legislation that I first introduced 10 years ago and have continued to advocate for since then. You immediately rallied behind me, voicing your support for this long-overdue legislation. And today, support for paid family leave is higher than ever before — including 85% of all voters in battleground states! Thank you for making this possible. I alsoreleased my Strategic Plan on Aging to make sure that our seniors can retire with dignity and financial stability. From expanding existing programs like Medicare to helping more seniors remain in their homes, these proposals would drastically improve the quality of life for millions of seniors. Thank you for supporting my work to make this happen. I'm also incredibly grateful for the outpouring of support from this grassroots team after I introduced a resolution to finally certify the Equal Rights Amendment.** This amendment would establish protections against gender-based discrimination in our constitution, once and for all, giving us a legal basis to restore reproductive rights. Activists have been fighting for the ERA for 100 years, and it is truly an honor to carry forward their work today. Thank you for standing beside me in the fight for gender equity and reproductive freedom. Lastly, I fought tirelessly to make sure that the National Defense Authorization Act included a pay increase for service members, investments to clean up toxic PFAS contamination and funding for hundreds of spots in my brand-new cyber security academy at over 400 schools. Thank you for helping me ensure that our veterans and service members get the benefits they deserve. There have been so many other moments when you've stood beside me, and I am grateful for every single one of them. But our fight for progress is far from over. And now, Democrats are in the most difficult election year in recent memory. Here in New York, Republicans just had their best election cycle in years. Now, they're directly targeting my seat. With a narrow 51-49 majority, we cannot afford to show any signs of weakness. Missing this end-of-month goal would be sending a crystal clear message to the GOP that this seat is up for grabs.**= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you again for all that you do. name: Lucas Kunce
subject: End of May fundraising deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Before we head into the weekend, can you help?
#
Hey Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce.
It’s the last day of May, which means our end-of-month fundraising deadline is just a few hours away. **[Can you rush a donation to help us close out strong?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/51511?refcode=em20240531-5649&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5649%2E614464%2EUeXE5Z)**
**[CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/51511?refcode=em20240531-5649&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5649%2E614464%2EUeXE5Z)**
From traveling across Missouri to meet with voters in every corner of our state, to standing alongside workers on the picket line as they fought for better pay and working conditions, and helping to collect signatures for a record-breaking ballot initiative to take back reproductive freedoms in Missouri, it’s been a busy month.
Building a grassroots movement like ours takes a lot of resources, and my campaign hasn’t accepted a cent from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or Big Oil and Big Pharma execs. That means I’m relying on real people like you every step of the way to keep this campaign going.
Seriously, all of this wouldn’t be possible without people like you on my team.
So before we head into the weekend and close out the month, I’d like to ask — **are you able to make a donation of any amount before our big end-of-month deadline tonight to help power this campaign through next month and beyond?**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/51512?refcode=em20240531-5649&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=5649%2E614464%2EUeXE5Z) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/51512?refcode=em20240531-5649&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=5649%2E614464%2EUeXE5Z) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/51512?refcode=em20240531-5649&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=5649%2E614464%2EUeXE5Z) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/51512?refcode=em20240531-5649&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=5649%2E614464%2EUeXE5Z) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/51512?refcode=em20240531-5649&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=5649%2E614464%2EUeXE5Z) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/51512?refcode=em20240531-5649&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=5649%2E614464%2EUeXE5Z) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/51511?refcode=em20240531-5649&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=5649%2E614464%2EUeXE5Z)
---
I’ve been grateful to meet so many folks all across the state this month — people from all parties and walks of life who are ready to elect a Senator who will have their backs.
Now, let’s keep working to take back this Senate seat for real Missourians.
Thanks for being part of this movement.
— Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20240531-5649-footer&t=10&refcode2=5649_614464_UeXE5Z&akid=5649%2E614464%2EUeXE5Z)**

subject: Before you slam your laptop shut

body:

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Guilty
body:
| | | **BREAKING NEWS:** A jury of twelve ordinary citizens found Donald Trump **GUILTY** on all 34 counts in the _People of the State of New York v. Trump_ case of falsifying business records to cover up campaign finance violations during the 2016 presidential election. It is the first conviction of a former U.S. president in history. **This is an important affirmation of the rule of law. No one individual, no matter how powerful or rich, is above the law. Not even a former President of the United States. Anything less is not democracy.** **Trump’s felony convictions will not bar him from running for President, and we will still need to defeat him in November. And as we saw outside the courthouse immediately after the verdict, he will be even more aggressive in attacking the democratic guardrails protecting our institutions.** [_**So this is no time to let up in our efforts to ensure a Democratic majority in the House and Senate. Split $25 to my campaign and Josh Harder before our May fundraising deadline at midnight tonight to help defeat Trump and defend the rule of law >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86052397/476699649/2076570274?&refcode=E8792-20240531-AdamSchiff-SL-Surrogate&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDcwOTI4NGQtYjIxZi1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BTTyOMhl-rvjVgXU7QsWGwAOidgIOUUc9ubP5tPVJRM=) [DONATE $25 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86052398/476699650/2076570274?refcode=E8792-20240531-AdamSchiff-SB-Surrogate&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDcwOTI4NGQtYjIxZi1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BTTyOMhl-rvjVgXU7QsWGwAOidgIOUUc9ubP5tPVJRM=)

Peter, a Manhattan jury found Trump guilty on all 34 felony counts of falsifying business records to cover up campaign finance violations during the 2016 election.
Twelve ordinary American citizens decided the legal fate of Donald Trump. Proving that nobody – not even a former President of the United States or (pretend) billionaire – is above the law.
And despite Trump’s efforts to distract, delay, and deny – justice arrived for Donald Trump all the same. And by a jury of his peers.
My takeaway:
Our system of justice worked. Our rule of law withstood the immense pressure Trump brought to bear.
Notwithstanding the enormous stresses on our democracy, the system is holding. And accountability matters.
[_**Winning the presidency may now be the only thing remaining between Trump and avoiding prison time — either in this prosecution or three others — and he has shown he will tear down the entire system of American democracy to protect himself and return to power. WE MUST NOT LET HIM. Thousands of Democrats are sending in contributions to hold Trump accountable at the ballot box. Join them and split a contribution of $25 to my campaign and Josh Harder today before tonight’s May fundraising deadline.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86052399/476699651/2076570274?&refcode=E8792-20240531-AdamSchiff-SL-Surrogate&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDcwOTI4NGQtYjIxZi1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BTTyOMhl-rvjVgXU7QsWGwAOidgIOUUc9ubP5tPVJRM=)

Make no mistake, this verdict will only increase Donald Trump’s attempts to discredit the justice system and tear down our democracy. His enablers in Congress will do the same.
**We need to call those efforts out for exactly what they are:**
_**A blind attempt to protect a now-convicted felon, and deeply immoral human being, in the headlong pursuit of power.**_
Because justice prevailed. Justice.
And it’s up to each of us to make sure the justice system continues to hold him accountable. In federal cases in Washington, D.C. and Florida and the state case in Georgia.
And in November, we MUST defeat Donald Trump at the ballot box. That will be the ultimate accountability and affirmation of our democracy.
Thanks for standing up for the rule of law and the cherished legacy of our founders.

clean_body: | | | BREAKING NEWS: A jury of twelve ordinary citizens found Donald Trump GUILTY on all 34 counts in the People of the State of New York v. Trump case of falsifying business records to cover up campaign finance violations during the 2016 presidential election. It is the first conviction of a former U.S. president in history. This is an important affirmation of the rule of law. No one individual, no matter how powerful or rich, is above the law. Not even a former President of the United States. Anything less is not democracy. Trump’s felony convictions will not bar him from running for President, and we will still need to defeat him in November. And as we saw outside the courthouse immediately after the verdict, he will be even more aggressive in attacking the democratic guardrails protecting our institutions. = = Peter, a Manhattan jury found Trump guilty on all 34 felony counts of falsifying business records to cover up campaign finance violations during the 2016 election. Twelve ordinary American citizens decided the legal fate of Donald Trump. Proving that nobody – not even a former President of the United States or (pretend) billionaire – is above the law. And despite Trump’s efforts to distract, delay, and deny – justice arrived for Donald Trump all the same. And by a jury of his peers. My takeaway: Our system of justice worked. Our rule of law withstood the immense pressure Trump brought to bear. Notwithstanding the enormous stresses on our democracy, the system is holding. And accountability matters. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Make no mistake, this verdict will only increase Donald Trump’s attempts to discredit the justice system and tear down our democracy. His enablers in Congress will do the same. We need to call those efforts out for exactly what they are: A blind attempt to protect a now-convicted felon, and deeply immoral human being, in the headlong pursuit of power. Because justice prevailed. Justice. And it’s up to each of us to make sure the justice system continues to hold him accountable. In federal cases in Washington, D.C. and Florida and the state case in Georgia. And in November, we MUST defeat Donald Trump at the ballot box. That will be the ultimate accountability and affirmation of our democracy. Thanks for standing up for the rule of law and the cherished legacy of our founders. – Adam = *

name: George Whitesides (personal)
subject: 6 hours
body:
Peter,

I want to thank you for being on this team. It’ll take thousands of supporters to unseat MAGA Mike Garcia, and with your support we’re well on our way.

A lot has happened in recent weeks: Polling showed us ahead of Garcia by 3-points, and the national GOP responded by ordering $30 MILLION in ads to flood California with a specific focus on CA-27.

Whoever wins this seat could decide House control. That’s why our end-of-month fundraising deadline tonight is so critical – every dollar counts in this fight.

So before you sign off and enjoy the weekend, can I count on you to donate $3 or any amount? Here’s a link to donate: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q2-2024?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86052476/476700226/-731719488?refcode=em-5.31.24-all-2-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjlkZTY3MC1iMjFmLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9CgEP_4fEV-BQ5DQfn2C-9SMtAgSdshcyuX8087MDtE=)

It’s clear that national Republicans are only increasing their focus on our campaign.

From Fox News to the National Republican Campaign Committee to Mike Garcia himself, I’m standing strong in the wake of these attacks. As with the dark money soon to flood airwaves in CA-27, there is surely more to come.

We must prepare now and maintain our strong momentum in this race. I’m traveling across the district, knocking on doors and attending events to spread the word about the importance of this race for our community and the House majority.

Your donations directly impact our reach. Please, chip in $3 or anything you can afford before midnight tonight: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gw-q2-2024?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86052477/476700227/-731719488?refcode=em-5.31.24-all-2-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjlkZTY3MC1iMjFmLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9CgEP_4fEV-BQ5DQfn2C-9SMtAgSdshcyuX8087MDtE=)

Thank you,

GW

* * *

George Whitesides for Congress
P.O. Box 221776
Newhall, CA 91322
United States

clean_body: we must ensure he doesn't have another term in Congress. | | Hi Peter — It’s Dean, Jessica’s campaign manager. Our end-of-month fundraising deadline is tonight at midnight, and we must raise $10,000. Jessica is up against an opponent who repeatedly shows us that he is far too extreme to represent the hardworking families of CA-03 in Congress. Kevin Kiley spread the big lie that Democrats stole the 2020 presidential election from Donald Trump ... Kiley votes in lockstep with Donald Trump's demands, Jim Jordan, and other GOP extremists nearly 100% of the time ... Kevin Kiley doesn't care about Californians' everyday concerns or interests. His only interest is pandering to Trump and Jordan's demands that he conform. Here's the bottom line, Peter: Kevin Kiley is not only too extreme for California's Third District, he's just plain wrong for our community. That's why we must ensure he doesn't have another term in Congress. name: Greg Stanton (personal)
subject: quick check in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
Hey Friend – Greg here!

Just dropping one last line to give you an update on our progress toward tonight’s fundraising goal.

When my team reached out earlier, we needed to raise $2,500 in grassroots contributions. Thanks to your incredible support, that gap is now about $1,200. Let’s keep it going! Can I count on you to chip in $10 to help us continue closing the gap by midnight? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gsq12024?refcode=em_fr_2024.5.31_b1_gs_all_PM]

I know you’ve heard this from us before – but Maricopa County, in addition to being home to our district, is one of the most consequential swing counties in America. That means that all eyes will be on us as we fight to ensure it goes blue from President Biden all the way down the ticket.

We can’t rise to the occasion without meeting our fundraising goals, which is why it’s so important that we get where we need to be by tonight. Anything you can pitch in is greatly appreciated! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gsq12024?refcode=em_fr_2024.5.31_b1_gs_all_PM]

Thank you for all that you do for this team!

Let’s do this,

Greg

--------------
To learn more about Greg Stanton's work, visit StantonForArizona.com

Phoenix, AZ 85018

body:
Peter, we need to know you're with us. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86052682/476707882/-120062714?refcode=WTEFEQ72_20240531_Closer_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1053856&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTAxZjNjMy1iNTFmLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x667yVTh5JbrR3d9X7iXLJIPQMygcm0vYa6eWHC8ms0=) Peter, in a moment, we're going to ask you to [**pitch in before our important End-of-Month deadline tonight**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86052683/476707883/-120062714?refcode=WTEFEQ72_20240531_Closer_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1053856&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTAxZjNjMy1iNTFmLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x667yVTh5JbrR3d9X7iXLJIPQMygcm0vYa6eWHC8ms0=) — but first, we'll explain what's at stake this cycle.

Here's what we're up against _and_ what we can accomplish together:
* **Stopping a national abortion ban:** We can prevent a nationwide ban by holding the U.S. Senate and electing Democratic pro-choice women like **Elissa Slotkin** in Michigan, **Lisa Blunt Rochester** in Delaware, **Angela Alsobrooks** in Maryland, and **Debbie Mucarsel-Powell** in Florida.

* **Restoring and protecting reproductive freedom at the local level:** Mayors, state legislators, and other local officials are on the frontlines fighting for our reproductive rights. That's why we're endorsing more and more state and local candidates who will defend abortion rights in cities and states across the country.

* **Flipping the U.S. House:** We need to flip just _five_ seats to regain our majority in the House. Luckily, we've already endorsed _14_ pro-choice fighters (and counting!) who have what it takes to defeat anti-choice opponents.

[**_We have a tough fight ahead of us to hold the Senate and flip the House on Election Day, AND we have a number of high-stakes local battles along the way. So, Peter, let's prove that the pro-choice movement is united, motivated, and stronger than ever. clean_body: Peter, we need to know you're with us. | = Peter, in a moment, we're going to ask you to = — but first, we'll explain what's at stake this cycle. Here's what we're up against and what we can accomplish together: Stopping a national abortion ban: We can prevent a nationwide ban by holding the U.S. Senate and electing Democratic pro-choice women like Elissa Slotkin in Michigan, Lisa Blunt Rochester in Delaware, Angela Alsobrooks in Maryland, and Debbie Mucarsel-Powell in Florida. Restoring and protecting reproductive freedom at the local level: Mayors, state legislators, and other local officials are on the frontlines fighting for our reproductive rights. That's why we're endorsing more and more state and local candidates who will defend abortion rights in cities and states across the country. Flipping the U.S. House:** We need to flip just five seats to regain our majority in the House. Luckily, we've already endorsed 14 pro-choice fighters (and counting!) who have what it takes to defeat anti-choice opponents. = If you have saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately. | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, the EMILYs List Campaigns Team EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. = = Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Bob Casey
subject: Will you help us take on a billionaire-funded super PAC?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=3134%2E552475%2Eb6iMU-)
$30 million, Peter.
That’s how much my opponent’s billionaire backers are preparing to pour into PA to defeat me and flip the Senate red.
These Wall Street billionaires are trying to buy this Senate seat. We can’t let them do that.
Here’s another number: $35.22.
That’s our average online donation this year, given by folks just like you.
[**Can you chip in $35.22 or more before tonight’s deadline to help us take on my mega-millionaire opponent and a billionaire-funded GOP super PAC? I need your support, and I need it today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240531-5?recurring=1&refcode=em20240531-5&refcode2=3134_552475_b6iMU-&akid=3134%2E552475%2Eb6iMU-)

From unprecedented investments in our country’s infrastructure and tackling the climate crisis head-on to lowering the cost of prescription drugs and passing the first significant federal gun safety law in nearly 30 years, President Biden and I have sought out solutions undeterred by what has been done before.
_But we’ll be the first to admit that we cannot continue this work without your support, Peter._

clean_body: | | | Hi Peter -- I want to share a personal story with you, but first: we’re coming up against a tough fundraising deadline tonight and could use the help of top supporters like you. If that’s all you need to hear, you can use the link below to chip in right away. Growing up, my mother instilled in me the ability to see what could be, unburdened by what has been. As a pioneer of breast cancer research, she was driven by the belief that every problem has a solution. She taught me to look for those solutions without thinking that we must blindly adhere to tradition. That’s not too different from how President Biden and I have approached our time in the White House. | | ---|--- From unprecedented investments in our country’s infrastructure and tackling the climate crisis head-on to lowering the cost of prescription drugs and passing the first significant federal gun safety law in nearly 30 years, President Biden and I have sought out solutions undeterred by what has been done before. But we’ll be the first to admit that we cannot continue this work without your support, Peter. As Americans, it is up to all of us to see what can be, unburdened by what has been -- and as a critical member of this grassroots team, we are so proud to have you in our corner making that possible. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | h | Peter, thank you again for your support. Kamala Kamala Harris Vice President of the United States

| | Peter,

I’ll make this one quick. My team has informed me that with just a few hours left until our end-of-month fundraising deadline for May, we are still $974 short of what we need to hit our goal. Thanks to the unwavering support of grassroots supporters like you over these last few days, we were able to close in on our fundraising gap, bringing us to 64% of our May fundraising goal. We need the strength of dedicated Democrats in your community to help steer our party toward victory in upcoming special elections and throughout 2024. name: Kim Schrier (personal)
subject: I couldn’t be more proud
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
This is how we can defend my seat in WA-08 together Peter, Our end-of-month deadline hits at midnight, but I needed to reach out to you one last time. My team tells me we're still short of where we need to be to hit our May goal. Falling short is not an option for us, not when there's so much at stake this November. We have to raise just $2,368 to close the gap and finish May strong. I know that with one last push from this grassroots team, we'll be able to do just that before the clock strikes midnight. I'm so grateful for all that you do for me and this campaign, and I couldn't be more proud to represent you in Congress. But if we're going to continue to build on the incredible progress we've made, then I need your help now. Can I count on your donation before midnight? You can chip in $5, or whatever you choose, at this link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/schrier-may24-eom](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86053147/476711106/1506767040?refcode=em24_240531_eom6_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240531_eom6_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=4501d5af-ba1f-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTAxZDVhZi1iYTFmLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Db9ciGVvnUMQrKN0zwW2TbDN6r3pOa-CsW9_HEDCGyE=)** Thank you for being on Team Kim, Kim | Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress

Debbie

body:
[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-makhlt-didthutlhu-r/) Friend,I'll get to the point.**President Trump needs your help. **Patriots across Wisconsin are stepping up to help our efforts. Will you? Don't be left behind. In order to defeat Joe Biden and **put an end to his politically motivated prosecutions,** President Trump MUST win Wisconsin this November. It all comes down to _**us.**_ [DONATE](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-makhlt-didthutlhu-y/) [VOLUNTEER](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-makhlt-didthutlhu-j/) [JOIN YOUR COUNTY PARTY](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-makhlt-didthutlhu-d/) By making a [contribution,](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-makhlt-didthutlhu-h/) [volunteering,](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-makhlt-didthutlhu-k/) or [joining your local county party](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-makhlt-didthutlhu-u/) - you _**WILL**_ make a difference. Anything helps. **It's up to us** to stop the weaponization of our legal system by the Democrats. | Dear Friend,

As we near the end of the month, I wanted to reach out to you with an urgent message. My campaign has been building momentum this month with very successful meet-and-greets, and meeting folks in the community.

Building grassroots support is vital, but unfortunately it’s not the only thing we need to do if we are going to flip this seat...
---
[](https://johnleeforcongress.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=18876e295d2df144af23d05e5&id=081bc4036a&e=91a702298f)
| Right now, our campaign team has a goal of reaching **$10,000** before tomorrow night, and we are over **$4,367** away from reaching it.
This campaign goal isn’t just about raising money, but having enough resources to go against Steve Horsford and the Leftists elites working to keep NV-04 under radical control.
**That’s why, as we approach the deadline, I'm asking for your help. Will you join us in reaching our end-of-month goal?**

# [#]
I want to respect your time, so I’ll skip right to why I’m reaching out: tonight is my end-of-month fundraising deadline, and I’m slightly behind on the goal my team has set to keep us on track to win in November.

If you’re able, will you chip in $ before midnight to help me close the gap, meet our fundraising goal, and win re-election to keep fighting for you in Congress? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-may24?amount=]

DONATE $ » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-may24?amount=]

Thank you!

— Raul
https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/ [https://www.facebook.com/DrRaulRuiz/] https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz [https://www.instagram.com/doctorraulruiz] https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz [https://twitter.com/Dr_RaulRuiz]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruiz-em-fr-footer]
The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress and to flip the House blue this November.

name: Hilary Franz
subject: Bringing leaders together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Hilary Franz
body:
I’m not one to pick partisan battles to divide people.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86053381/476711954/-743132135?refcode=BLU_EM_HFFC_2024-05-31_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWVhMjkyMDMtYmYxZi1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=44xJB_FaN1kFi8EU2LzWvuPx6R8x7-WYxiYmOjnX7uM=)

| Peter,

As we approach our critical end-of-month deadline in the race for Washington’s 6th Congressional District, I’m reaching out one last time for your support.

For the past eight years, I’ve dedicated myself to working right here in the 6th District and across the state, bringing people together and bridging divides to achieve real results for our communities.

Our communities are facing significant challenges. From the climate crisis to affordable housing, from economic mobility to tackling the fentanyl epidemic, we need leadership that focuses on solutions, not divisions.

I’m not one to pick partisan battles to divide people. With all the partisan rhetoric around critical issues like climate change, I'm proud of the work I've done to cut through the noise, build bipartisan support, and establish Washington as a leader in climate resiliency and wildfire response.

In Congress, I'll continue fighting to address our families’ most critical needs and work to bring our leaders together to deliver.

With the election just around the corner, we cannot afford to lose momentum. _**My end-of-month goal in just a few hours at midnight is crucial for maintaining the strength of our campaign.**_ I need your help to ensure we have the resources necessary to win my August primary and continue my fight for a better Washington.

[_**Can I count on you to contribute $5 or whatever you can afford today? Your support will help us reach our $20,000 goal by midnight and keep our campaign on track.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86053382/476711955/-1503676179?refcode=BLU_EM_HFFC_2024-05-31_2&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWVhMjkyMDMtYmYxZi1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=44xJB_FaN1kFi8EU2LzWvuPx6R8x7-WYxiYmOjnX7uM=)

clean_body: I’m not one to pick partisan battles to divide people. | = | Peter, As we approach our critical end-of-month deadline in the race for Washington’s 6th Congressional District, I’m reaching out one last time for your support. For the past eight years, I’ve dedicated myself to working right here in the 6th District and across the state, bringing people together and bridging divides to achieve real results for our communities. Our communities are facing significant challenges. From the climate crisis to affordable housing, from economic mobility to tackling the fentanyl epidemic, we need leadership that focuses on solutions, not divisions. I’m not one to pick partisan battles to divide people. With all the partisan rhetoric around critical issues like climate change, I'm proud of the work I've done to cut through the noise, build bipartisan support, and establish Washington as a leader in climate resiliency and wildfire response. In Congress, I'll continue fighting to address our families’ most critical needs and work to bring our leaders together to deliver. With the election just around the corner, we cannot afford to lose momentum. My end-of-month goal in just a few hours at midnight is crucial for maintaining the strength of our campaign. I need your help to ensure we have the resources necessary to win my August primary and continue my fight for a better Washington. = | = | = | = | = | = Together, Hilary Franz * | | = Paid for by Friends of Hilary Franz Friends of Hilary Franz PO Box 7437 Tacoma, WA 98417 United States | = Email is a critical way for our campaign to stay in touch with you, but if you wish to receive less email, you can change your subscription . [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/44151?t=7&akid=21478%2E4449941%2EPibjzH) Folks,

My team just texted me that our fundraising is heading in the wrong direction. **We’re running out of time to get things back on track.**

Look, I wish I didn’t have to send these damn fundraising emails, but the honest-to-God truth is that we can’t win this race if we don’t have enough resources to compete.

As you’re reading this, dark money groups are pouring millions of dollars into Montana to attack me and buy this Senate seat. It’ll take all of us working together to help fight them off.

[**That’s why I’m asking: Can you please split a few bucks between my campaign and Fight for Reform before our end-of-month deadline to protect my Senate seat and elect state and local Democrats? I wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t important.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/44151?t=8&akid=21478%2E4449941%2EPibjzH) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Fight for Reform and Jon Tester will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/44152?t=9&akid=21478%2E4449941%2EPibjzH)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/44153?t=10&akid=21478%2E4449941%2EPibjzH)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/44154?t=11&akid=21478%2E4449941%2EPibjzH)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/44155?t=12&akid=21478%2E4449941%2EPibjzH)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/44151?t=13&akid=21478%2E4449941%2EPibjzH)
This team has helped us win tough fights before, but I’m counting on you to get off the sidelines and into this race now more than ever.

Thank you.

—Jon
Jon Tester is only asking for contributions of up to $5,000 from individuals, federal PACs, and other federally permissible sources for End Citizens United-Nonfederal. name: Andrea Guzman
subject: + our grassroots team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
Hi there — I just wanted to bump this email from Camille.

I drew the short straw and am staying up late calculating all of our last minute donations at CADEM HQ, and right now we are still $3,450.67 short.

I want to have a list of supporters who helped get us over the top, so I am sharing my personal ActBlue link below.

There’s so much on the line here in California. If you could pitch in a donation, we’d really appreciate it.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-may24?&refcode=20240531_FR_90DO_EOM6&amount=75 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-may24?&refcode=20240531_FR_90DO_EOM6&amount=75]Gracias,
Andrea

----- Forwarded message -----
From: Camille Alcala
Date: Fri, May 31, 2024 at 10:07am
Subject: A tough decision

Dear team,
I just got out of a meeting where our team at the California Democratic Party had to make a tough decision.
We just got word this past week that the GOP’s primary super PAC for House races is preparing to spend over $30,000,000 in our state to elect Republicans in swing districts.
We know that we have to respond to all this dark money with more grassroots organizing — but we don’t have that kind of cash in our back pocket.
Lots of donors have stepped up ahead of our End of Month deadline, but as of an hour ago, we are still $8,350.50 short of where we need to be.
So, we had to make a call:
(1) Will we accelerate our mobilization efforts in the hope that our grassroots supporters will help us close the budget gap?
(2) Or will we hold off, potentially letting Republican dark money overwhelm our candidates in critical, must-win seats?
We decided to keep growing our mobilization program at full speed.
But now we need to close this $8,350.50 gap and go into the last month of Q2 at full throttle.
That’s why I’m asking: Will you rush a contribution of $ or even $? I don’t ask lightly, but your generosity is going to flip the U.S. House from red to blue, and we can’t do it without you! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-may24?&refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-may24?&refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-may24?&refcode=&amount=]

CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-may24?&refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-may24?&refcode=&amount=]Thank you,
- Camille
--
Camille Alcala
Finance Director
California Democratic Party

DONATE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=footer&amount=5]

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from Your America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1ucup2njru5o98knuiu5ve46j6qkur2dt0i1308_rp22sh2s8i6ep37c9j6ap32c9h2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zj0daoplplgampqv4uvuljac32p47t7p059jkhm8_rp22sh2s8i6ep37c9j6ap32c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zcqt88df3h8vps71tmmudqu457df6rjq9qmjgtl0_rp22sh2s8i6ep37c9j6ap32c9h2bs)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |
---

Your America
---

name: Christine Drazan
subject: It’s easier said than done
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Christine Drazan
body:
Friend, I've been hitting every corner of our district laser-focused on three key goals:

GOAL #1: [https://secure.winred.com/friends-of-christine-drazan/053124_eom_hadrazan/?utm_source=Housefile&utm_medium=HA-Email&utm_campaign=05.31.24_EOM_HADrazan&utm_content=Link] Cracking down on crime and tackling the homelessness crisis head-on.

GOAL #2: [https://secure.winred.com/friends-of-christine-drazan/053124_eom_hadrazan/?utm_source=Housefile&utm_medium=HA-Email&utm_campaign=05.31.24_EOM_HADrazan&utm_content=Link] Transforming our education system to ensure every child succeeds.

GOAL #3: [https://secure.winred.com/friends-of-christine-drazan/053124_eom_hadrazan/?utm_source=Housefile&utm_medium=HA-Email&utm_campaign=05.31.24_EOM_HADrazan&utm_content=Link] Reducing Oregon’s sky-high taxes to ease the burden on hardworking families.

Obviously, this is easier said than done. But Oregon faces challenges that will not be overcome with more of the same.

JOIN TEAM DRAZAN [https://secure.winred.com/friends-of-christine-drazan/053124_eom_hadrazan/?utm_source=Housefile&utm_medium=HA-Email&utm_campaign=05.31.24_EOM_HADrazan&utm_content=Link]

Tonight at midnight is our end-of-month deadline, and we need your support to ensure we have the resources to fight for our values and lead Oregon in the right direction. [https://secure.winred.com/friends-of-christine-drazan/053124_eom_hadrazan/?utm_source=Housefile&utm_medium=HA-Email&utm_campaign=05.31.24_EOM_HADrazan&utm_content=Link]

The path ahead is clear, and here’s how we’ll tackle it: we’ll strengthen law enforcement, we’ll restore high standards for our schools, and we’ll put more money back into Oregonian’s wallets.

JOIN TEAM DRAZAN [https://secure.winred.com/friends-of-christine-drazan/053124_eom_hadrazan/?utm_source=Housefile&utm_medium=HA-Email&utm_campaign=05.31.24_EOM_HADrazan&utm_content=Link]

I'm committed to these goals, but I can't do it alone. I need your support. Your donation, no matter how small, will make a significant impact [https://secure.winred.com/friends-of-christine-drazan/053124_eom_hadrazan/?utm_source=Housefile&utm_medium=HA-Email&utm_campaign=05.31.24_EOM_HADrazan&utm_content=Link] in our ability to bring about the change Oregon desperately needs.

PITCH IN $5 [https://secure.winred.com/friends-of-christine-drazan/053124_eom_hadrazan/?utm_source=Housefile&utm_medium=HA-Email&utm_campaign=05.31.24_EOM_HADrazan&utm_content=Link] PITCH IN $10 [https://secure.winred.com/friends-of-christine-drazan/053124_eom_hadrazan/?utm_source=Housefile&utm_medium=HA-Email&utm_campaign=05.31.24_EOM_HADrazan&utm_content=Link] PITCH IN $25 [https://secure.winred.com/friends-of-christine-drazan/053124_eom_hadrazan/?utm_source=Housefile&utm_medium=HA-Email&utm_campaign=05.31.24_EOM_HADrazan&utm_content=Link] PITCH IN $100 [https://secure.winred.com/friends-of-christine-drazan/053124_eom_hadrazan/?utm_source=Housefile&utm_medium=HA-Email&utm_campaign=05.31.24_EOM_HADrazan&utm_content=Link]

Can I count on you to pitch in before midnight? [https://secure.winred.com/friends-of-christine-drazan/053124_eom_hadrazan/?utm_source=Housefile&utm_medium=HA-Email&utm_campaign=05.31.24_EOM_HADrazan&utm_content=Link] Every dollar counts in this fight for a better Oregon.

Thank you for staying in the fight,

Christine Drazan

Paid for by Friends of Christine Drazan. PAC ID 19050

29993 Maple Drive Rainier, OR 97048

name: Stephanie Mohr
subject: Stand with police
body:
I’m asking you to sign this Emergency Pardon Petition

| |
---
| |
---
Dear Fellow Patriot, As a wrongly accused police officer who was pardoned by President Trump, I’m asking you to sign this **[**Emergency Pardon Petition**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd3n8hgh7pdnfheltshsp6j86jim2dl2p29aga3o_rp22sh2s8i6ep37c9j66o36cdh2bs)** because right now a decorated police officer is sitting in prison for doing his job. On December 3, 2019, the Kansas City Police Department observed a red pick-up truck chasing another vehicle through the city streets. Officers unsuccessfully attempted to catch the truck – and involved the department’s helicopter to track it. The chopper tracked the car to the backyard of a home – and Detective Eric DeValkenaere and his partner were the first to arrive at the scene. Eric approached the passenger side of the pick-up and his partner approached the driver’s side, both shouting commands at the driver to STOP and SHOW HIS HANDS. Eric saw the suspect reach toward his waistband and grab a handgun, pointing it directly at his partner. Fearing the suspect would shoot, Eric discharged his firearm four times into the windshield of the pick-up as it continued driving into the garage.When officers entered the garage, they found the suspect deceased with his arm hanging out of the window and his .45 semi-automatic pistol on the ground. (A weapon they would later learn was stolen.)No doubt Eric saved his partner’s life that afternoon – and probably his own.**But instead of receiving an award for his heroic actions, Eric DeValkenaere was charged with Involuntary Manslaughter and Armed Criminal Action by a District Attorney desperately trying to hold onto her elected seat on the bench.** Worse, the Missouri Supreme Court just declined to take Eric’s case – exhausting his options through the justice system._Even though the Missouri Attorney General agreed Eric is innocent, woke anti-cop prosecutors and the defund the police mob somehow still won!_**A pardon from Missouri Governor Mike Parson is one of Eric’s last remaining options for freedom.****[Now you know why I’m asking you to follow this link to sign the Emergency Pardon Petition right away.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfhr3bs6mp8gdmq30mp2s4nqqv3k22e0qhqdb9vo_rp22sh2s8i6ep37c9j66o36cdh2bs)** My name is Stephanie Mohr and I’m proud to be on the Board of Directors for the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund – a non-profit organization that supports and defends wrongly accused officers like Eric. Over the last few years, LELDF has helped many men and women in blue clear their names and win back their freedom.I am also one of those officers LELDF has helped. You see, I used to be a police officer with the Prince George’s County Police Department in Maryland. Then one night I was called to a burglary scene. I did everything by the book – including releasing my canine to apprehend the suspect. We arrested the suspect, an illegal immigrant who was convicted and deported. So, imagine my shock when five years later the U.S. Department of Justice announced it was indicting me for violating the suspect’s civil rights by allowing my canine to bite and hold his leg so we could arrest him. And after two trials – in which the government flew in two illegal alien criminals to testify against me – I was convicted. I spent ten years in prison. But I was one of the lucky ones – not only did I have LELDF helping me fund and mount my defense – but they also helped me secure a pardon from President Trump restoring my good name.That’s why I can’t turn my back on a decorated police officer with a wife and three children at home waiting for him. **And I hope you won’t either.** **[**Will you sign the Emergency Pardon Petition to Missouri Governor Mike Parson right away?**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhd29pieic1fh5epj8clitg9o9boa9os7ui0dueo_rp22sh2s8i6ep37c9j66o36cdh2bs)** Eric should have been commended for his service and life-saving actions that day, not convicted and sentenced to years in prison! The reality is we can’t get back the last several months Eric has been sitting in prison or the nearly four years this nightmare has been hanging over his head.But with your help today, we can bring Eric home to his wife and three children. **[So please, won’t you take just 30 seconds of your time right now to sign the Emergency Pardon Petition to Governor Mike Parson?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl8db14fnrg2uhcqkrqks8fg4dkfu32og3koh8sg_rp22sh2s8i6ep37c9j66o36cdh2bs)** After signing the petition, please make a generous donation to LELDF to fund this petition and the legal defenses of eight officers (including Eric) they currently support.Remember, LELDF is able to support wrongly accused and convicted officers like Eric and me because of the generosity of patriots like you. And with a pardon the final option to secure Eric’s freedom and restore his good name, I’m begging you to [**sign the Emergency Pardon Petition today**.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6avjrs2g39qgorp1ff0q1hbodv7uean9t902t40_rp22sh2s8i6ep37c9j66o36cdh2bs)Thank you in advance for your support.
---
| | Gratefully,
---
---
Stephanie MohrDirector, Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund P.S. Without your immediate action, Eric DeValkenaere – a decorated Kansas City Police Detective – will spend the next six years behind bars. His three beautiful children won’t have their biggest cheerleader at their graduations, maybe even their weddings. And the only way to get him out is to get Missouri Governor Mike Parson to pardon him. **[Will you please take 30 seconds right now to sign the Emergency Pardon Petition and help me fight for Eric’s freedom?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zebep0unntfg3c6cfq2j6fia5q459p9k5hd2amlg_rp22sh2s8i6ep37c9j66o36cdh2bs)** I hope you’ll also make a generous, tax-deductible donation to LELDF. No matter what, please pray for Eric and his heartbroken family.
---
[**SIGN THE PETITION**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd30keinv76j384s4ncn0t630j1jtsbuviij3l4g_rp22sh2s8i6ep37c9j66o36cdh2bs)
---
| | _More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit www.leldf.org. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
---

---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlnh6t2p54u8duetd17n1h6k9pihastcbr68n3gg_rp22sh2s8i6ep37c9j66o36cdh2bs)| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z64e6e675h35qbemfhlgn2tdfr6846gf5t3ud3j0_rp22sh2s8i6ep37c9j66o36cdh2bs)| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfhir7qp4bae03b2a1s8tmm8c1uc64qrnaqh2dio_rp22sh2s8i6ep37c9j66o36cdh2bs)

After signing the petition, please make a generous donation to LELDF to fund this petition and the legal defenses of eight officers (including Eric) they currently support.Remember, LELDF is able to support wrongly accused and convicted officers like Eric and me because of the generosity of patriots like you. And with a pardon the final option to secure Eric’s freedom and restore his good name, I’m begging you to you in advance for your support. | | Gratefully, Stephanie MohrDirector, Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund P.S. Without your immediate action, Eric DeValkenaere – a decorated Kansas City Police Detective – will spend the next six years behind bars. His three beautiful children won’t have their biggest cheerleader at their graduations, maybe even their weddings. And the only way to get him out is to get Missouri Governor Mike Parson to pardon him. I hope you’ll also make a generous, tax-deductible donation to LELDF. No matter what, please pray for Eric and his heartbroken family. | | More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit www.leldf.org. And remember - Blue Lives Matter! | | | ---|---|--- © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 | Trump Train News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zv145l60th2a490tpu1c76ir3f0f0lt5820qdg1o_rp22sh2s8i6ep37c9j66o31chh2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9knddvm9em29jog52pcuv9o4tj6er5e0a9u0o9g_rp22sh2s8i6ep37c9j66o31chh2bs) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2i05k039aecgo26lcihgiohqj5lku7qmv4kr7t8_rp22sh2s8i6ep37c9j66o31chh2bs)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |
---

1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Charlie Kirk
subject: The Left is putting Trump in jail to rig the election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc
body:
Biden and his cronies want Donald Trump locked up

|
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zgo3f0vrskbupn3343gesj6j6av1l0nei2l6e8d8_rp22sh2s8i6ep37c9j61pr6c5h2bs)
Friend,

The Radical Left has officially declared war on our Constitutional Republic and is preparing to sentence President Donald J. Trump to **prison**.

Why?

Because they know Democrats can’t win this election fairly.

Biden and his cronies want Donald Trump locked up so he can’t travel, campaign, or even attend the Republican National Convention.

[It is now up to YOU and I to win this election and put Donald Trump back in the White House where he rightfully belongs. Please make an URGENT donation to Turning Point PAC so we can fund efforts to chase ballots and reach voters in KEY swing states.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2znkp8jr1r2pc1afloj2plj700juvn177d3ekq7qg_rp22sh2s8i6ep37c9j61pr6c5h2bs "Donate")

The Justice system has been weaponized to punish Trump and interfere in our elections.

We cannot allow this to happen.

Donald Trump has been found “guilty” by a jury in New York that was hellbent on destroying his campaign and legacy.

What happens next may be terrifying for the future of our country.

They want to put Trump behind bars.

I REFUSE that outcome and am willing to fight like hell to win this election.

**Turning Point PAC is funding efforts to chase ballots and reach millions of voters in CRITICAL swing states that will empower us to win the 2024 election.**

But now I need your help more than ever before.

[I am declaring an EMERGENCY fundraising goal of $250,000 for Turning Point PAC and am asking you to make the most generous donation you can ASAP. It’s time to fight back!](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zosu5sgsm5j1vljq7bbprvnuu91dsp8shdg0mju0_rp22sh2s8i6ep37c9j61pr6c5h2bs)

[Donate $250](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zo3998ep8f808qs5margfnmehst8t8p2626a20v8_rp22sh2s8i6ep37c9j61pr6c5h2bs)

Funding efforts to directly contact voters, knock on their doors, and chase down their ballots is critical now that we face the possibility of President Trump being unable to travel.

Can I count on your support?

This is our chance to stand and fight.

We can’t allow a corrupt justice system to determine the fate of our country.

Please pray for our nation and take action today.

My goal is to raise $250,000 and mobilize all of Turning Point PAC’s resources to continue fighting and win this election in November.

Thank you,

Charlie Kirk
Turning Point PAC

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. name: Terry Schilling, American Principles Project
subject: Two elections to track on Tuesday for the family
body:
| | | | [](https://bcu8ldbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013MFcBdLu0e0x7Upz4cS4Srim6nxyxsBwfnAMcE4bP4i0YkfdSZEkYkh0lY85J2WhTeuHbibYCyYG2VQETNF-_pKwj3Fwyc95om_qtbLjG0vKc9WCnpyKvyuEeBuWtlz07FaPHJZQmChdIcvAewNeXIUSJv6VfT2OQF5dBzaXyYNwDCZShHz4DQAmopinG1KO&c=wRYPzm-mu4LwS6sQFjp0cQW50UZwYygcjhws0gjXyr8vH1eIarHJMA==&ch=YJsWZyGf6CK0tNsZP5E-VO952lmwsaUi88ILGsBMP34muWLokXhNzQ==)
---
Greetings!
The next round of congressional and state primaries will be decided on Tuesday.
The results will directly impact our efforts to stop funding for DEI and the transgender agenda in our local schools.
Right now, Democrats in Congress are weaponizing the federal budgeting process to force this propaganda on schools by trying it to federal funding.
We must take back the Senate and elect pro-family House members to stop this assault on our kids and grandkids.
And we must support pro-family governors willing to fight and protect families at the state level.
That's why APP is committed to highlighting key races for our Big Family members that will affect the rights of parents. There are two on Tuesday in Montana:
Montana Senate: Defeating Democrat Jon Tester, a federal sponsor of the woke agenda in our schools
In addition to voting to fund Critical Race Theory and blocking efforts to defund DEI programs, Tester co-sponsored the Equality Act, a bill that could:

* Hold teachers liable for sexual harassment if they use improper pronouns

* Allow biological males to compete in girls' sports

* Defund Christian hospitals for refusing to preform transgender surgeries on kids.

Tester will win his primary, but parents can hold him accountable in the general election when he faces a pro-family Republican in an increasingly red state.
Montana Governor: Supporting Greg Gianforte, a Pro-Family Champion
One of the most pro-family governors in the country, Greg Gianforte has relentlessly stood up to teachers' unions, the transgender agenda, and Big Tech to defend the family, signing laws that:
* Protect our daughters from competing against biological males in girls' sports

* Ban experimental transgender surgeries on minors in Montana

* Force adult websites to keep kids off their platforms.

Gianforte provides another example of a statewide leader who uses family issues to go on offense against politicians who attempt to strip the rights of parents.
For the Family,
Terry Schilling President American Principles Project

clean_body: | | | | == Greetings! The next round of congressional and state primaries will be decided on Tuesday. The results will directly impact our efforts to stop funding for DEI and the transgender agenda in our local schools. Right now, Democrats in Congress are weaponizing the federal budgeting process to force this propaganda on schools by trying it to federal funding. We must take back the Senate and elect pro-family House members to stop this assault on our kids and grandkids. And we must support pro-family governors willing to fight and protect families at the state level. That's why APP is committed to highlighting key races for our Big Family members that will affect the rights of parents. There are two on Tuesday in Montana: Montana Senate: Defeating Democrat Jon Tester, a federal sponsor of the woke agenda in our schools In addition to voting to fund Critical Race Theory and blocking efforts to defund DEI programs, Tester co-sponsored the Equality Act, a bill that could: Hold teachers liable for sexual harassment if they use improper pronouns Allow biological males to compete in girls' sports Defund Christian hospitals for refusing to preform transgender surgeries on kids. Tester will win his primary, but parents can hold him accountable in the general election when he faces a pro-family Republican in an increasingly red state. Montana Governor: Supporting Greg Gianforte, a Pro-Family Champion One of the most pro-family governors in the country, Greg Gianforte has relentlessly stood up to teachers' unions, the transgender agenda, and Big Tech to defend the family, signing laws that: Protect our daughters from competing against biological males in girls' sports Ban experimental transgender surgeries on minors in Montana Force adult websites to keep kids off their platforms. Gianforte provides another example of a statewide leader who uses family issues to go on offense against politicians who attempt to strip the rights of parents. For the Family, Terry Schilling President American Principles Project | | | | American Principles Project | 2800 S Shirlington Rd Ste 901 | Arlington, VA 22206-3601 US | | |

The Radical Left is proving they will go to any length to interfere in our elections, force truth-tellers into silence, and remove the freedoms of any patriot standing in their way, even a man who was our nation's Commander-in-Chief.

**Just now, Soros-funded prosecutors convicted President Trump ... Next, it could be you, Friend...**

This guilty verdict isn't just about President Trump - it's about each and every single American and the future of this country.

Democrats have been looking for their saving grace, any way to get President Trump off the campaign trail and silence him from speaking the truth about the Radical Left and their hare-brained schemes.

They know with President Trump back in the White House, their reign of power comes to an end, their socialist pet projects are dead, and their days of radical extremism come to an end.

It's going to take the full weight of our movement to correct this gross injustice and save our country, but _**each and every patriot must do their part! **_

Trump’s Defense Team May Have Taken A Few Wrong Turns, But Judge
Merchan Doomed Them From The Start. Here’s How

With a judge who habitually ruled for the prosecution and an
indictment backed by a legal theory even liberal commentators
described as “clear as mud,” former President Donald Trump’s team
