name: The Flyover
subject: Manchin Goes Independent, Trump Donations Skyrocket, and the $1.50 Hotdogs are Saved
body:
West Virginia [Senator Joe Manchin](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO4yAYBp8GOkfwg3_bBcU17nLtlRYxnwMnDJGNHO3br7L11qOZYv7dl7tPOZXnX7_Dta0ufm3pwsKd7sguVga3AQQj4fSgB7K9YpbRAX60DxMIal2V52majCHwNvZacT_I5EiRVay0Gns2fGMPfoTRb6MetXmwsAohtXrc_tdUWsSWv-qF47bWXWYXW3udwvwRNAuaW0RMOX-YoDnWHQXvU9B8ovgGQbPliTX13e7LGlPpUgl4oQSU1mX4C2cXsNf18O3jycOF1zvlnE4ehFXP3aefvGy_frgcfQcAAP__-_xf0Q) officially left the Democratic Party and filed as an independent on Friday, saying partisanship and a lack of compromise have left American politics broken.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFurDAQRb_GdKDxjBnYwsWTEN2-aqWUyODx4ohdLHA2yt9HjlKmmdHRvcXRfbtOVxe3-Lz_dw-xOeyTW3J8ycS1rtFMpvI2iKBQJVZ3ukPTAnO1WvELO3NxvMgF0C_UkRfx3BIZcIGqaBHQAIOGvmXihp3w7HsXet1rmlkZEB_zfjTve3zmVcL2tb_kaJb9UW12zTmdiv4pHBWOYW6erpgll9fSUDgevpwmrUnReEavaNDYk0JOH7OiAQ20XcFFF_q1qW9jiMeZa90ClBAVDeWTouE2Vof16TNuWzy5UwbuDxe3H6X85z4vi98BAAD__2I3YMU) | |
# SATURDAY, JUNE 1, 2024
---|---
**Happy Saturday**! On this date in 1974, Cincinnati surgeon [Henry J. Heimlich](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L1uwyAUQOGnwRsWYHJjDwxdvKVrR4ufS7gtNhEmtvL2VauOnb_hSOfjttwsZdru73ZF02JZrG904AJccqUX3QUTERUOHRp5lVelLwKgS2YSMYAYUUs3KnfxOLhpcj5MwkU9IHRklFBagJBivMAAPVgEF0YbRznKwQHTAgO1UvvPQltLGPOrHFh7X9Yum9TaY2fDG1MzU_N5nn2ivZX6-nGm5pZo58G-OG38T5iaE9KaySe-2g2fB1YeS-U-lS_a7vzxdJn2hKGrJjxOypl2uDIt7qul_Btu_144jPoOAAD__2wHYdQ) published his technique for rescuing choking victims in the medical journal Emergency Medicine. Called the Heimlich maneuver, it has been credited with saving tens of thousands of lives. Today is National Pen Pal Day, a day that celebrates the somewhat forgotten tradition of sharing letters or notes with others. To all our _Flyover_ readers, thank you for your support and feedback. We appreciate each and every one of you. Remember, if there's anything you'd like to share with us--a recommendation or a note just to say hi, hit the reply button and fire away. Have you signed up for _The Flyover_ yet? If not, you can fix that [with one click](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FOwzAQANCvsbdWts-9mMEDUpWJsDJGZ-eSHDhJlZog_h4hRrq_5b11fUdSZJ1eaeFYx62nXOXgHk_25Hzv9RBHZsegOdrGNs5fDKKe48WGFJhsStYC4dCkTC5DJnANpPSkJTrjvEFjTbgg4BmJMQ2BxmCDhYTKGx6kbvv5fZO1zjyW7-3g_Zy3RZc413q7K3hWrlWu_U-UazuaJL_I-vFroGUF1-H2JaXIHRvlzbSQlD-Ln3VRcPVG7_Gx0fXh_4juJwAA__9EEVxS). Want to take control of your health? Find out from today's sponsor why everyone is talking about [native berberine](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFurDAQRb_GdKDxjBnYwsWTEN2-aqWUyODx4ohdLHA2yt9HjlKmmdHRvcXRfbtOVxe3-Lz_dw-xOeyTW3J8ycS1rtFMpvI2iKBQJVZ3ukPTAnO1WvELO3NxvMgF0C_UkRfx3BIZcIGqaBHQAIOGvmXihp3w7HsXet1rmlkZEB_zfjTve3zmVcL2tb_kaJb9UW12zTmdiv4pHBWOYW6erpgll9fSUDgevpwmrUnReEavaNDYk0JOH7OiAQ20XcFFF_q1qW9jiMeZa90ClBAVDeWTouE2Vof16TNuWzy5UwbuDxe3H6X85z4vi98BAAD__2I3YMU).
|
---
## Manchin Leaves Democratic Party
West Virginia [Senator Joe Manchin](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO4yAYBp8GOkfwg3_bBcU17nLtlRYxnwMnDJGNHO3br7L11qOZYv7dl7tPOZXnX7_Dta0ufm3pwsKd7sguVga3AQQj4fSgB7K9YpbRAX60DxMIal2V52majCHwNvZacT_I5EiRVay0Gns2fGMPfoTRb6MetXmwsAohtXrc_tdUWsSWv-qF47bWXWYXW3udwvwRNAuaW0RMOX-YoDnWHQXvU9B8ovgGQbPliTX13e7LGlPpUgl4oQSU1mX4C2cXsNf18O3jycOF1zvlnE4ehFXP3aefvGy_frgcfQcAAP__-_xf0Q) officially left the Democratic Party and filed as an independent on Friday, saying partisanship and a lack of compromise have left American politics broken. Despite this move, Manchin is expected to continue to [caucus with Democrats](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO6yAQAL_G7ojwghe7oHhNurz2SgvwYm-EITLI0f39KVdfOZpmNF-P5eE4cd7-u4Nsi2VxofFFC4pBgF50v9pIBKR6soMZDOhRIva79TMGQ97ALCEoOYMb53EOXsWAawDdswUJWqIc5DSiwhs6Qr9OLk7DNCiPnZa0civn7Vk4t51i-i4XnbdQjj7ZvbVX7dS_Du4d3N0r07t-1AfOxiFRB_dnIXG4HHbOIpS8nVSreFNt4uJz48xOVMqukXCaPGKE4I1RcQLw6FGaWY9hJUexP-36enNKXNF0Wm6H4_Sb0v78cln4CQAA__92H2UZ) in the Senate and keep his chairmanship, which will help Democrats maintain their slim 51-49 majority. Manchin, considered a centrist Democrat, served two terms as West Virginia's governor before being elected to the Senate in 2010. In November, he announced that he wouldn't seek re-election, [sparking speculation](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7GOhCAQxvGnwU4DA45YUFxDt9deaVCGdTYoGyXr3dtf9uqrf8n35f91m26BM-_3z7CRq6lMYan8oglb1YKZTBNdIgLSDTk1qAFMLxGb1Y29xjlZHYa0RCSpzTBaLUeaoYdhlA07kGAkSiVtjxo7DIRztCFZZZWeURhJkWs5ukfhva6U8k950dEtZWuyW2t9nkJ_CPAC_HVdXfjmcr5VgH9vC_ASBHiFAvyjULuFfVl5b9_YPg86OdJeOeT2CAs1h4vPi3PmEwdh5H0LnP_O6r_lLwe_AQAA__-0uFha) that he might run for president as an independent. However, by February, Manchin stated that it wasn't the right time to run for the presidency. His surprise switch in party affiliation coincides with [West Virginia's June 1 deadline](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGOhCAQQL8GOwyMOLgFxTV2e-2VBmVcZ4NglOjt31_26q1f8l7yfu7D3XPk9Pj2K7ky58FPhU8aUGoJZjBVcDMRUFOR01ZbMK1CrBZnsLXtBHrUymNjR7C3oEJHhAFtdxsrdqDAKFRadS02WKMnHEPn5053uhlRGEWBS97rZ-ZUFprjK5-011Neq-iWUrZDNF8CegH9dV21_-V8vKmA_u0W0KtWQN9oAf0zk1x9mhZOMpI_6ZCB1jztvvAkN7-Xl-QUaKMUKJVqd2G7OEY-0AqjHqvn-F8uHzecDv4CAAD__-hYXqE) for changing party affiliation in time to run for office this fall. The deadline to file for governor or Senate is August 1st.
## 6 Million Vehicles Recalled
A new report released by Carfax Wednesday revealed more than 6 million U.S. vehicles still have the dangerous Takata airbags, which pose a risk of injury and death and were recalled over a decade ago. [You can check the recall list here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7GOhCAQANCvgW4NjDBjQ3HNdnvtlWaUQbmgbJRo7u8vufp-4CXv6zW-OJe8L5-8SWipjjy3fMmID_sANzodQxIB6bUES5bAeYOo1wDgrY-eJpKZEiGSs5ag94ZpQEadAxhwBo01g8ceO2TBKQ6cBjvYfkLljMTc6tF917y3VVL5qZcc3Vw3XcLa2vtU_YeCp4Lnfd_dvraTu6VeCp6HzFzKqY8Q33cuJZ9Iypll41z-gPbv5grwGwAA___sV0s-). According to Carfax, 40% of the vehicles with Takata airbags are located in states that "pose the [highest threat to safety](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFvgzAQhX-N2UDnwz7I4KGLt3TtiC5wTtyaODJuUP59Rbt2em_4pPf0fZynM8cU79d3XsXVkCeea3zKRK1u0UymWVwQQekbcXrQAxoLRM3NmX4mXmiwwViAELTVgDhiEBrpFOYmOgQ0QKBhtNRTRyx0WUYOox51fyFlQJZYc-k-c7zXm4T0yk8p3ZzXJrlbrY9N9W8KvUK_73v3vXHNC78OQKHfai4vhX7Ndzly5rIp9EVmTulox75CD1ah70Gh51gufG3_iLbyF1dW6If-BNaeDMCg0DfFLY89phQ3GpSB68ox_X6q_wp6OvwJAAD__3gJZBs)" because their high heat and humidity can cause the airbags to explode when deployed. Those states are Alabama, California, Florida, Georgia, Hawaii, Louisiana, Mississippi, South Carolina, and Texas. The Takata recall is the largest and one of the deadliest in history. The National Highway Traffic Safety Administration has confirmed 27 people in the U.S. have been killed by defective airbags, and at least 400 people have been injured. The danger prompted Nissan to issue a "[do not drive](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFyhCAUAL9GOxxARK-gSGN3aVM6CI_zJQo3PJS5v89c6lRbbLOzX_flbnHH-Pi0B5gS0mJdwQsWzQSTalGtNwFAQt-CEaMYpRq41u1m-imMgodJ3ga43bT23g3rGHxYQXk9QotGcqm45oJPg-51py3o1U82TGIS_aobxcFjSbn7ThjLBmF_pQty59LR7mYr5UlN_9HIuZFzrbWLq4tQ6e0bOa8nYQSiRs72LOnNiEQ2MiQ6gVhMhfmMF7Bqc8T4YHVDt7EjedjZC2xmzmZiJZ_uhxidF8suWjGoYRzabPyz4r4j6bFR_HFY3P_Kyr-bLiN_AwAA___uYW0n)" warning for about 84,000 older-model vehicles.
## Home Insurance Rates Up Almost 38%
U.S. home insurance rates have [increased nearly 38%](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FurDAQAL_G7kD2YhaucPEaunttSmTsNWxk7BM4oPx9lFQpUs9Io3l7zk_HifP63-1kayyz85UvmrHRDZjZyGAjEVAnyepBD2B6hSg3S9o8gGI_0sOHzi8KNDjnUQXw0FOUbEGBUai0GnvssEVHuITRxVGPultQGEWBazna98K5bhTTZ7noaH3ZZbJbra9TdP8ETAKm-77bRDlwXutB9O0ImDifH4fLngRMZ3WVmhKbrezU_CbysOF1c0p84iCMWnfH6adS_1y-LHwFAAD__zcxWhg) since 2019, according to a new report released by LendingTree. The online lending marketplace named rising home prices, growing inflation, and natural disasters as the most significant factors causing the dramatic increase in rates. Homeowners in [Arizona, Illinois, and Nebraska](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuwyAUheGnwRsRXDC2B4Yu3tK1o0XMxdwKGwtIqrx95c6df-nT0fm6L3dHiY7t0-1oW8iLWxu9cDFcctCL7rwNiICqQysHOYDuhTFdtH4EDGLwatBSB91P8tFPygfAyWDosSMLArQwQoqxN8rcjEPz8KMLoxylehimBXpqudy-Mx0tYkjv_MJyW_PeJRtbOytTHwxmBnOLGCmlqzGY1-iOjY6Nux0LrY7BXLCeuDYG83kh7c1g1mbSQg38WXnMO3I66rO4Y0VeXMPKnyd3ac-1cTXySlcAISde8Mzlorpi_flDKVE1A9Ni2x39bejav2e9LPwGAAD__wy5bEc) have been the hardest hit by rate increases. Their insurance bills have jumped by more than 55% since 2019. So far in 2024, rates have climbed an average of 5.8%, pushing the average annual cost of home insurance across the U.S. to $2,478.

clean_body: West Virginia officially left the Democratic Party and filed as an independent on Friday, saying partisanship and a lack of compromise have left American politics broken. | | | | | | SATURDAY, JUNE 1, 2024 ---|--- Happy Saturday! On this date in 1974, Cincinnati surgeon published his technique for rescuing choking victims in the medical journal Emergency Medicine. Called the Heimlich maneuver, it has been credited with saving tens of thousands of lives. Today is National Pen Pal Day, a day that celebrates the somewhat forgotten tradition of sharing letters or notes with others. To all our Flyover readers, thank you for your support and feedback. We appreciate each and every one of you. Remember, if there's anything you'd like to share with us--a recommendation or a note just to say hi, hit the reply button and fire away. Have you signed up for The Flyover yet? If not, you can fix that . Want to take control of your health? Find out from today's sponsor why everyone is talking about . | Manchin Leaves Democratic Party West Virginia officially left the Democratic Party and filed as an independent on Friday, saying partisanship and a lack of compromise have left American politics broken. Despite this move, Manchin is expected to continue to in the Senate and keep his chairmanship, which will help Democrats maintain their slim 51-49 majority. Manchin, considered a centrist Democrat, served two terms as West Virginia's governor before being elected to the Senate in 2010. In November, he announced that he wouldn't seek re-election, that he might run for president as an independent. However, by February, Manchin stated that it wasn't the right time to run for the presidency. His surprise switch in party affiliation coincides with for changing party affiliation in time to run for office this fall. The deadline to file for governor or Senate is August 1st. 6 Million Vehicles Recalled A new report released by Carfax Wednesday revealed more than 6 million U.S. vehicles still have the dangerous Takata airbags, which pose a risk of injury and death and were recalled over a decade ago. -. According to Carfax, 40% of the vehicles with Takata airbags are located in states that "pose the " because their high heat and humidity can cause the airbags to explode when deployed. Those states are Alabama, California, Florida, Georgia, Hawaii, Louisiana, Mississippi, South Carolina, and Texas. The Takata recall is the largest and one of the deadliest in history. The National Highway Traffic Safety Administration has confirmed 27 people in the U.S. have been killed by defective airbags, and at least 400 people have been injured. The danger prompted Nissan to issue a "" warning for about 84,000 older-model vehicles. Home Insurance Rates Up Almost 38% U.S. home insurance rates have since 2019, according to a new report released by LendingTree. The online lending marketplace named rising home prices, growing inflation, and natural disasters as the most significant factors causing the dramatic increase in rates. Homeowners in have been the hardest hit by rate increases. Their insurance bills have jumped by more than 55% since 2019. So far in 2024, rates have climbed an average of 5.8%, pushing the average annual cost of home insurance across the U.S. to $2,478. Want an edition of The Flyover that's just for the state of Florida? ! 🐊 | ➤**The Trump campaign raised nearly $35 million in small-dollar donations after the former president was found guilty of 34 felony counts on Thursday, breaking the campaign's previous record. () ➤ Israel confirmed that its forces are operating in central parts of Rafah on Friday, the same day President Biden announced that Israeli officials proposed a three-phase cease-fire deal to Hamas. () ➤ Eight Senate Republicans pledged on Friday to oppose major legislation introduced by Democrats, along with White House judicial and political nominations, in response to the guilty verdicts of former President Donald Trump. () ➤Researchers tested six AI voice-cloning tools and discovered that the technology achieved an 80% success rate in generating false statements using the voices of political leaders, including President Biden. () | Flying together with our sponsor Take Control of Your Health with Native Berberine Are you on a mission to improve your health but unsure where to start? Let Native Berberine guide you towards better wellness. Its unique formula features not one but three botanical giants: barberry, goldenseal, and Oregon grape--all renowned for their berberine content. | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/M-4xWghGdLdEipyO4pCpIw~~/AARclAA~) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of “woke capitalism” is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we can communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we...
* Consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America.
* Explore how the ideology of "woke capitalism" is infiltrating large corporations.
* Delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d13a860040c9493690c48561d62d3ab5&_e=zau4Bt5Dt-KjR3OfqO5dgVqsJyDtLKgL5NjzA7jkuHs22I5lWNBmRXqP7butqWx66d5KhYhKAEzY-U2HnCBK0vwTGVz7zW-jBzkf_06BoF_nX56CYvPyho0Hdyn9M0JNJShHKEJUs1Rb2BIeIIREQzTXLFQFkkqct4x_c1Xebg6Z-5jUoY9Iigam3Pp4MAJc8k0CRDbNoeSIa973aHM6Nm8RUD6jgbXGx5Kd_2ZF7SUEwRR_Ajvu6ipTqDIidBohN4qkAS4-Ous6M7O0O_B2no9KngaSQ_KiykUQnf4LOW8CMpvdQi3Z6SwsUlNHnLvUrlbWB4fA7vMIyNMdUyVTK_FH-XM1zU4YpLRhWM2juLHHWD2ckrep54FWHiXlrlRHExw1O_pssceLvPDwGfWgSA%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College

name: Douglas Carswell
subject: What Trump’s Conviction Says About America
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/successsequence-11572582?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

**You can tell a lot about someone’s politics based on what they have to say about the conviction of Donald Trump.**

Anyone telling you that Trump’s conviction is comeuppance for a sordid hush-money scandal, in which he broke the law, probably leans left.

Someone explaining that it was all a disgraceful attempt by Joe Biden’s Democrats to stop the 45th President from being re-elected, is likely to be a conservative.

In an increasingly post-religious society, politics has become a substitute belief system for many**. The danger is that we view everything through the prism of politics. **

Rather than ask what Trump’s conviction means for your side in the Reds versus Blues battle, perhaps what we ought to spend this weekend reflecting on what this might all mean for America.
---
|
---
_Where you stand on Trump’s conviction says a lot about your politics._
| **For most of human history, the law meant whatever the powerful said it meant.** Anyone who has ever tried to do business in Russia or China knows that’s still the way things are in much of the non-Western world.

**A system in which the law is elevated above the executive – in which the rule of law has supremacy – is historically unusual.** Indeed, it is largely the creation of people who spoke and wrote in the language in which you are reading this.

**It was English-speaking civilization that invented the notion that the powerful are constrained by rules, and that the rules should apply to everyone equally.** A straight line runs from Magna Carta at Runnymede to the Founders at Philadelphia. The US Bill of Rights of 1789 was proceeded by the English Bill of Rights of 1689

**America has become the most successful society on earth precisely because in this Republic, government doesn’t get to change the rules as it likes. **

“Exactly!” the anti-Trumpers will say. “Trump’s conviction is true to that tradition! Even former Presidents are subject to the same rules as everyone else”.

But is that really so? In what way has Trump been subjected to the same set of rules? Surely, those on the right will say, he has been singled out, prosecuted over something essentially trivial?

**Those that brought the charges, it seems to me, were motivated by politics, rather than justice.**

**Prosecuting political rivals is what they do in Russia, Brazil or Malaysia. It is awful to see political prosecutions in the United States **– and it bodes ill for the future of freedom in this country and around the world.
---
|
---
_Russia has a long history of incarcerating political opponents._
| **Twenty years ago, George Bush’s electoral strategist, Karl Rove, hit upon the idea of using ‘wedge-issues’ to galvanize the conservative base.** At the time, Rove seemed to be remarkably successful. Republicans won.

Two decades on, I wonder if it was partly Rove’s ‘wedge-issue’ approach that provoked the left into doing something similar. Under Obama, the left became increasingly inflammatory. **Perhaps there is a straight line that runs from the politics of ‘wedge-issues’ in the noughties to the culture wars we see today?**

Some on the left might be tempted to celebrate the use of lawfare to try to take down a political opponent. They might want to stop and think first. It is, I worry, only a question of time before we start to see something similar from the right.

**If lawfare becomes part of American politics, what chance is there that the United States remains exceptional compare with all those other less happy republics? **

It is not just the legal process that America needs to de-politicize. We need to stop making everything a question of where you stand in the culture war. Your views on Disney or money management or Chick-Fil-A should not automatically correlate with the way you vote.
---
|
---
_Enjoy the music. Not everything should be about how we vote..._
| **If it is politics alone that gives you a belief system in life, you are going to end up desperately disappointed with both politics and life.**

The United States was founded by people that believed that to survive, a Republic needs a moral citizenry. **America needs to believe in something above politics and beyond the next election cycle.**

Have a wonderful weekend.
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=34a3fe789c&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO

|

At the time, Rove seemed to be remarkably successful. Republicans won. Two decades on, I wonder if it was partly Rove’s ‘wedge-issue’ approach that provoked the left into doing something similar. Under Obama, the left became increasingly inflammatory. Perhaps there is a straight line that runs from the politics of ‘wedge-issues’ in the noughties to the culture wars we see today? Some on the left might be tempted to celebrate the use of lawfare to try to take down a political opponent. They might want to stop and think first. It is, I worry, only a question of time before we start to see something similar from the right. If lawfare becomes part of American politics, what chance is there that the United States remains exceptional compare with all those other less happy republics? It is not just the legal process that America needs to de-politicize. We need to stop making everything a question of where you stand in the culture war. Your views on Disney or money management or Chick-Fil-A should not automatically correlate with the way you vote. | Enjoy the music. Not everything should be about how we vote... | If it is politics alone that gives you a belief system in life, you are going to end up desperately disappointed with both politics and life. The United States was founded by people that believed that to survive, a Republic needs a moral citizenry. America needs to believe in something above politics and beyond the next election cycle. Have a wonderful weekend. | "Forward this email to a friend!" | | Warm regards, Douglas Carswell President & CEO | | |

name: Sarah McBride
subject: Happy Pride! 🏳️‍🌈
body:
I’ve always said that I’m not running for Congress to make history, I’m running to make a difference.
#
Happy Pride Month, team!
I’ve always said that I’m not running for Congress to make history, **I’m running to make a difference**. But as we enter Pride Month, I have been reflecting a little bit about what it would mean to be the first openly trans member of Congress and the importance of this race for young LGBTQ+ people who deserve to see themselves in government, too.
Truthfully, it’s only fair that when issues directly impacting trans folks are being discussed, trans people have a seat – _at least_ one – at the table. I’m humbled at the thought that I may be the first to hold a seat in Congress, **but I’m absolutely sure I won’t be the last.**
From the start of this campaign, I’ve also said I don’t want to be known just for my identity. I want to be known as an effective member of Congress working on _all_ of the issues that matter to _everyone_. And that _includes_ our LGBTQ+ neighbors.
**So yes, I’ll absolutely be fighting to protect and secure the rights of LGBTQ+ people all over the country.**
But LGBTQ+ people care about things like health care, the economy, paid family and medical leave, and raising the minimum wage as well — and I’ll be fighting just as hard to improve life for _everyone_ on those fronts, too.
[**So team, if you’re ready to help me get to work in Congress, will you pitch in $5 to help power my campaign today? I can’t do it without you!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20240601-1?refcode=em20240601-1&amount=5&refcode2=540_21716_UUI3Op&akid=540%2E21716%2EUUI3Op)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20240601-1?amount=5&refcode=em20240601-1-540&refcode2=540_21716_UUI3Op&akid=540%2E21716%2EUUI3Op)**
Thank you, team. And I hope you have a wonderful Pride Month!
Sarah McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20240601-1&t=1&refcode2=540_21716_UUI3Op&akid=540%2E21716%2EUUI3Op)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=540%2E21716%2EUUI3Op)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=540%2E21716%2EUUI3Op)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=540%2E21716%2EUUI3Op)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)

Fellow Republican,

I am sure you have seen or heard all about President Trump's ongoing trial. So, I will keep this short and just give you the facts.

**Fact 1:** While this trial is in session Joe Biden is hosting RALLIES right on the doorstep of the courthouse.

**Fact 2:** New York is wasting their time prosecuting Donald Trump while there are thousands of illegal immigrants and criminals who are currently walking the streets free.

**Fact 3:** This trial is a witch hunt in order to prevent Donald Trump from winning in November.

These facts are _**unacceptable,**_ and we need to come together as loyal America First Republicans to fight back against this **injustice and corruption.**

| [**FIGHT BACK AGAINST INJUSTICE**](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f933ebf9e3814a87816cb76c01847b79&_e=fJy1nENY2CogmT7zr4aMtIaCcoQdK92Ur0HI9virWk1jdrN6AHnZSzY626a3IvoGw2EWqIqMqWPIsCKH8gjd3srEfUpAE1Ty0t1bgFAyI2_Ctxxj-p7RbRkOmRYI9FFt7QgnAm-YkAkEsoPp4cKIqCNo23w_4INMEaSVjTLZPNcWl9zQN_nAqeRz4-eIYMW4Ut6yszjplBUxFa2v_HjuCmH9yRCTbHL4r2Ic0NLoz3Y39KXhgPggqqYeJUpMRJgr9POG4ku04zLuC0W_3t9sjnyBj9SY3eXlsqBflM1LmN8xycHhr7EGp8ITyefZWA0AQnQRC9HKuNlVOjQ3daMI-Q_3Q2rNjjONirhHkQkbMkTkvWVsuez9Y-KSqShitagIP9Um53He7AgoE02y8D2bjw%3D%3D)

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: In Michigan, we thank people
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1492%2E135344%2ElBybsw)

Friend --
I want to say thank you for putting up with all of our emails over the last few weeks as we worked to meet our May fundraising goal. I am so thankful for everyone who heeded the call and chipped in.
Your involvement means a lot to me personally, but also to the success of our campaign. Winning an open Senate seat in a notorious swing state won’t be easy, but here's the thing: Nothing. Worth. Doing. Ever. Is.
It also helped us launch our first ad, ahead of schedule, which is critically important given the fact that our potential opponents are all communicating with voters ahead of the Republican primary.
So at the end of the day, I’m hoping a few emails clogging your inbox are a relatively small price to pay for Democrats' success in such an important state.
That's it. No ask. Just thanks.
Elissa
* * *
P.S. I’d love to hear from you, so if you'd like, please respond to this email to let us know how you think things are going. Share your thoughts. They can be about the campaign. The polls. What's going on in Michigan. Even what you see happening in Congress. Just reply.

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=1492%2E135344%2ElBybsw).

[ Sign up here to receive fewer emails.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/users-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1492%2E135344%2ElBybsw)

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

subject: Help pass down these important pillars to the next generation

| From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Dear Fellow Patriot,

We are witnessing a brutal, unceasing, and deadly assault currently being waged against American families--especially the traditional nuclear family. I'm sure you've felt it.

That's why I launched the American Cornerstone Institute--what I call a "think tank / do tank" -- in order to continue this perilous fight to protect, shore up, and support American families. [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a42ed3d555ee4dbdb55dd79d4c7858ef&_e=HwA0EazmYw8oDnXAMwdAHMWZ7TF2s4ulWZ97vAYhG0eAXJ5FwAlWh5vzd0Wp-qJfKLGTogrez6Ffyu4QvIFyLoxqCJZCo5OnwyvUW3zru61Ald3ga7z4SvCOWougNygL7i1oEjciUpi05C5oiDjlg3ArWozorNSa5R_ezZCbTm47TBgLfFri4qkmyYI8XGSMkBo3sVki_A_-krt8dFaBDZ4mdwZtLXsCezls_UU5X7QcjNGTN5hsIu7bcC47Z0-9yjzz33ZDy9W8OztkmVn6eh1MhvDTWmMWhce7pJYKhtL5_GTgVa760rCFuqlVqa_jY9-UVY2IU0Sa1KKz-Qaq4EBV3GDNAxSIyAOo5usVDLxkOrMvVcfykM4Xf17d-lYeYfQGKzKmaoRYC7OTNJnElA%3D%3D) Your gift of $100 or more to ACI today will help strengthen the bonds of our communities by lifting up the virtues of faith, liberty, community, and life.

Will you give today to support these cornerstone principles? They are essential to the success of our nation--principles that can be bolstered immeasurably and immediately by strengthening our families. To show my appreciation for your gift of $100 or more, you will receive an advanced signed copy of my new book "The Perilous Fight: Overcoming Our Culture's War on the American Family".

And to help pass down these important pillars to the next generation, I'lll also send you a free copy of my children's book "Why America Matters" that celebrates our great country and reminds us what a blessing it is to be an American.

You can make your secure gift here: [https://secure.americancornerstone.org/the-perilous-fight](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a42ed3d555ee4dbdb55dd79d4c7858ef&_e=HwA0EazmYw8oDnXAMwdAHMWZ7TF2s4ulWZ97vAYhG0eAXJ5FwAlWh5vzd0Wp-qJfKLGTogrez6Ffyu4QvIFyLoxqCJZCo5OnwyvUW3zru61Ald3ga7z4SvCOWougNygL7i1oEjciUpi05C5oiDjlg3ArWozorNSa5R_ezZCbTm47TBgLfFri4qkmyYI8XGSMkBo3sVki_A_-krt8dFaBDZ4mdwZtLXsCezls_UU5X7QcjNGTN5hsIu7bcC47Z0-9eL_JxDL_s5qA50qGE36ruiSow-a6PSHpOReizvEWJCT4kBDuf9HoHpqC9sI8CN1li6QTZGkJGjIkdyLh-N6leQri5Yi5EIKOSmG-5YFvOb0FqEZz5BVsB3fizEH45NgvVO4UoFjdhcJdsIi_-w7fqQ%3D%3D)

Thank you for your interest in preserving and strengthening America's families!

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---

---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

name: Orlando Sonza
subject: Sonza for Congress Newsletter - June 1
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sonza For Congress
body:
We had a great week to end May. We made our presence known in Evanston on Memorial Day. Thank you to all those who walked with us in the parade | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | Hi Peter,

We had a great week to end May.

**We made our presence known in Evanston on Memorial Day. Thank you to all those who walked with us in the parade and ran the nacho stand on an important day for our country.**

If you would like to walk with us in future parades, please sign up at [this link](https://orlandosonza.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51038eb70764b0f1ec2166a2b&id=c3170b38e4&e=6bb1d60162).
---
|
---
|
---
| | It was such a pleasure to have Speaker Johnson in Mason for our campaign.

**Leaders from across the country, like Speaker Johnson, are getting behind this race because we have the right values on our side to win in November. **

Peter, we need your help to compete with our opponent's big money, liberal donors.

**Please consider donating $10, $25, $50, or $100 to help our campaign fight for Southwest Ohio in Congress.**
---
|
---
| [DONATE TODAY](https://orlandosonza.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51038eb70764b0f1ec2166a2b&id=4e75105253&e=6bb1d60162 "DONATE TODAY")
---
|
---
| | Whether you're a voter or a baby deer, a sign from our campaign makes a great addition to your yard!

**Friends, we now have over 1000 small yard signs in the district, and we want to put out many more.**

If you would like a yard sign or other #TeamSonza merchandise, please contact us at [this link](https://orlandosonza.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51038eb70764b0f1ec2166a2b&id=3232c47be2&e=6bb1d60162).
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| | _**Upcoming Events**_

**We will be door knocking in Anderson Township next weekend to spread the word on our campaign. Details are listed below.**

It is church festival season in Southwest Ohio as well! If you are interested in joining myself and the team at your next festival, please reach out at [this link](https://orlandosonza.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51038eb70764b0f1ec2166a2b&id=3437904af3&e=6bb1d60162)!
---
|
---
| | Peter, thank you for your continued support of our team, and we will see you out on the campaign trail.

**Orlando**
---
|
---
| [DONATE TODAY](https://orlandosonza.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51038eb70764b0f1ec2166a2b&id=af079195ab&e=6bb1d60162 "DONATE TODAY")
---

An individual may contribute up to $3,300 for the primary election and up to $3,300 for the general election. Federal multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $5,000 for each election. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal-government contractors, national banks, and foreign nationals without permanent residency status are prohibited. Federal law requires Sonza for Congress to obtain and report the name, mailing address, occupation and employer of persons whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in an election cycle._

_**Let 's Address This**_**cruised past our first 1 million reads this week, and has more than 80,000 subscribers!** Thank you for your trust and support, and if you're in a position to upgrade to a $5/mo or $50/year subscription, know that your support goes a long way towards advancing my human rights advocacy. Here's your quick recap of last week for _Let 's Address This_ with Qasim Rashid:
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..cdEJEdbEjr2FlD4EeANY29j0GJ6dqNUB0Taf7fBThEM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=145182609)
**Monday**
* [What Will it Take for the USA to Stop Funding Israeli War Crimes?](https://substack.com/redirect/3cea7a50-ad03-492f-b824-00f16dfc0216?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* Israel's latest attack on a displaced person's tent encampment in Rafah killed 44 innocent Palestinians, 32 of them children

**Tuesday**
* [The Qasim Rashid Show -- Episode 122](https://substack.com/redirect/5387843e-c6b7-449f-9a84-0da7f1962ae5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* ICC prosecution, strengthening communities through boxing, and funding actual public safety beyond law enforcement

**Wednesday**
* [Does a Red Line for Rafah Even Exist?](https://substack.com/redirect/d2e8d85b-5ef4-4c27-a88b-03869adf387c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* Despite declaring attacks on Rafah as a "Red Line," the White House says Israel's deadly attacks on Rafah are not a deal breaker

**Thursday**
* [How to Explain Affirmative Action to Conservatives](https://substack.com/redirect/611a3d4b-7852-4695-898e-4b9bee2ce411?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* A handy 3-step guide even the most right winger can't miss (hopefully)

**SPECIAL EDITION**
* [Donald Trump Convicted On All 34 Counts](https://substack.com/redirect/5e748ec9-067d-4a16-a10b-f0a1ca1e6f69?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* From KKK Fred to Felony Donald -- An 'Unpresidented' American History

**Friday**
* _[Let's Address This](https://substack.com/redirect/8acc8841-0a28-4f48-97ac-c7006b517c47?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[ Surpasses 1,000,000 Reads](https://substack.com/redirect/8acc8841-0a28-4f48-97ac-c7006b517c47?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* Here are the top 6 articles that you, the reader, read and shared the most

**Finally! Here 's what new subscribers to **_**Let 's Address This **_**with Qasim Rashid are saying about why they 've invested in this human rights project!**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d76138bd-9324-438e-b034-611925825043?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

**Dad Joke of the Week:**
* Me: Today I learned there's an actual medical term for when your foot falls asleep.
* Ayesha: Oh?? What is it?
* Me: _Coma toes!_ 😅
* Ayesha: 🤦🏽♀️

**Thank you for your ongoing trust and partnership.** Whether you are a new or complimentary reader or a paying subscriber--please know I'm grateful for your support. Have a wonderful weekend and look for our next post Monday morning!

body:
Biden wants me gone for good!
|
---
| [ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7b1862f043d94c0c97df6bb2280ddd5f&_e=rDY93VngM4qvWAjpZnGqXgC1H6QPVG3-sRd3zqbAhxKPNBAkeg-GPrb4Nde4TGhjSoDHj7UyqYcWjdyAUKbcG80YV0vhIXfUV_ukqXFtgGjmiYEUfLcnzexYMFr-s2tKNq5juLysm3jl9l_my-Ky1MzXe1dXhXgEf3hHj0Kbb00fq7nXCunoLQ5_mIXqnqBSJ2VgTFyepX1y_ipizrrud0SkoIpC_OE16a6pfcHjJ0Jt105X5RhroCD3GCH6z2XG1LSRC5EGUzoQOcJw-latoNjGvkawCe3H4cjeVWZWwUXmUxz2zqJj79SuTCuhPa37HGtKAqGyKQO6OGVDi8-IhuJUm8yFKyeb0jFDd-KEGP2LU2ueMChxVvPTYq759-QV-xEWHuBl73zR6eQl2P-I2A%3D%3D)

Fellow Patriot,
With the sham guilty verdict announced against me, I thought it was time I sent you a personal letter on my reflections of this rigged trial - one of the darkest days in American history.
All I ever wanted was to make this country that we all hold so dear and love so much GREAT AGAIN!
But to the villainous forces in the Washington Swamp, to Crooked Joe and his accomplices, that is the ULTIMATE CRIME!
| [ ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7b1862f043d94c0c97df6bb2280ddd5f&_e=rDY93VngM4qvWAjpZnGqXgC1H6QPVG3-sRd3zqbAhxKPNBAkeg-GPrb4Nde4TGhjSoDHj7UyqYcWjdyAUKbcG80YV0vhIXfUV_ukqXFtgGjmiYEUfLcnzexYMFr-s2tKNq5juLysm3jl9l_my-Ky1MzXe1dXhXgEf3hHj0Kbb00fq7nXCunoLQ5_mIXqnqBSJ2VgTFyepX1y_ipizrrud0SkoIpC_OE16a6pfcHjJ0Jt105X5RhroCD3GCH6z2XGbFi3Tgm2HZFJKsDf8A3HoLZLh0oMNTyEmuBbA1thRg0IBYFSWOuMgnvVWobhpNwdSPDDlEYMBwL2ycHMMhJ93fwoiw6Zaaibz-WKgiE7e9H-4xZG71SfcAyaN3-TsCnxgKt_JFBNtoUN4isBOkVZ-w%3D%3D)
---
So far, Radical Democrats have unlawfully ARRESTED the leading 2024 presidential candidate (yours truly) four times, took my MUGSHOT, forced me off the campaign trail and into the courtroom for SHAM TRIALS, unlawfully REMOVED my name from the ballot, GAGGED and CENSORED me, are attempting to JAIL me for life as an innocent man.
Now, they've branded me a FELON!
| [ **STAND WITH TRUMP** ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7b1862f043d94c0c97df6bb2280ddd5f&_e=rDY93VngM4qvWAjpZnGqXgC1H6QPVG3-sRd3zqbAhxKPNBAkeg-GPrb4Nde4TGhjSoDHj7UyqYcWjdyAUKbcG80YV0vhIXfUV_ukqXFtgGjmiYEUfLcnzexYMFr-s2tKNq5juLysm3jl9l_my-Ky1MzXe1dXhXgEf3hHj0Kbb00fq7nXCunoLQ5_mIXqnqBSJ2VgTFyepX1y_ipizrrud0SkoIpC_OE16a6pfcHjJ0Jt105X5RhroCD3GCH6z2XGDtCZ8mu5POTArInaYdAe4LV4BKBJttTMJDlvM3pKtVCXkNcqaRaUxg44P1jd-zKli0rapMilfbdOnyzIwW-p1qn1NPAdbyddrWKAbij4LjWnfmtylqVsUddz3L4qroT3YYZUxDGvvSYX0AjiI2CJ5Q%3D%3D)
---
**It might be hard to believe given what you’ve witnessed ever since I first rode down the golden escalator, but there was a point in time when I lived a pretty nice life...**
...Even the media said nice things about me!
But then, I did something they couldn’t possibly comprehend, something that undermined every globalist and radical left-wing instinct in their bones.
I chose YOU – the PEOPLE!
I chose to put AMERICA FIRST.
| [ **STAND WITH TRUMP** ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7b1862f043d94c0c97df6bb2280ddd5f&_e=rDY93VngM4qvWAjpZnGqXgC1H6QPVG3-sRd3zqbAhxKPNBAkeg-GPrb4Nde4TGhjSoDHj7UyqYcWjdyAUKbcG80YV0vhIXfUV_ukqXFtgGjmiYEUfLcnzexYMFr-s2tKNq5juLysm3jl9l_my-Ky1MzXe1dXhXgEf3hHj0Kbb00fq7nXCunoLQ5_mIXqnqBSJ2VgTFyepX1y_ipizrrud0SkoIpC_OE16a6pfcHjJ0Jt105X5RhroCD3GCH6z2XGmT6NaJgQT6AZ0Jf3hSPw4Dhn9wG9A8NXw3tI4AnQx9AOUr1FijFnOb4i0JItvToZLlaqJ2MQzTC7PsJ42ydk2JZFNZeg_A9Z9LS5ah_Sgigd6ZbA9-OK9dAREpxpbwxfAMcJUm0T-CKBAOVUmAm1dw%3D%3D)
---
I chose to give the forgotten, hardworking men and women of this country a voice, to fight back against the Washington ruling class that hates our country, to stop the warmongers, and to rout out the Deep State.
**And if I could go back and do it all over again, I wouldn’t have it any other way!** Remember, they’re not really coming after me, they’re coming after YOU. I’m just standing in their way – and **I ALWAYS WILL STAND FOR MAGA!**
Which is why, in the most consequential election year of our lives, Crooked Joe and the Democrats will use every last bit of LEGAL WARFARE imaginable to try and stop us.
But I WILL NEVER SURRENDER!
[**So please, if you can manage in Joe Biden's horrible economy, make a contribution of any amount to show that YOU too will NEVER SURRENDER – and together, WE WILL SAVE AMERICA! >**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7b1862f043d94c0c97df6bb2280ddd5f&_e=rDY93VngM4qvWAjpZnGqXgC1H6QPVG3-sRd3zqbAhxKPNBAkeg-GPrb4Nde4TGhjSoDHj7UyqYcWjdyAUKbcG80YV0vhIXfUV_ukqXFtgGjmiYEUfLcnzexYMFr-s2tKNq5juLysm3jl9l_my-Ky1MzXe1dXhXgEf3hHj0Kbb00fq7nXCunoLQ5_mIXqnqBSJ2VgTFyepX1y_ipizrrud0SkoIpC_OE16a6pfcHjJ0Jt105X5RhroCD3GCH6z2XGcoqaSf3mMLUj_fay1BykC-w98we3nEocJKZw4MPHxPcg6h5dcKVTO1dD5sIJRn0UcFKdYbiLttZ7PBBj6Opg1fFVxieugo7xMBzjKpXDt4Jz8S6e8VCYaaLGOvS-OhSkt8jqdRop7Xkrxn29t0aa5g%3D%3D)

Thank you and God bless you,

I'm launching my brand new "ELECTION YEAR CHECK-IN"** - this gives you an open line of communication directly with me and my team. I'm humbly asking you to provide any feedback you'd be willing to share with me. This is very important to me. | | | "START YOUR CHECK-IN >>" Thank you, Majority Leader Steve Scalise | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise is committed to defending our Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. This message was sent to you because you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative grassroots network. Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. name: Nancy Northup
subject: [NEWS] Texas rejects claims brought by 20 women denied abortions
body:
Exceptions to abortion bans don’t work [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86063622/476730431/1859933966?sourceid=1149642&utm_campaign=24emfr062402aax&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=texasexceptions&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWY5MjE4NS0xODIwLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ujYZMt3Rrg4UUGGEWSf-M8kO0B3JcNYII8BX2of-f5o=&emci=367e13b3-a01f-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=c9f92185-1820-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=954237)
---
| BREAKING NEWS: Texas Supreme Court rejects claims brought by 20 women denied abortions. [**FIGHT BACK.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86063623/476730432/1859933966?sourceid=1149642&utm_campaign=24emfr062402aax&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=texasexceptions&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWY5MjE4NS0xODIwLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ujYZMt3Rrg4UUGGEWSf-M8kO0B3JcNYII8BX2of-f5o=&emci=367e13b3-a01f-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=c9f92185-1820-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=954237) Peter,

Today, the Texas Supreme Court issued a ruling in our case, _Zurawski v. Texas,_ that fails to provide meaningful clarity on when doctors can perform abortions for dire medical reasons. To add insult to injury, the opinion **erases the women we represent** as though their pain and experiences didn't exist or matter.

[**We are angry, but we won’t stop fighting for abortion rights. Another generous donor has stepped up to expand our matching gift offer. Every gift you make will now be matched SIX times, up to $150,000.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86063624/476730433/1859933966?sourceid=1149642&utm_campaign=24emfr062402aax&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=texasexceptions&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWY5MjE4NS0xODIwLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ujYZMt3Rrg4UUGGEWSf-M8kO0B3JcNYII8BX2of-f5o=&emci=367e13b3-a01f-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=c9f92185-1820-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=954237) | [**WE NEED YOU**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86063625/476730434/1859933966?sourceid=1149642&utm_campaign=24emfr062402aax&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=texasexceptions&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWY5MjE4NS0xODIwLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ujYZMt3Rrg4UUGGEWSf-M8kO0B3JcNYII8BX2of-f5o=&emci=367e13b3-a01f-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=c9f92185-1820-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=954237 "WE NEED YOU")
---
Most people assume that if something goes terribly wrong with their pregnancy—a serious risk to their health or a fatal fetal diagnosis—they can make the decision to terminate in consultation with their doctor. As women across the country are finding out, _exceptions to abortion bans are an empty promise_ and it is dangerous to be pregnant in any state that bans abortion.
> "We all deserve bodily autonomy," said lead plaintiff Amanda Zurawski. "Every day, people in Texas are being told that they have no options. It's sickening and wrong."
Our team filed this groundbreaking lawsuit in March 2023 seeking to clarify the scope of the state's "medical emergency" exception under its extreme abortion bans. In total, we represent 20 women who were denied emergency abortion care and two physicians.

Texas's decision today is deeply offensive to the women we represent and all pregnant people who are being unconscionably forced to beg their elected officials for their right to control their own bodies.
[**6X FOR ABORTION RIGHTS**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86063626/476730435/1859933966?sourceid=1149642&utm_campaign=24emfr062402aax&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=texasexceptions&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWY5MjE4NS0xODIwLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ujYZMt3Rrg4UUGGEWSf-M8kO0B3JcNYII8BX2of-f5o=&emci=367e13b3-a01f-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=c9f92185-1820-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=954237 "6X FOR ABORTION RIGHTS")
---
[**Please Peter, step up to support the fight for abortion rights and let these plaintiffs and so many other pregnant people at risk know that they are not alone.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86063627/476730436/1859933966?sourceid=1149642&utm_campaign=24emfr062402aax&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=texasexceptions&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWY5MjE4NS0xODIwLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ujYZMt3Rrg4UUGGEWSf-M8kO0B3JcNYII8BX2of-f5o=&emci=367e13b3-a01f-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=c9f92185-1820-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=954237)

We are enormously disappointed, but our team will not stop fighting. And we'll need you with us.

Onward,

Nancy Northup
President & CEO

P.S. I'm so grateful to the generous donor that stepped up in reaction to this devastating decision. [**Their generosity means any gift you make right now will be matched 6X up to $150,000. Please, we need you in this fight.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86063628/476730437/1859933966?sourceid=1149642&utm_campaign=24emfr062402aax&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=texasexceptions&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOWY5MjE4NS0xODIwLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ujYZMt3Rrg4UUGGEWSf-M8kO0B3JcNYII8BX2of-f5o=&emci=367e13b3-a01f-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=c9f92185-1820-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=954237)

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: YOU are going to prove the analysts wrong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86063611/476730397/-1278658170?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3881-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWM0NDI0MC0xODIwLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TvvEM3XRf_xWdifofRq-wKxkaBbt3guBDIpi71tF-ao=)
I'm so incredibly grateful to you, friend.
Thank you for being by my side in yet another battleground race in Nevada that will decide Senate control. Your grassroots support was essential to my campaign and the future of our country.
Right now, GOP extremists are fighting to flip the Senate so they can ram through legislation that would end reproductive freedom, destroy affordable health care, and damage our very democracy. Grassroots supporters like you are essential in our fight to stop them.
That's why I wish I had better news to share: **Unfortunately, my finance team just told me we didn't reach our crucial $100,000 end-of-month goal.**
Listen, friend, we know this fight isn’t going to be easy. _The_ _Cook Political Report_ is calling Nevada the “most perilous” swing state for Democrats, and dark-money groups like the Koch network are pouring millions into Nevada to defeat me.

**But if we stand together, I know this grassroots team has what it takes to prove all the analysts wrong and fight back against the GOP’s megadonors.**
**[_So please, friend, will you chip in $5 – or even $25 – now to help me close my fundraising gap, defend my must-win seat in Nevada, and stop GOP extremists from flipping the Senate red?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86063612/476730416/-1278658170?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3881-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OWM0NDI0MC0xODIwLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TvvEM3XRf_xWdifofRq-wKxkaBbt3guBDIpi71tF-ao=)**

clean_body: | | | = I'm so incredibly grateful to you, friend. Thank you for being by my side in yet another battleground race in Nevada that will decide Senate control. Your grassroots support was essential to my campaign and the future of our country. Right now, GOP extremists are fighting to flip the Senate so they can ram through legislation that would end reproductive freedom, destroy affordable health care, and damage our very democracy. Grassroots supporters like you are essential in our fight to stop them. That's why I wish I had better news to share: Unfortunately, my finance team just told me we didn't reach our crucial $100,000 end-of-month goal. Listen, friend, we know this fight isn’t going to be easy. My primary is this Tuesday and I'm still hoping to secure your endorsement ahead of the vote | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f4ea88dc8a294e88bbb456f07a4764b5&_e=T6xnTlxdX6_AIA7IUD3hwG1aFbHQpaU_1H2-HaMcSLC1HYFey0uN2bSj45R3a-oa5c8h-3MpAi_uBB-2jcgPr5sYWOLn_el9GJmjhK0oOc1NHOsTwM4U8VUqrOZ1tzWZ46Yfy3woq4h7hJAV-r4uQg6wVUaBTz-77TiBi633XT_q_OaKGYfE0Fu-HO1CaVW0Gg1qmLOVJaZzakyPuRg6NxGSHuVmObwHBMbqLJrlWsdRWyr_VWA28kAcQzhchM6WqztadZuY379GrfpoGTt-3U9J7TuHCSpB7iLOrvUyPQTI5PFhfzHgMLb-k7gsQE19opMp-XFa-l4Fs96ajOZ2-AuQomjLaYVYr-ysqsoAiv8ly-Ue_DHjFpLoPnrikNjrxPvAe-rpo4zkzjjoPwX1ucclFseb8giO_R-6QgicRJU5LzDddCU0Yq616MpcV9RtDFV-ADTDxGpZzW9NbDIUmVzYPyKP4gAaVJ7iS5ySTmUSjTdi1O0jGzdqQmndaQEczYr1dIXqSSerKA3BuoYkxA%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

_**[Will you endorse me before my primary on Tuesday?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f4ea88dc8a294e88bbb456f07a4764b5&_e=T6xnTlxdX6_AIA7IUD3hwG1aFbHQpaU_1H2-HaMcSLC1HYFey0uN2bSj45R3a-oa5c8h-3MpAi_uBB-2jcgPr5sYWOLn_el9GJmjhK0oOc1NHOsTwM4U8VUqrOZ1tzWZ46Yfy3woq4h7hJAV-r4uQg6wVUaBTz-77TiBi633XT_q_OaKGYfE0Fu-HO1CaVW0Gg1qmLOVJaZzakyPuRg6NxGSHuVmObwHBMbqLJrlWsdRWyr_VWA28kAcQzhchM6WqztadZuY379GrfpoGTt-3U9J7TuHCSpB7iLOrvUyPQTI5PFhfzHgMLb-k7gsQE19opMp-XFa-l4Fs96ajOZ2-AuQomjLaYVYr-ysqsoAiv8ly-Ue_DHjFpLoPnrikNjrbBR8ns6HJrZkni-SudfyLSFkbCP6H84cpg7jOQwus7WW_5H_50zqlNRIS-lhfWBJ9scm1jTDAcBMLSx9lXwmmNPequ-NvOT8_1vi62mwy8f7AYn_cHJMW1PV57ClAZbGxV13FA35CoHvZvJP8QhsWA%3D%3D)**_

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=f4ea88dc8a294e88bbb456f07a4764b5&_e=T6xnTlxdX6_AIA7IUD3hwG1aFbHQpaU_1H2-HaMcSLC1HYFey0uN2bSj45R3a-oa5c8h-3MpAi_uBB-2jcgPr5sYWOLn_el9GJmjhK0oOc1NHOsTwM4U8VUqrOZ1tzWZ46Yfy3woq4h7hJAV-r4uQg6wVUaBTz-77TiBi633XT_q_OaKGYfE0Fu-HO1CaVW0Gg1qmLOVJaZzakyPuRg6NxGSHuVmObwHBMbqLJrlWsdRWyr_VWA28kAcQzhchM6WqztadZuY379GrfpoGTt-3U9J7TuHCSpB7iLOrvUyPQTI5PFhfzHgMLb-k7gsQE19opMp-XFa-l4Fs96ajOZ2-AuQomjLaYVYr-ysqsoAiv8ly-Ue_DHjFpLoPnrikNjr_YOYZIAo9SBkZEn5YRP2gnf-xHQ6i0_LHfqBmvIhCcYYu66I1-jGG61ri2Ufd077oYGi5ydEFZs3tzBgF-WiB7TbU2LwUTjlNhV078l2BekWjCEHx7I3iEM5MC_wr-r_QYH6mPEvOnz0qz5qbYldig%3D%3D)
**As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle.** Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams.

In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [**many veterans like me**] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally **sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport** so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead.

Unlike Joe Biden, I understand what it is to serve our country. _**Not service in politics, but on the battlefield.**_ I’ve been wounded in service of our nation; I’ve lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free.

clean_body: My primary is this Tuesday and I'm still hoping to secure your endorsement ahead of the vote | Fellow Conservative, As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle. Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams. My name is Tim Sheehy, Republican candidate for U.S. Senate from Montana. I’m a former U.S. Navy SEAL and a 2008 Naval Academy graduate. Right now, I'm the only person standing in the way of Chuck Schumer and his Senate majority. My primary is THIS Tuesday, March 4th, and I'm hoping to secure the endorsements of 10,000 conservatives before voters head to the polls. . In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [many veterans like me] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead. Unlike Joe Biden, I understand what it is to serve our country. Not service in politics, but on the battlefield. I’ve been wounded in service of our nation; I’ve lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free. Chuck Schumer and Washington Democrats know that I pose a direct threat to their chances of holding on to power, and they'll do anything to stop me from winning this race - and spend $100M plus in the process. Fellow Conservative, I am under no illusions that you will support my campaign the first time you hear from me. But my life experiences have taught me that anything worth having requires working tirelessly, breaking down walls, and moving mountains to get it. I hope you will allow me to earn your support today by reading my entire message - I promise, it’s worth the read. In the Navy, finding yourself between a rock and a hard place is easy. This rings especially true for the individuals who have earned the honor of serving in the elite task force that is the Navy SEALs, a group of highly trained combat warriors – a brotherhood – in which I earned a spot following my graduation from the United States Naval Academy at Annapolis. Being a SEAL isn’t a one-man job; it takes teamwork, problem-solving, and coming to a consensus. When you’re on missions in the harshest environments known to man, you must act as a unit and recognize you’re only as strong as the weakest among you. I’ve deployed to Iraq, Afghanistan, South America, and the Pacific during my time as a SEAL, and I have been involved in dozens of engagements with enemy forces and survived to tell the tales. And believe me, there are some tales. I’ve seen the world’s dangers and stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism. I know the strength it takes to stand up and fight for what is right – which is why Our homeland is in danger. Radical Democrats in Washington want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. This FAR-LEFT liberal agenda is assaulting our society, communities, and the American Dream. The Democrats’ grip on power is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to flip the Senate next year is to nominate a strong conservative candidate who can defeat my liberal Democrat opponent in 2024. Over the days and weeks ahead, you’ll receive emails from me and my team as we build our campaign. While I don’t want you to feel obligated to interact with each piece of content you receive in your inbox, I kindly ask you to refrain from unsubscribing from our contact list. The only way to flip the Senate next year is to nominate a strong Republican candidate who can defeat a Democrat in the General Election. *If we fail to flip this Montana seat RED next November, we lose our best chance at a Senate Majority for the next DECADE due to the election map at play. This is my most critical mission to date, and Thank you, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." * | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA | Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. name: Marquita Bradshaw for U. S. Senate
subject: Conviction for a Fairer America with Marquita Bradshaw #BeThe1st #Carry1ToVote #1stOnTheBallot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marquita Bradshaw for US Senate
body:
As Michelle Obama eloquently put it, Donald Trump, as a convicted felon, lacks the capacity to embody the leadership our country desperately needs. | | | | |
---
| _Conviction for a Fairer America with Marquita Bradshaw_[ _#BeThe1st_](https://marquitabradshaw.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed471fbd34b1912899159e22e&id=e6d8815077&e=a13c578381) __[_#Carry1ToVote_](https://marquitabradshaw.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed471fbd34b1912899159e22e&id=ba8d9ba2d9&e=a13c578381) __[_#1stOnTheBallot_](https://marquitabradshaw.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed471fbd34b1912899159e22e&id=69990df5b9&e=a13c578381)

Dear Peter,
In the warmth of my grandparents' home, we learned to respect the rules but also to recognize our power to uphold or redefine them. Today, I’m asking for your support to continue this mission. Your contribution can make a difference. [Donate Here](https://marquitabradshaw.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed471fbd34b1912899159e22e&id=99a4a4a506&e=a13c578381)
[As a Black single mother, an advocate for environmental justice, and a dedicated organizer in Tennessee, securing the Democratic nomination for U.S. Senate was anything but expected. Against the odds, we emerged victorious.](https://marquitabradshaw.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed471fbd34b1912899159e22e&id=2a6a434b1d&e=a13c578381)
This triumph is not just a personal achievement; it's beacon of a larger movement, a crescendo of momentum gathering force. To keep this momentum going, we need your help. Can I count on you to contribute today? [Donate Here](https://marquitabradshaw.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed471fbd34b1912899159e22e&id=72fa6c730b&e=a13c578381)
This year marks the 60th anniversary of Freedom Summer, a pivotal moment in our nation’s history where ordinary people united to fight for civil rights and social justice. As we reflect on this legacy, Americans are clamoring for leaders who prioritize their welfare and ensure the rules of our society benefit everyone, not just a privileged few.
---
[Donate now](https://marquitabradshaw.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed471fbd34b1912899159e22e&id=66c9f2642c&e=a13c578381)
| As Michelle Obama eloquently put it, Donald Trump, as a convicted felon, lacks the capacity to embody the leadership our country desperately needs.
This is why I have thrown my hat into the ring. Our campaign is a crusade for environmental justice, the Green New Deal, Medicare For All, and high-quality public education for all. I am ready to meet this moment, but I cannot do it alone. We are $17,135 short of our goal for the primary election. Your support is crucial. Please consider making a donation today to help us achieve victory. [Donate Here](https://marquitabradshaw.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed471fbd34b1912899159e22e&id=0f8547417f&e=a13c578381)
Thank you for standing with me. Together, let's stride towards victory. [_#BeThe1st_](https://marquitabradshaw.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed471fbd34b1912899159e22e&id=f24f04a19a&e=a13c578381) __[_#Carry1ToVote_](https://marquitabradshaw.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed471fbd34b1912899159e22e&id=af7dac0e30&e=a13c578381) __[_#1stOnTheBallot_](https://marquitabradshaw.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed471fbd34b1912899159e22e&id=0dc7849485&e=a13c578381)
With gratitude,
---
| **Marquita Bradshaw** Candidate for United States Senate
---
| P.S. Please consider making a donation today. You can get more policy information by visiting our campaign website at [https://qrco.de/bf2Ixg](https://marquitabradshaw.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed471fbd34b1912899159e22e&id=0c6e865b1b&e=a13c578381). Thank you for your support.
---
|
---

name: Kari Lake
subject: Trump verdict - a hard pill to swallow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kari Lake for Senate
body:
We now live in a banana republic.

|
---
Kari Lake here.

I've got to be honest. This is a hard pill to swallow.

Yesterday, a Kangaroo court led by a corrupt judge convicted President Trump of 34 felonies, even though the prosecutor couldn't even describe what crime he committed.

The simple truth is, we no longer have the rule of law in this country. We now live in a banana republic, thanks to Joe Biden and his cronies like Ruben Gallego.

I am fighting tooth and nail to ensure President Trump has a MAGA Senate that will have his back. We are still behind on our fundraising goals. If you're with me, could you contribute just $15 today to help our campaign move forward?

I AM A POLITICAL PRISONER!

STAND WITH TRUMP

Friend: Is this the
end of America?

I was convicted in a

They've raided my

MAKE AMERICA
GREAT AGAIN!

Crooked Joe Biden
needs to get the message - right here, right now - that his
chances of a 2nd term END TODAY!

BUT FOR THAT TO
HAPPEN, OUR IMMEDIATE PUSHBACK MUST BE SO MASSIVE, IT WILL GO
DOWN IN HISTORY! WE MUST MAKE JOE BIDEN REGRET EVER COMING AFTER
US!

Before the day is
over, I'm calling on TEN MILLION pro-Trump patriots to chip in
and say, "I STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP!" >

STAND WITH TRUMP

Remember, YOUR
SUPPORT IS THE ONLY THING STANDING BETWEEN US AND TOTAL TYRANNY!

So I'm humbly asking
for you to please, please, PLEASE join me at this dark hour.

I know with you by my
side, we will peacefully win back the White House and MAKE
AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! >

Thank you,

Donald J. Trump
45th President of the
United States

STAND WITH TRUMP

# [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86069657/476747671/18334046?refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240601_2_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkyZDU5N2M5LTFmMjAtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=iRP0xXBV7q6v9QSNKYls7mgNOGV6DER1kMBh3R59kNw=)
Listen, our chances of defending the Senate just dropped dramatically.
**I’m officially the most vulnerable woman in the Senate. Now, Republicans are zeroing in on Nevada as the one seat they need to win Senate control in November. Because if we lose Nevada, the entire Senate _will_ flip red.**
I’ve won tough races before, but this is shaping up to be the closest race I’ve ever faced. GOP megadonors like the Koch network are already pouring millions into this race to defeat me, and I can’t fight back alone. That’s why I’m reaching out for your urgent help as I face a major fundraising gap.
**We just ran the numbers, and it looks like I need to raise at least _$30,000_ by midnight to have the resources to keep this campaign on track, pull ahead in the polls, and defend this seat – but right now, we're way short. **
[_**Please, can you pitch in $3 or more to split between me and Upset the Setup right now to help us turn this around before it's too late? clean_body: = Listen, our chances of defending the Senate just dropped dramatically. I’m officially the most vulnerable woman in the Senate. Now, Republicans are zeroing in on Nevada as the one seat they need to win Senate control in November. Because if we lose Nevada, the entire Senate will flip red. I’ve won tough races before, but this is shaping up to be the closest race I’ve ever faced. GOP megadonors like the Koch network are already pouring millions into this race to defeat me, and I can’t fight back alone. That’s why I’m reaching out for your urgent help as I face a major fundraising gap. name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: The former president of the United States is now a felon.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

At least this much is true: Because of the crimes he chose to commit and
the court trial where the evidence of his crimes was presented (and
contested by the most aggressive defense money can buy), Donald Trump was
convicted by twelve ordinary Americans who, despite the pressure and the
stakes, followed the facts and decided that no one is above the law.

The former president of the United States is now a felon.

Trump has responded, predictably, by lying about all of it, feeding his
followers and anyone else he is able to reach with falsehood laid atop
falsehood. His acolytes – Republican senators, congressmen and governors –
repeat his lies and sow distrust and confusion among their own followers.

Yesterday, Governor Abbott tweeted:

The message: This verdict is illegitimate. And Biden did it.

It would be bad enough if this were an isolated incident. But here’s the
pattern among Republican leaders like Abbott, marching in ever tighter
lockstep with Trump:

* Deny the results of the 2020 presidential election and refuse to
acknowledge that Joe Biden is the legitimate president of the United
States.

* Publicly refuse to accept the results of the 2024 presidential
election if Donald Trump doesn’t win.

* Signal that political terror is OK (Trump promised to pardon those
convicted for violence on January 6th and Abbott actually pardoned a
white nationalist who killed a BLM protestor)

And now,

* Reject Trump’s 34 felony convictions as the product of a sham trial
and undermine faith in the judiciary.

Not only is this comprehensive political fraud threatening the rule of
law, our democracy and our system of justice; it is setting a new and
incredibly dangerous precedent for our country.

Because, if Trump and his court of MAGA lords are able to successfully
hold that a lost election or an unfavorable jury trial is illegitimate,
who that follows them as a candidate or office holder will refuse to do
the same? In fact, it is quickly becoming the new normal for the
Republican party.

And when it becomes normal and accepted for one party, what is the other
party going to do?

In other words, if Republicans deny election losses and refuse to
acknowledge lawful winners if those winners are Democrats; if they
threaten voters with political violence; if they question the legitimacy
of the courts and jury trials – if they are able to successfully compete
outside the rules... are Democrats suckers for staying within them?

How long will Democrats resist this lawlessness once the disadvantage
imposed by following the rules compromises their political viability? Why
wouldn’t they adopt the same tactics, claiming, perhaps truthfully, that
it is the only way they can compete?

That is why it is so critical that we defeat the forces of mendacity and
violence in our country, before they can fully and, perhaps irrevocably,
take hold.

For Powered by People, that starts in Texas where our volunteers are
committing their time and resources to reach, register and turn out the
hundreds of thousands of eligible unregistered Democrats across this
state.

They are the key to restoring democracy, rule of law and the truth in
Texas.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20240601.Lh92DT&refcode=ema20240601-239616&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1019&akid=239616%2E444211%2EnKDAy3 ]DONATE $3

Thank you for your help,

Beto
PXP Volunteer

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1020&akid=239616%2E444211%2EnKDAy3

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

name: Adam Schiff
subject: I’m grateful
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=6579%2E5257348%2E07C65C)
Hi Derek,
I wanted to set this moment aside to say _thank you._
You’ve answered the call at every deadline.
After every attack.
Preparing us for the many fights ahead.
_Thank you._
As we enter June, campaign season is officially upon us. This is a busy month – with the first presidential debate _and_ the end-of-quarter fundraising deadline.
Now is the time to roll up our sleeves, knock on doors, connect with voters, and do what we can to support Democratic candidates up and down the ballot in California and beyond.
Together, we’ll do just that.
Thank you for helping us hit our fundraising goals and uplifting this grassroots movement.
I couldn’t do it without you.
– Adam

name: Youth Vote HQ (via NextGen America)
subject: Pride: It’s always been a fight
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86070411/476749930/240436357?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2M4OGNhMS0yMDIwLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=82U9KO4aXGsk0dO9k513oSeYEBnzpOvj1c8noA0eJhY=&emci=6451f3f5-af1e-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=acc88ca1-2020-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=6787172)

It’s officially **Pride Month** , team! We’re celebrating, loving, and remembering why this month is so important.
We’ve come a long way in this fight for equality, but we’re still not done. Discrimination against queer youth is on the rise, with school hate crimes _quadrupling_ in states with anti-LGBTQ+ laws.
**What does this tell us, folks?**
In the most vulnerable time of their lives, LGBTQ+ youth are frankly not supported by their school system, their representatives, or their government. So it’s up to us to make sure everyone feels safe living in their truth.
[Now more than ever, _especially during Pride_ , we need to take this to the top and urge Congress to protect the LGBTQ+ community’s rights. Can we count on you?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86070414/476749933/-1274652144?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2M4OGNhMS0yMDIwLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=82U9KO4aXGsk0dO9k513oSeYEBnzpOvj1c8noA0eJhY=&emci=6451f3f5-af1e-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=acc88ca1-2020-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=6787172)
| [Add your name →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86070415/476749934/1454231211?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2M4OGNhMS0yMDIwLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=82U9KO4aXGsk0dO9k513oSeYEBnzpOvj1c8noA0eJhY=&emci=6451f3f5-af1e-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=acc88ca1-2020-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=6787172)
---
Nearly 30% of Gen Z adults identify as LGBTQ+ . So it’s our responsibility to make sure the next generation has the tools to thrive.
It is _absurd_ that queer kids have to deal with discrimination, abuse, and _literal hate crimes_ day in and day out. But we’re not going to take it lying down.
Pride is not the time to be quiet. We’ve been battling bigots and conservatives for decades, and now those same hate groups have taken the fight to our kids. [Stand with us and DEMAND that Congress protect the youngest members of the LGBTQ+ community!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86070417/476749936/-1442665836?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2M4OGNhMS0yMDIwLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=82U9KO4aXGsk0dO9k513oSeYEBnzpOvj1c8noA0eJhY=&emci=6451f3f5-af1e-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=acc88ca1-2020-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=6787172)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rogers for Senate
body:
Sham. Disgrace. Embarrassment.

| | | **We don't want you to leave! But we understand if you don't want to receive these emails anymore, click[HERE](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_s=c25edcf944d842c093d62443c4b4f17d&_t=UCfipcumRZe7nA2W8TiscAnwux8H1FoK9OSRgLiOsm2gGexhBS_u3EnJNu0PRsPKNNePIeMXZDrPAoQPrmMmdxP9m4Xgt93Bm1iyKVrsyhAGx_ufckV064CgTdQXzeVn)**
---
It's been clear that these charges were politically motivated from the beginning, and while thankfully our system of justice doesn't place all of the power in rabidly-partisan district attorneys, this rigged trial and un-American persecution of President Trump is an indelible stain on our nation. I have no doubt that this affront to justice will be successfully appealed and President Trump will be cleared, but we cannot ignore Joe Biden and his allies' reckless weaponization of our nation's justice system and the long-term damage his malice has caused. **[I’m personally requesting that every single member of Team Rogers stand up and join us in demanding an immediate appeal. ](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=c25edcf944d842c093d62443c4b4f17d&_e=ON0b8f69RlJg2DNxgZU7GPpTGlH-MSpr8p53OI_QrXgq_dSwHfrQJyjjqSrc8PpC7PtBXSqJT8NNnZokJoyrUgTJEdpBsX3_dVBeAmiTHatgMgkALd0-iWLsp1QZE8-OwijZiroSiIHikPgODzZoLgqs-mU_Hmq3msPvzLUJPMP9BUscS8MpsOshFVuk8PUHgrCLbSOCSfyZ4NSoHlvBL1Gt17ZqSwv1t0z2lfw58dLUIfMP1FWnam-qRoBzrWW3MZNQ1w3E3tTOsx0SQxMxAP0Nrm1X58mJZ5v2b7Q1-Z9qCEmIiUaJRhSh6sc8AtRUU9rHwO3oV7F5mWpBVpf1TaCoAA3mH7Q-DwoBQeBjFOaRh20qmQV5SedydwknejQ60TzS8P0XXIf_gI_S8PT3e-fVxcFnJFMeH4GU1htAKuHID-6Dnig7oz9hLgc_8XYGtkdsWaJdnR8S-mTLHaROKQ%3D%3D)**

This is a growing crisis:
* We now know that insurrectionist symbols were on full display at TWO of Justice Samuel Alito’s houses in the time since the January 6th attack on the Capitol
* And we know Ginni Thomas, the wife of Justice Clarence Thomas, spent the days leading up to the insurrection egging on Trump’s efforts to overturn the 2020 election results

**As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle.** Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams.

My name is Tim Sheehy, Republican candidate for U.S. Senate from Montana. I’m a former U.S. Navy SEAL and a 2008 Naval Academy graduate. Right now, I'm the only person standing in the way of Chuck Schumer and his Senate majority.

_**My primary is THIS Tuesday, March 4th, and I'm hoping to secure the endorsements of 10,000 conservatives before voters head to the polls. **_
