In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [**many veterans like me**] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally **sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport** so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead.

Unlike Joe Biden, I understand what it is to serve our country. _**Not service in politics, but on the battlefield.**_ I’ve been wounded in service of our nation; I’ve lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free.

clean_body: On Friday, President Trump made headlines when he made an endorsement in the Montana U.S. Senate race | Fellow Conservative, As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle. Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams. My name is Tim Sheehy, Republican candidate for U.S. Senate from Montana. I’m a former U.S. Navy SEAL and a 2008 Naval Academy graduate. Right now, I'm the only person standing in the way of Chuck Schumer and his Senate majority. My primary is THIS Tuesday, March 4th, and I'm hoping to secure the endorsements of 10,000 conservatives before voters head to the polls. . In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [many veterans like me] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead. Unlike Joe Biden, I understand what it is to serve our country. Not service in politics, but on the battlefield. I’ve been wounded in service of our nation; I’ve lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free. Chuck Schumer and Washington Democrats know that I pose a direct threat to their chances of holding on to power, and they'll do anything to stop me from winning this race - and spend $100M plus in the process. Fellow Conservative, I am under no illusions that you will support my campaign the first time you hear from me. But my life experiences have taught me that anything worth having requires working tirelessly, breaking down walls, and moving mountains to get it. I hope you will allow me to earn your support today by reading my entire message - I promise, it’s worth the read. In the Navy, finding yourself between a rock and a hard place is easy. This rings especially true for the individuals who have earned the honor of serving in the elite task force that is the Navy SEALs, a group of highly trained combat warriors – a brotherhood – in which I earned a spot following my graduation from the United States Naval Academy at Annapolis. Being a SEAL isn’t a one-man job; it takes teamwork, problem-solving, and coming to a consensus. When you’re on missions in the harshest environments known to man, you must act as a unit and recognize you’re only as strong as the weakest among you. I’ve deployed to Iraq, Afghanistan, South America, and the Pacific during my time as a SEAL, and I have been involved in dozens of engagements with enemy forces and survived to tell the tales. And believe me, there are some tales. I’ve seen the world’s dangers and stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism. I know the strength it takes to stand up and fight for what is right – which is why Our homeland is in danger. Radical Democrats in Washington want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. This FAR-LEFT liberal agenda is assaulting our society, communities, and the American Dream. The Democrats’ grip on power is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to flip the Senate next year is to nominate a strong conservative candidate who can defeat my liberal Democrat opponent in 2024. Over the days and weeks ahead, you’ll receive emails from me and my team as we build our campaign. While I don’t want you to feel obligated to interact with each piece of content you receive in your inbox, I kindly ask you to refrain from unsubscribing from our contact list. The only way to flip the Senate next year is to nominate a strong Republican candidate who can defeat a Democrat in the General Election. *If we fail to flip this Montana seat RED next November, we lose our best chance at a Senate Majority for the next DECADE due to the election map at play. This is my most critical mission to date, and Thank you, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." * | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA | Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: State Representative Ryan Chamberlin
subject: Weekly Update from Rep. Ryan Chamberlin
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://us21.campaign-archive.com/?e=d1c1b9864f&u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=746c034932)
---
| |
---
| | **WEEKLY UPDATE FROM REP. RYAN CHAMBERLIN**
---
| My Fellow Floridians,

Thank you for joining me for another weekly update! I had a busy week out in the district, attending events and getting to know more about how I can help my constituents in the legislature. I’m very proud of what my colleagues and I accomplished during the **2024 Legislative Session** in **Tallahassee** , and I look forward to continuing our work next year. We still have a lot of work to do in order to keep our state the **Free State of Florida**. Thank you for your unwavering support and faith in my leadership.

If there is something I can do for you, please do not hesitate to contact my office. I want to work with you to build a brighter future for Florida and our district. **You can get in touch with my office by[clicking here](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=9f49d4553b&e=d1c1b9864f). **We would be more than happy to assist you in any way we can!
---
| | **Tuesday, May 28 - 40th Anniversary Celebration of ResCare Community Livings**
---
|
---
---
| My staff and I had the pleasure of attending the 40th anniversary celebration of **ResCare Community Living - Ocala Cluster**. This great organization in our **Ocala** community has done great work serving residents with intellectual and developmental disabilities. I appreciated being able to celebrate this incredible milestone with them.
---
| | **Wednesday, May 29 - New Southeastern Livestock Pavilion RV Campground**
---
|
---
|
---
---
| I had the opportunity to attend the ribbon cutting for the new **Southeastern Livestock Pavilion RV Campground**. This addition to our community will offer a location for those wishing to stay on-site while attending the events at the livestock pavilion.

Thank you to **Agriculture Commissioner Wilton Simpson** and the **Marion County Board of Commissioners** for spearheading this important development.
---
| | **Disaster Preparedness Sales Tax Holiday**
---
|
---
| Today marks the start of Hurricane Season. Don’t forget to prepare! **June 1 - June 14** , the **Disaster Preparedness Sales Tax Holiday** takes effect, so be sure to take advantage of this opportunity to save while stocking up on all of the essentials.

Find a complete list of the tax-free items at [**FloridaRevenue.com/DisasterPrep**](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=d891ad3ee4&e=d1c1b9864f)**** and a complete disaster supply kit checklist at [**FloridaDisaster.org/Kit**](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=c53c78263b&e=d1c1b9864f).
---
| | **Legislation Signed by Governor DeSantis This Week**
---
| | **Governor DeSantis** is doing great work for our state, and it has been an honor to serve alongside his leadership in the legislature to make **Florida** stronger than ever.

**Below is a list of the legislation our governor signed into law this week:**

[HB 59 – Provision of Homeowners’ Association Rules and Covenants](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=73ad317126&e=d1c1b9864f)
[CS/HB 141 – Economic Development](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=4e30bc8a9a&e=d1c1b9864f)
[CS/CS/CS/HB 149 – Continuing Contracts](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=ae0bebd736&e=d1c1b9864f)
[CS/HB 293 – Hurricane Protections for Homeowners’ Associations](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=311883f552&e=d1c1b9864f)
[CS/HB 481 – Building Construction Regulations and System Warranties](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=c45004c692&e=d1c1b9864f)
[CS/HB 535 – Low-voltage Alarm System Projects](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=e449c47348&e=d1c1b9864f)
[CS/HB 705 – Public Works Projects](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=f4a8132ac1&e=d1c1b9864f)
[CS/CS/SB 556 – Protection of Specified Adults](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=9296cf07ee&e=d1c1b9864f)
[CS/SB 644 – Rural Emergency Hospitals](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=2795cf9c37&e=d1c1b9864f)

[CS/HB 775 – Surrendered Infants](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=c923a13417&e=d1c1b9864f)
[CS/HB 855 – Dental Services](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=52578f9730&e=d1c1b9864f)
[CS/CS/HB 1049 – Flood Disclosure in the Sale of Real Property](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=378c05c963&e=d1c1b9864f)
[CS/HB 1093 – Florida Uniform Fiduciary Income and Principal Act](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=3e99b6bcb9&e=d1c1b9864f)
[CS/HB 1161 – Verification of Eligibility for Homestead Exemption](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=869820dd79&e=d1c1b9864f)
[CS/CS/SB 808 – Treatment by a Medical Specialist](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=ac8719ed9b&e=d1c1b9864f)
[CS/CS/CS/SB 812 – Expedited Approval of Residential Building Permits](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=1d1e76dfb5&e=d1c1b9864f)
[CS/SB 1142 – Occupational Licensing](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=1a61b6f091&e=d1c1b9864f)
[SB 938 – Dentistry](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=51e9797719&e=d1c1b9864f)

[CS/CS/HB 1203 – Homeowners’ Associations](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=66982b999d&e=d1c1b9864f)
[CS/HB 1259 – Providers of Cardiovascular Services](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=dd61217dd7&e=d1c1b9864f)
[CS/CS/HB 1363 – Traffic Enforcement](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=e47ac8561d&e=d1c1b9864f)
[HB 7009 – OGSR/Mental Health Treatment and Services](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=877f2d6268&e=d1c1b9864f)
[HB 7085 – Sickle Cell Disease](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=89bd33a193&e=d1c1b9864f)
[CS/SB 1350 – Salvage](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=536ac8748b&e=d1c1b9864f)
[CS/CS/SB 1456 – Counties Designated as Areas of Critical State Concern](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=4a8f369226&e=d1c1b9864f)
[CS/SB 7054 – Private Activity Bonds](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=43397b8517&e=d1c1b9864f)
---
|
---
| | I’m very honored to be your voice in the Florida House! Since taking office, I have worked hard to make our state and district even better. I’m only getting started in my work to preserve our traditional values and advance the conservative movement.

Have a wonderful weekend! I look forward to sharing with you again very soon.

Best regards,

**Ryan Chamberlin**
******State Representative**
**District 24**
---

I am counting on your support as we continue to strengthen our campaign to flip the #1 most flippable seat in the country. Together, we will win back the House in November.

Thank you again, and let’s flip our district blue,

Laura Gillen

name: Andy Kim
subject: We need to be ready to hit the ground running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
We’re going up against Republican opponents who have endorsed convicted felon Donald Trump, and with that, endorsed his MAGA agenda.

Will you rush a contribution to help us hit our goal and come out of the primary stronger than ever?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86071531/476752584/-1197072038?refcode=2024-06-01-preprimary&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=11f4d506-2220-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMWY0ZDUwNi0yMjIwLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fg4wmi0x5ZYslNHqURBM2Xvo_GHfmr5HbRgZBgBgOlc=) After June 4, we need to be ready to hit the ground running. We're going up against Republican opponents who have endorsed convicted felon Donald Trump, and with that, endorsed his MAGA agenda. That agenda includes another round of tax cuts for the well-off and well-connected.**The Republican House Majority Leader just said that if Republicans take control of Washington, they're ready to renew all Trump tax cuts in the first 100 days, which includes the SALT provisions that have hit NJ families hardest.** Either one of our GOP opponents would be a rubber stamp for these tax cuts along with whatever the MAGA agenda entails – which includes cutting social security and Medicare, further gutting abortion rights and contraception access, and stifling the progress we've made in the fight against climate change. It is clear that New Jersey cannot afford to be the state that gives the Republican Party control of the Senate again. I've proven that I can beat Republicans in New Jersey, but I can't do it without your full support – **especially since Bob Menedez is preparing to run as an Independent, making this a three-way race**. name: Joe Biden
subject: This week’s news…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
There's not a doubt in my mind that if we stand together, we can do the necessary, hard work to defeat Donald Trump once and for all on November 5. But we can’t back down now. Especially not in moments like this. | | |
---
You may have seen some news this week about Donald Trump’s trial in New York. But, what you may not know is that his campaign received $52.8 million in online donations in the 24 hours following the verdict coming down. _$52.8 million._ _That’s no joke._ _Now, my team tells me that we’ve seen some support come to our campaign since Trump’s guilty verdict, but we need more._ I know you may see a number like $52.8 million and wonder, “Does my donation even matter?” The answer is yes. Yes, it does. Here’s why: **There's not a doubt in my mind that if we stand together, we can do the necessary, hard work to defeat Donald Trump once and for all on November 5.** But we can’t back down now. Especially not in moments like this. Winning this race is going to take a lot of resources. You know I don't enjoy asking for money, but I'm so incredibly proud that our funding is coming from hardworking folks chipping in a few dollars at a time to finish the job. Because, like me, you refuse to give Trump and his MAGA buddies four more years to destroy our democracy. [**With everything on the line this fall, Kamala and I are relying on your support to keep building momentum to reelect us. Can you chip in your first $25 to help us emerge victorious on November 5?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt0n_-PX9mL8yHKUav8QI_tSps3IeD9eE4ifOC5EtbodzX1U4umXEDx-oZcDLdRf5VqmexsthPUm4BjU4jk5SDNrtfeLczNzvL_XWt62SHTnjL46N0MmHnB2xGuADbZK5b1A8TaivI7fy9I8fbKFTfSXY_5HEmo74AD56iYpGvy4ls8zHloDJKiKGNHep2GbowveYXHkl6sMqcQInbcdLwm14PY978wTvE4nt55qdThsSwkPkuDQY7njeewzufaUe7ceS1V-GMcjxMF5s-wQowkbYCbWu5bT0BLILEuO23GiHFvaUM4uAU85P3IHXze4toZzTm4itwzK0wIsng_Ote2/46u/K2Uf6EjrRpWYadMbykrWfw/h0/h001.CZpDGNOvx7tBbxGgp4ydrh_QItPcoAvQAuetmqcbqXo) Peter, you know I mean what I say and I say all that I mean. The truth about our campaign is this: _Grassroots supporters like you are powering this campaign._ Dating back to my earliest race – when folks went door-to-door delivering mail to help raise funds to get me elected to the U.S. Senate – grassroots support mattered to me. I’m proud of that fact. **I am proud of it because no campaign is won or lost alone._That couldn’t be truer this year._** Listen, the news is going to be focused on this influx of money to Trump’s campaign. They’re going to talk about how the verdict could be helping him in the polls. Pundits are probably already coming up with ways this is going to hurt our campaign. But that is not what I am focused on. I am focused on: You. Your needs. Your family. Your community. Because I’m so grateful for you. For your support. So only if you’re able to, I’m asking you to step up for the first time today. [**You can use this link to give >>**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt0n_-PX9mL8yHKUav8QI_tSps3IeD9eE4ifOC5EtbodzX1U4umXEDx-oZcDLdRf5VqmexsthPUm4BjU4jk5SDNrtfeLczNzvL_XWt62SHTnjL46N0MmHnB2xGuADbZK5ZPMSmp8zeHhY8EwWCvpibFKHK82vM6Bi8DrDGeeQOjtjEGY1CAF9PFp1FwuFkN7rbufKnoxqFNhttpnGYQdL3iRAvSEtj7tmkDocIbgZwpQlqwYs_vwNF_rcXe7xnEmUlxqTvxV-l6jjPhrkMPjd7iKeWlbIgMr4FTf7G3NWFq4ZEhsUYLaGtenn8mVP-sKH0enYL-BL9sJ7M-pYHmxHfm/46u/K2Uf6EjrRpWYadMbykrWfw/h1/h001.dNW_JJBHaWN7udusqfOZiihRXnTZTSdpG5tppW4uYcs) [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-bfp-rapid-june-2024**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt0n_-PX9mL8yHKUav8QI_tSps3IeD9eE4ifOC5EtbodzX1U4umXEDx-oZcDLdRf5VqmexsthPUm4BjU4jk5SDNrtfeLczNzvL_XWt62SHTnjL46N0MmHnB2xGuADbZK5aSHtipsiH7pCP3yCAV2FEStvj_BBkAhpLqFiA7KxmKkc90EJKFMfbax4pLBpS--5k7f1hzmCGnQgLOukDjYQG27iSPRT5exOiFu1lA2R2PPpLxZnWl6nh20oRxTvqbJn5rPVKqIc6jl9dIkNsezZaliiFVyLX-W8uRBfKpJS8F3PRrpTWQg8S-ApFnKNIknEYlFQKGb_-aQNFt7dQNWwZi/46u/K2Uf6EjrRpWYadMbykrWfw/h2/h001.v9yzmoIA7XfVJUQs8a-dAKtOivR8e23LLDRbUg2_ZXM) Thank you so much, Peter. Your support means more than you know. Joe Joe Biden
President of the United States [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt0n_-PX9mL8yHKUav8QI_tSps3IeD9eE4ifOC5EtbodzX1U4umXEDx-oZcDLdRf5VqmexsthPUm4BjU4jk5SDNrtfeLczNzvL_XWt62SHTnjL46N0MmHnB2xGuADbZK5YUeo-q2nLM4dB8bpAOVurnMP8AgyKSeLKassI3EIOQw0-ZRfCTMb6ZNOPKsAkxtDd4CGSLl11CCzQh3WIgWQw1XvFf_-7fl7mmML-AXVOBoPbn9whWimg0EFzcZckjuhkKie3ysIQjgxh4t2nkHZkK_nhmum9zaPGvTuk5EyfKK6sXqF--jXnom-BpykQJeSpdPUTleH2IHn2WLfYwKZeV/46u/K2Uf6EjrRpWYadMbykrWfw/h3/h001.StGryXfIWCA4jGJMGEFiiAzPoqFE80iVs9ftFilCYHc) P.S. I'm humbled beyond measure by the fact that this campaign is funded mostly by working people chipping in what they can, when they can through emails just like this one. **Thousands of grassroots supporters chipped in last month to make sure Kamala and I can finish the job. Now, they're counting on you to make your first gift.[So, if you’re able, please make a $25 donation to my campaign today.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt0n_-PX9mL8yHKUav8QI_tSps3IeD9eE4ifOC5EtbodzX1U4umXEDx-oZcDLdRf5VqmexsthPUm4BjU4jk5SDNrtfeLczNzvL_XWt62SHTnjL46N0MmHnB2xGuADbZK5YuYIucUmjgKlYp2DljGyDPGWo1uFalZdWcLsh3P0ZutM53zs0oPzNiYqxz1sDLmVjE5o428onFmpAikVxD6pTHhqRW7k67-KNROvCC4efwSure7PMyGWCotMmjihit01fLZFXVzWREsAQxfX0PDDApc8fn4Ub65KtEJfYLRL_62DH0_6Vhus8_sp6vs0MtEfzKtg9vMlLIg7VJaLKaLW0p/46u/K2Uf6EjrRpWYadMbykrWfw/h4/h001.-wC_Kal5Qn40k0yZPelw6Nzb_QGtwhoCNx2EmH2lDf0)**

clean_body: There's not a doubt in my mind that if we stand together, we can do the necessary, hard work to defeat Donald Trump once and for all on November 5. But we can’t back down now. Especially not in moments like this. | | | You may have seen some news this week about Donald Trump’s trial in New York. But, what you may not know is that his campaign received $52.8 million in online donations in the 24 hours following the verdict coming down. $52.8 million. That’s no joke. Now, my team tells me that we’ve seen some support come to our campaign since Trump’s guilty verdict, but we need more. I know you may see a number like $52.8 million and wonder, “Does my donation even matter?” The answer is yes. Yes, it does. Here’s why: There's not a doubt in my mind that if we stand together, we can do the necessary, hard work to defeat Donald Trump once and for all on November 5. But we can’t back down now. Especially not in moments like this. Winning this race is going to take a lot of resources. You know I don't enjoy asking for money, but I'm so incredibly proud that our funding is coming from hardworking folks chipping in a few dollars at a time to finish the job. Because, like me, you refuse to give Trump and his MAGA buddies four more years to destroy our democracy. Peter, you know I mean what I say and I say all that I mean. The truth about our campaign is this: Grassroots supporters like you are powering this campaign. Dating back to my earliest race – when folks went door-to-door delivering mail to help raise funds to get me elected to the U.S. Senate – grassroots support mattered to me. I’m proud of that fact. I am proud of it because no campaign is won or lost alone.That couldn’t be truer this year. Listen, the news is going to be focused on this influx of money to Trump’s campaign. They’re going to talk about how the verdict could be helping him in the polls. Pundits are probably already coming up with ways this is going to hurt our campaign. But that is not what I am focused on. I am focused on: You. Your needs. Your family. Your community. Because I’m so grateful for you. For your support. So only if you’re able to, I’m asking you to step up for the first time today. Thank you so much, Peter. Your support means more than you know. Joe Joe Biden President of the United States P.S. I'm humbled beyond measure by the fact that this campaign is funded mostly by working people chipping in what they can, when they can through emails just like this one. Thousands of grassroots supporters chipped in last month to make sure Kamala and I can finish the job. Now, they're counting on you to make your first gift.

name: Nancy Mace
subject: Our process
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress
body:
My team and I have a follow-up meeting to discuss the budget next Friday at 12pm, so please help out before then. |
[ ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=ece4234f5c4b4a6d94cdeaff33684844&_e=VEDWuN5F7Itb9SkEpqyZvBh4P-C1lyDqyKdf7WtwmpuPLHDbozukqBs7GDj6kieshMfJpv-h3OFOB1m0cBJNtc_96ESh4lLkjPqtHj0QTbmD8UM3Ascqp215-iuPkswunfCsTywAFR42XIzN1lpe35bx_ZPA9ZL8mcjZ6zAkFu5FmEAaZLEA_Cr2b-Vxtn4e2TN97-UFzOvDbmXASC9JTCk2ElvMUYfwzkiu8h1MgR-t3ogG9V0dDpQr5h6yRxlrNFNk-suKF--PExGDbLG7rMUUS8K2GeGOHbuwGXiO4liOZwgfju8IXvHQlKWzCXQhM7fWk3_ZhLCjq5NTa0RDQINUCw4f7rABS3MN4DiX06HE0sLMaXSshsIZF_qrZneo)
---
Fellow American, Primary Day is days away and **unless I can raise an additional $9,428 before midnight, I’m not sure I’ll have the resources to win.** I’ve spent the entire afternoon reviewing the numbers with my finance team, and here’s the short of it:

1. A few years ago, this seat was Blue, **and we barely flipped** – meaning our race is a top target for Pelosi because she knows it’s a purple district.
2. We have a strong team on the ground, _and a big chunk of our fundraising budget goes towards buying pizza for volunteers, providing yard signs to folks, and keeping this campaign running._
3. When we miss our weekly goals, even by a couple of hundred bucks, **we have to pull back on all our campaigning efforts** – and we really can’t afford to backpedal with the election just _**a few**_ days away.

[** HELP NANCY ➞ **](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=ece4234f5c4b4a6d94cdeaff33684844&_e=VEDWuN5F7Itb9SkEpqyZvBh4P-C1lyDqyKdf7WtwmpuPLHDbozukqBs7GDj6kieshMfJpv-h3OFOB1m0cBJNtc_96ESh4lLkjPqtHj0QTbmD8UM3Ascqp215-iuPkswunfCsTywAFR42XIzN1lpe35bx_ZPA9ZL8mcjZ6zAkFu5FmEAaZLEA_Cr2b-Vxtn4e2TN97-UFzOvDbmXASC9JTCk2ElvMUYfwzkiu8h1MgR9fHVNwBE0_D8RbH8gYivvSx6FUJr0cZikV1VxhIfE77UweZlMleNDuTU25pJe30g50v_1ARgdvKZGLXvpoEA_UZQVqxzkXJBaaskpAzBLZjTOaniT8pzSpGx-gR3kph3hakM5paNif6PQc4dNBKnhD)
So, now you see why I had to reach out. I truly wouldn’t ask for your help if I didn’t need it, but your generous donation makes a huge impact in a race like mine.

I need 49 donors to step forward to help reach our goal this week, can I count on you?

body:
With today marking the first day of Gun Violence Awareness Month, will you make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC?
#

Friends -
June is Gun Violence Awareness Month—a month of reflection and action for our movement to end gun violence.
[**With today marking the first day of Gun Violence Awareness Month, will you make a $3 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC? Your support is what allows us to keep up our work towards a safer, better future in our nation.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-june24.gd3XnS&refcode=em240601-1-30&t=1&akid=8214%2E3935704%2E6K8lpq)

**_Make no mistake: gun violence is a public health crisis._**
Each day, over 120 people in our country die from gun violence. Gun violence is the number one cause of death for our children.
It doesn’t have to be this way. There are real, commonsense solutions that we fight for every day at GIFFORDS, including universal background checks, extreme risk protection orders (aka “red flag laws”), and safe storage requirements. We’re making real progress. But we have to keep fighting for a future where these measures are enacted nationwide, not just in a few states.
[**As we recognize Gun Violence Awareness Month, will you make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC to renew your commitment to our shared fight to end gun violence?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-june24.gd3XnS&refcode=em240601-1-30&t=4&akid=8214%2E3935704%2E6K8lpq)
Thank you. Our movement can only remain strong if we continue to work together.
\- The team at GIFFORDS
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-june24.gd3XnS&refcode=em240601-1-30&t=5&akid=8214%2E3935704%2E6K8lpq)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=8214%2E3935704%2E6K8lpq) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Team Casey
subject: We’re proud of this team

body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=3135%2E552475%2EE3G_Aw)
Peter,
We know you’ve heard from us a lot over the past week, so we wanted to say **_thank you._** With your help, we were able to hit our May end-of-month goal.
It’s thanks to grassroots supporters like you that Bob Casey is in the U.S. Senate fighting for working families across our Commonwealth, and we intend to keep it that way. With so much on the line, reaching every single goal matters — so we’re already looking ahead to June and the end of Q2 of 2024.
We have just over five months until Election Day. So with that in mind, if you’re ready to power our campaign all the way to victory, **[we’d appreciate a contribution of any amount today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240601-1?refcode=em20240601-1&refcode2=3135_552475_E3G_Aw&akid=3135%2E552475%2EE3G_Aw)**

With your support, we’ll keep Bob fighting for working families and protect PA’s Senate seat — **[and if you’re ready to get ahead on our June fundraising, we’ll put whatever you chip in right to work.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240601-1?refcode=em20240601-1&refcode2=3135_552475_E3G_Aw&akid=3135%2E552475%2EE3G_Aw)**

name: Team Gallego
subject: What we want :: What we have to do
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
We missed another goal. And this one really hurts, because we know this team worked really hard to get us over the top. After such a hard push we’d normally take a few days off, but these aren’t normal times.
#

Team, we pushed hard over the last few days. To everyone who chipped in, no matter the amount, we want to thank you. Ruben is extremely grateful.
But we’ve got bad news: We came up short of our goal last night.
We missed another goal. And this one really hurts, because we know this team worked really hard to get us over the top. After such a hard push we’d normally take a few days off, but these aren’t normal times.
Kari Lake is not taking time off. Donald Trump is not taking time off. The MAGA-right and their whole cabal — Steve Bannon, Roger Stone, Mike Flynn — are all working around the clock to stop us.
This is an official FEC deadline month, too. One of the last, official deadlines of the year.
So, while we’d like to take our foot off the gas, we can’t. We have to stay at it. We have to ask you, as respectfully as we can:

name: River Gassen
subject: River's Community Currents
body:
See where we’ve been these past two weeks | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/riverforcolorado/rivers-community-currents?e=3818d77efc)
---
| |
---
| |
#### 06/01/2024
Dear family and supporters, With the primary election fast approaching - I want to make sure that every voice is heard. So I’ve been out talking with community members, learning about the issues and priorities of our residence. See where we’ve been these past two weeks.
---
|
---
| | |
---
Military Resource Fair Learning about the unique issues faced by military members and their families.
|
---
The Colfax Marathon Promoting Health and wellness across Colorado
|
---
The Manitou Incline Inspiring the resilience of of our district
|
---
Celebrating The Air Force Academy Class of 2024 at the Boot Barn Hall Connecting with the community and our pride of our town being home to the world’s greatest Air Force.
| |
---
March for Childcare Learning about the resources and concerns of our youngest residence.
|
---
Progressive Vet’s Lunch Speaking to our veterans, and ensuring their voice in the progressive community.
|
---
Territory Day Celebrating the history of Old Colorado City, when it was the territory capital.
|
---
Our Fundraising Art Auction Supporting the campaign, and local artist.
| | | Celebrating Recent Endorsements Check out our updated list of endorsements, including our democratic candidate for Colorado’s 4th Judicial District, Jeremy Dowell, and the Vice Chair of the Teller County Democratic Party Wendy Dillenscheider.
---
|
---
|
---
| **More to Come** I am so excited for the next week! Catch me at the Pride Inside Out at the Hillside Community Center today or at The Manitou Springs Wine Festival. This week you’ll also see me at the all-Candidate Debate hosted by the Gazette, the State of the Utility at COSCityHub, Meet the Candidates Workplace Democracy, and of course the Pikes Peak Pride Parade.

Make sure to have our next fundraising event on your calendars too! Mix & Mingle with us at the Hero’s Hollow later this month.
---
|
---
|
---
|
#### We are in the fight for democracy and in the fight for the rights of our own bodies - but we need your help. Donate today!
---
|
---
Yard signs are coming very soon! Be one of the first to get one. Click the link below to sponsor a yard sign. Order now, and we will contact you when they arrive later this week. We’ll confirm your address via email or number, and a volunteer will come by to drop off your sign.
| [Pre-order yours today](https://rivergassenforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3a7f5669b9b38d0a59e26b798&id=b2a76ea4da&e=3818d77efc "Pre-order yours today")
---
|
---
| Final Thoughts of the Week
With the recent conviction of former President Trump, we have been able to see that no one is above the law. Not even the former president. But the real justice will come in November. It is up to us, the American voters, to decide who we are. With the conversations we have with each other in an effort to understand and close the gap of our divided nation, and with our votes in November, we the American people will decide not just who are leader is, but who we are, as a nation.
I urge us to reach across the aisle, in attempts to find understanding with each other. And give ourselves and our community a voice. When elected, I pledge to uphold democracy and the law. But it is up to all of us, to decide not just what kind of Democrats live in El Paso County, but what kind of community we are.
I trust in democracy. I also trust in our party. The democratic party is the party of understanding, empathy, and of learned experience. We must be willing to speak and trust that the strength of our party and our big tent principle, is our willingness to reach out and understand each other. Sincerely, River Gassen - Democratic Candidate for Colorado’s 5th Congressional District
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2024 River Gassen for Congress, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
River Gassen for Congress 4164 Austin Bluffs Pkwy #305 Colorado Springs, CO 80918 USA

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://rivergassenforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/profile?u=3a7f5669b9b38d0a59e26b798&id=f4fe63e921&e=3818d77efc&c=75807e99c0) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://rivergassenforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=3a7f5669b9b38d0a59e26b798&id=f4fe63e921&t=b&e=3818d77efc&c=75807e99c0).

---
| [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/riverforcolorado/rivers-community-currents?e=3818d77efc)
---

[](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=f21ac59f88d04100920a7be4be7d7c7f&_e=43QJHrNey6osaetnO_IH7R6v2AYYuEtb7QeXmERaLc8_qoyrd8D8RTO2GUPc-CQFPFL9FccNkzDhLfBixx15VJiZS9DJkAr149XHlZzyoXoRxNClQmk168MihyGKi3mYMfmAItl3kAlnqOGoUPqclJCiBIlEK2zuQTad-H9rwjykhxVWZNaZCEEQSr_L1JlE_XWTteLUJUwZ3mOaLJf5RaUgAMD0O6WHx5yCkfDg5B2ENIJHFF5ECyQTeGgivBx4RzukFWDsv72z22hotesYZPiOl66rH3IjS53cZdn6dRnLZ9NNBux3q4mMYyFcwriaLkz8OHXvEnl6tWhdIev5DNEvnw58yU0RsJxxGmzKLp2XCkX_Icm-kJ5YltuS5nu-)

name: Tony Wied
subject: RE: Trump GUILTY Verdict
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Wied for Congress
body:
This verdict is a sham - I stand with Trump.

|
---
Patriot,

The SHAM verdict against President Trump is a DISGRACE to our country. This is a complete weaponization of the Justice System by Crooked Joe Biden.

This trial has been rigged from the beginning. Democrat Judge. Democrat prosecutors. Democrat jurors.

**_Fortunately, they don't decide the next election; we the people do._**

**I stand with President Trump. I always have and always will. I am honored to have his endorsement in this race.**

name: Andrew Yang
subject: The Trump Conviction
body:
| |
---
| | |
---
| [ ](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=417076ec07&e=0f227c2ae3)
---
| Trump was convicted of falsifying business records to cover up a payment to his former mistress this week in New York. It makes him the first former President or major presidential candidate to be a convicted felon.

---
|
---
|
I’ve been ambivalent about the charges brought against Trump. I think that they helped fuel his dominance in the Republican primaries and ensure that he remains the center of attention at all times. The New York case rested on something of an aggressive application of legal theory. People who think that he is being treated differently because he’s Donald Trump have a point.

On the other hand, I think he did do the things he’s accused of. I prefer accountability. And I’m someone who thinks he would be a catastrophe as President for a second term, so if his legal troubles reduce the chances of his victory that doesn't upset me.

This brings us to the heart of the matter – what does this mean and what happens next? His supporters have rushed to his side, sending $34 million in new donations, 30% from new donors. The judge will deliver sentencing in July, which will be immediately appealed. Some voters on the fence who dislike Biden will find it unpalatable to vote for a convicted felon. It’s hard to imagine this being a good thing for Trump in a race that will be decided at the margins.

It’s doubtful that Trump will see jail time, as the sentence might not include it and it will be appealed. Trump’s other trials have already been delayed until next year.

Prior to the verdict, I thought that Trump had an advantage in November based on the polling and the fact that Biden’s path to victory has narrowed to needing to win Michigan, Pennsylvania and Wisconsin, each of which is neck-and-neck. Now, I think the race has closed as some independents will be reminded of what they disliked about Trump four years ago, much of which has faded from memory.

Those who think that this verdict signals the end to Trump’s presidential bid will be disappointed though. In this era, everything becomes normalized quickly. And though it may be unthinkable to some that Trump could resume occupying the Oval Office as a convicted felon, it remains, in my mind, more likely than not. Our institutions aren’t going to save us from Trump. If he doesn’t win in November, it’s going to be because we saved ourselves.

---
| **
Andrew Yang**
Co-Chair, Forward Party
[forwardparty.com](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=510fc7b467&e=0f227c2ae3)
[andrewyang.com](https://yangspeaks.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7448319cdb745ea2fd1b1b8a8&id=f5a6534a4f&e=0f227c2ae3)

That's me and my brother Alex. We were born in Ukraine to a Jewish family during the height of the Cold War.
As little kids, we could have NEVER imagined one of us would be in a position to hear the President of the United States (Trump) attempt to extort our ally, Ukraine, unless it investigated his political rival.
Our values, our decades of service to our nation, and our obligation to perform our duty prepared us for the kind of courage it takes to report that call — even if it meant the end of our military careers.
Now I am running for Congress, and I want you to know that you can always count on me to have the courage to do what's right for the people of Virginia, and this country — even if it's not the easy thing to do.
The truth is, this is a fast-paced race. Early voting has already begun in Virginia.
And while my name is on the ballot, this is not something I can do alone. It takes a team, and right now our top priority is securing the resources it takes to win.

Our values, our decades of service to our nation, and our obligation to perform our duty prepared us for the kind of courage it takes to report that call — even if it meant the end of our military careers. Now I am running for Congress, and I want you to know that you can always count on me to have the courage to do what's right for the people of Virginia, and this country — even if it's not the easy thing to do. The truth is, this is a fast-paced race. Early voting has already begun in Virginia. And while my name is on the ballot, this is not something I can do alone. It takes a team, and right now our top priority is securing the resources it takes to win. So I am asking: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Eugene Vindman and Adam Frisch will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you in advance for your continued support. It means the world to me. Eugene Vindman ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Adam for Colorado PO Box 1240 Glenwood Springs, CO 81602 United States Contributions or gifts to Adam for Colorado are not tax deductible.

body:
I don't get to say this enough.
| | |

Hi friend, I’m reaching out to simply say thank you.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86076550/476767665/691330008?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk1931-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDMyODA0ZC0yODIwLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hoXqoUzFcBP866LYHRMPMxfJbC4vEIgOBGheZ49ZSPI=)

Peter,

_**[Will you endorse me before my primary on Tuesday?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c97e35e17d7c417eb27ad4a0c4521ff0&_e=pcCTE0fPbjFOYz1OA4eXe7mz5UfEtzDBewsjJ4eVf-OQFi0Ij3mGY7oPx0YgkajigHYd40Z_mK-Wne5y_UBG-sERcTi_1KQj5FmouiqzPfq8u6Xtzk3VRtT1V33r-SmCcCZC7LgbIQQfU2XcLLpegzaL9tcs4Ca6lA-AMK1ihpO_kLW4wvGLIZbdl3WisI77HFy0nAKOJneEZUeMORDyFjcq2QoBJNuS0R-V8eAnL6rsycj90OWb9umzAwt3FblnLLTTfMWCTYNXoDJOl7dMy8-W3bJP9KrC5cGudtFqFyoq2wR7vMShXv5S9JRAD71yPEsivzybC1_B8Lko3YHeNVwkuhqwDzRvRy7XHgdFycWDr5iH1_Ppd_o7BxENTstlNzRj7Y3JYO34GUv6qTvTBrJBAELw3Y5G4wlh1ZoWgLjeAGigL0b_huHoqGpNkUwj7hwZfaC14pEflG6JJYtUPnqmMDjQlfGhvNYmotLabVAQNgj56RTs1rV73cbjJtpcZeYtetRujebCIkXr9M02sQ%3D%3D)**_

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c97e35e17d7c417eb27ad4a0c4521ff0&_e=pcCTE0fPbjFOYz1OA4eXe7mz5UfEtzDBewsjJ4eVf-OQFi0Ij3mGY7oPx0YgkajigHYd40Z_mK-Wne5y_UBG-sERcTi_1KQj5FmouiqzPfq8u6Xtzk3VRtT1V33r-SmCcCZC7LgbIQQfU2XcLLpegzaL9tcs4Ca6lA-AMK1ihpO_kLW4wvGLIZbdl3WisI77HFy0nAKOJneEZUeMORDyFjcq2QoBJNuS0R-V8eAnL6rsycj90OWb9umzAwt3FblnLLTTfMWCTYNXoDJOl7dMy8-W3bJP9KrC5cGudtFqFyoq2wR7vMShXv5S9JRAD71yPEsivzybC1_B8Lko3YHeNVwkuhqwDzRvRy7XHgdFycWDr5iH1_Ppd_o7BxENTstlAKJmQX6abVKBPBtG0r0vMc_wHQO8TQcnYPK0W_DV59L1rvRbabXX-BWjHM1OdKL_dkS4P-8rQ0yw4iAbKOwlhK2v6AvmBH6IeX8RnTqlhC57Y_YGXu4RDrCHy5y6sfTKHGWpRAngp0NBaM-Apy-YEw%3D%3D)
**As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle.** Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams.

My name is Tim Sheehy, Republican candidate for U.S. Senate from Montana. I’m a former U.S. Navy SEAL and a 2008 Naval Academy graduate. Right now, I'm the only person standing in the way of Chuck Schumer and his Senate majority.

_**My primary is THIS Tuesday, March 4th, and I'm hoping to secure the endorsements of 10,000 conservatives before voters head to the polls. **_

**[I'm reaching out today to make the case that I'm worth your personal endorsement](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c97e35e17d7c417eb27ad4a0c4521ff0&_e=pcCTE0fPbjFOYz1OA4eXe7mz5UfEtzDBewsjJ4eVf-OQFi0Ij3mGY7oPx0YgkajigHYd40Z_mK-Wne5y_UBG-sERcTi_1KQj5FmouiqzPfq8u6Xtzk3VRtT1V33r-SmCcCZC7LgbIQQfU2XcLLpegzaL9tcs4Ca6lA-AMK1ihpO_kLW4wvGLIZbdl3WisI77HFy0nAKOJneEZUeMORDyFjcq2QoBJNuS0R-V8eAnL6rsycj90OWb9umzAwt3FblnLLTTfMWCTYNXoDJOl7dMy8-W3bJP9KrC5cGudtFqFyoq2wR7vMShXv5S9JRAD71yPEsivzybC1_B8Lko3YHeNVwkuhqwDzRvRy7XHgdFycWDr5iH1_Ppd_o7BxENTstlr6eKKl4TopP72Fxc_6yLaudpU-ZZN_aeaFgI_3vR8b-_NB8TjsFS6SQ8R2d34kJkvqMOWAmn3kj9LE-3nR_8o45t85Zy_IMikf7oAFqNUzrJcibe4-W1ect00S3Zu4lNPMSFIKt22rNJhUdZHRgb1A%3D%3D)**.

[**ENDORSE FMR. SEAL TIM SHEEHY TODAY** ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c97e35e17d7c417eb27ad4a0c4521ff0&_e=pcCTE0fPbjFOYz1OA4eXe7mz5UfEtzDBewsjJ4eVf-OQFi0Ij3mGY7oPx0YgkajigHYd40Z_mK-Wne5y_UBG-sERcTi_1KQj5FmouiqzPfq8u6Xtzk3VRtT1V33r-SmCcCZC7LgbIQQfU2XcLLpegzaL9tcs4Ca6lA-AMK1ihpO_kLW4wvGLIZbdl3WisI77HFy0nAKOJneEZUeMORDyFjcq2QoBJNuS0R-V8eAnL6rsycj90OWb9umzAwt3FblnLLTTfMWCTYNXoDJOl7dMy8-W3bJP9KrC5cGudtFqFyoq2wR7vMShXv5S9JRAD71yPEsivzybC1_B8Lko3YHeNVwkuhqwDzRvRy7XHgdFycWDr5iH1_Ppd_o7BxENTstlgWH79cf3a0vMK5pWiqMQH0o6zVadJQo85N00iEZSfl8aoeCIinlVbJ1N1w9OxqwfJsxy0Lge_2dzdetG-nTGEYuRNMLduj_F5ajmGA2XrlWCGoAQxOiC6PXNmODDFRGMTIB_fNXzxJiGF7zyqyOMEQ%3D%3D)

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c97e35e17d7c417eb27ad4a0c4521ff0&_e=pcCTE0fPbjFOYz1OA4eXe7mz5UfEtzDBewsjJ4eVf-OQFi0Ij3mGY7oPx0YgkajigHYd40Z_mK-Wne5y_UBG-sERcTi_1KQj5FmouiqzPfq8u6Xtzk3VRtT1V33r-SmCcCZC7LgbIQQfU2XcLLpegzaL9tcs4Ca6lA-AMK1ihpO_kLW4wvGLIZbdl3WisI77HFy0nAKOJneEZUeMORDyFjcq2QoBJNuS0R-V8eAnL6rsycj90OWb9umzAwt3FblnLLTTfMWCTYNXoDJOl7dMy8-W3bJP9KrC5cGudtFqFyoq2wR7vMShXv5S9JRAD71yPEsivzybC1_B8Lko3YHeNVwkuhqwDzRvRy7XHgdFycWDr5iH1_Ppd_o7BxENTstlnZe2zg1aF6b86I66XHyirBUKbh1zmrFiY27yVI3z0B8-Y3hF3HyWqEO_ce0jTa8h5SVGhOM5n2TUVd_TpD5oe5Psy3qp7QWUJhanI0AMlvzFv_t0VrPSIatN1_RKbX5o5b7PKRps9fXJLfqGboo_zA%3D%3D)
In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [**many veterans like me**] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally **sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport** so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead.

Unlike Joe Biden, I understand what it is to serve our country. _**Not service in politics, but on the battlefield.**_ I’ve been wounded in service of our nation; I’ve lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free.

clean_body: My primary is this Tuesday and I'm still hoping to secure your endorsement ahead of the vote | Peter, As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle. Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams. My name is Tim Sheehy, Republican candidate for U.S. Senate from Montana. I’m a former U.S. Navy SEAL and a 2008 Naval Academy graduate. Right now, I'm the only person standing in the way of Chuck Schumer and his Senate majority. My primary is THIS Tuesday, March 4th, and I'm hoping to secure the endorsements of 10,000 conservatives before voters head to the polls. . In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [many veterans like me] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead. Unlike Joe Biden, I understand what it is to serve our country. Not service in politics, but on the battlefield. I’ve been wounded in service of our nation; I’ve lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free. Chuck Schumer and Washington Democrats know that I pose a direct threat to their chances of holding on to power, and they'll do anything to stop me from winning this race - and spend $100M plus in the process. Peter, I am under no illusions that you will support my campaign the first time you hear from me. But my life experiences have taught me that anything worth having requires working tirelessly, breaking down walls, and moving mountains to get it. I hope you will allow me to earn your support today by reading my entire message - I promise, it’s worth the read. In the Navy, finding yourself between a rock and a hard place is easy. This rings especially true for the individuals who have earned the honor of serving in the elite task force that is the Navy SEALs, a group of highly trained combat warriors – a brotherhood – in which I earned a spot following my graduation from the United States Naval Academy at Annapolis. Being a SEAL isn’t a one-man job; it takes teamwork, problem-solving, and coming to a consensus. When you’re on missions in the harshest environments known to man, you must act as a unit and recognize you’re only as strong as the weakest among you. I’ve deployed to Iraq, Afghanistan, South America, and the Pacific during my time as a SEAL, and I have been involved in dozens of engagements with enemy forces and survived to tell the tales. And believe me, there are some tales. I’ve seen the world’s dangers and stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism. I know the strength it takes to stand up and fight for what is right – which is why Our homeland is in danger. Radical Democrats in Washington want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. This FAR-LEFT liberal agenda is assaulting our society, communities, and the American Dream. The Democrats’ grip on power is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to flip the Senate next year is to nominate a strong conservative candidate who can defeat my liberal Democrat opponent in 2024. Over the days and weeks ahead, you’ll receive emails from me and my team as we build our campaign. While I don’t want you to feel obligated to interact with each piece of content you receive in your inbox, I kindly ask you to refrain from unsubscribing from our contact list. The only way to flip the Senate next year is to nominate a strong Republican candidate who can defeat a Democrat in the General Election. *If we fail to flip this Montana seat RED next November, we lose our best chance at a Senate Majority for the next DECADE due to the election map at play. This is my most critical mission to date, and Thank you, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." * | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA | Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

subject: Working through the numbers

body:
My team and I have a follow-up meeting to discuss the budget next Friday at 12pm, so please help out before then. |
[ ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=68db566ee0fb42f8b3c2f8e4a3ac3d0a&_e=aC6gv2cqSCHJUN0VFqFezf-G9iO1cwluaXHxnZUrEMsD8kDPo2f9SMyhigY6FQRwtUkwerBVFlFz4BgCNsg3qIZx8c3FhjPWyYF009t2FqI2f8akrRoXw-RoCXI7MlJpkQ2oS0IZOZXlkaGpSr4LPVZQpN_b_94iv3tZUQTE6CRU6OmWbtKU1obkwQi9N8HCVux3VuWCA94Sb9PfNC1mRU8oVx38_nC9lo0VmBnArzRe67Zn9f4xeHX_gRTiLAXqzer2wUuSaj9Dp4s_bKhcoMMOur5T1mth27IkTs2zfodOiuuD9SGhBsH98wVuTME_VWhnoSb1kL6FWlRTsITL2Y3m52jQuM_qwlpcfCFSYft7agnMMpUUxdnFNLt8XI0Fgi9I20eVUNRez9MLJ-i_JA%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American, Primary Day is days away and **unless I can raise an additional $9,428 before midnight, I’m not sure I’ll have the resources to win.** I’ve spent the entire afternoon reviewing the numbers with my finance team, and here’s the short of it:

1. A few years ago, this seat was Blue, **and we barely flipped** – meaning our race is a top target for Pelosi because she knows it’s a purple district.
2. We have a strong team on the ground, _and a big chunk of our fundraising budget goes towards buying pizza for volunteers, providing yard signs to folks, and keeping this campaign running._
3. When we miss our weekly goals, even by a couple of hundred bucks, **we have to pull back on all our campaigning efforts** – and we really can’t afford to backpedal with the election just _**a few**_ days away.

# About Nancy
---
Congresswoman Nancy Mace grew up in the Lowcountry. She is the daughter of a retired Army General and retired school teacher. She is a proud mother of two, the first female to graduate from The Citadel's Corps of Cadets, and a tough conservative who wants to save our country from the radicals who hate America! In 2020, she took SC-01 back from the Democrats and now, is fighting tooth and nail to keep it Red. [**JOIN NANCY**](go.txting.io/mEWDMy)

Peter — Pride began as a riot in the early hours of June 28, 1969, when brave individuals at the Stonewall Inn in New York City stood up against oppression, igniting the spark of the modern LGBTQIA+ rights movement. That’s why this month is not only about celebrating the progress we’ve made and the courageous people who fought to make it happen, it’s about committing to the work we’ve left to do. [In honor of Pride Month, we’re calling on Congress to pass the Equality Act. Will you add your name and join us?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86077964/476771849/239499412?refcode=AU_AHC_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20240601_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWNkOTRhY2EtMmIyMC1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IQkV3goPJwjK3N7czCZ3SSlZYUVrPwFmIE6_kew1OPQ=&emci=f538143b-661f-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=5cd94aca-2b20-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=13520922) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86077966/476771851/239499412?refcode=AU_AHC_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20240601_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWNkOTRhY2EtMmIyMC1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IQkV3goPJwjK3N7czCZ3SSlZYUVrPwFmIE6_kew1OPQ=&emci=f538143b-661f-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=5cd94aca-2b20-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=13520922)

Andrei’s extremist opponent David Schweikert has one of the worst records in the country fighting against equality.
He has sponsored an amendment to the Constitution to make same-sex marriage illegal. Just days after the Pulse Nightclub shooting, he posted a photo mocking transgender people. And he has repeatedly used homophobic campaign tactics to scare voters and scar our community.
**Andrei believes hate has no place in Arizona, or America for that matter — and as AZ-01’s next Congressman, he’ll fight to end the discrimination and attacks that LGBTQIA+ Arizonans face.**
[But Andrei needs your help to defeat an extremist who promotes hatred and division, so if you’re able, we hope you’ll consider pitching in to this grassroots campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86077968/476771853/-1561725702?refcode=AU_AHC_EG_GEN_GEN_AC_20240601_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWNkOTRhY2EtMmIyMC1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IQkV3goPJwjK3N7czCZ3SSlZYUVrPwFmIE6_kew1OPQ=)

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86078029/476772050/1433120897?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzQyOWRlZS0yYjIwLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1zATqHtGwmX1SLiYdQur3f_ZfNS0f8_T-1UWt1T7NO4=) I’ve said this a lot, and I’m going to keep saying it: our race for Congress here in Michigan is one of the most consequential and most competitive in the entire country. And the past month is proof. My MAGA GOP opponent started flooding the airwaves with TV ads. The biggest Super PAC for House Republicans announced they’re going to spend more than $2 million on ads against me. And the Democratic Party officially named our race one of the most important races in the battle to take back the House! At every turn, this coalition has stepped up, and I couldn’t be more grateful. Thanks to you, we hit our May fundraising goal and are on track to launch our own ads, build our ground game and make sure every voter knows what’s at stake in this election. Together, I know we can ensure working families have a voice in Congress, and I know we can win this race. Thank you so much for your continued support. Onward,
KMR

---

clean_body: = I’ve said this a lot, and I’m going to keep saying it: our race for Congress here in Michigan is one of the most consequential and most competitive in the entire country. And the past month is proof. My MAGA GOP opponent started flooding the airwaves with TV ads. The biggest Super PAC for House Republicans announced they’re going to spend more than $2 million on ads against me. And the Democratic Party officially named our race one of the most important races in the battle to take back the House! At every turn, this coalition has stepped up, and I couldn’t be more grateful. Thanks to you, we hit our May fundraising goal and are on track to launch our own ads, build our ground game and make sure every voter knows what’s at stake in this election. Together, I know we can ensure working families have a voice in Congress, and I know we can win this race. Thank you so much for your continued support. Onward, KMR | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. Fellow American,

Writing this email pains me. I hate being forced to rely on the generosity of my constituents and donors to get my job done. But I figured you needed to know this...

**[Last night, my campaign came up short. We're behind by $2,638. ](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=37a0d1ddca6c455191247601b67814fd&_e=ONU52z3-n_w7YQk0n8xhi6Ur0-m5XV9H3eGhfpXUjFlJQyAtEglk9ZdB7pj19Sy4B_przngsXMsSGC_-qe2x8tiRrjkNKtrMUeIKTkXoEHjeEzDSz4HAVywsyxa4ft6mGb_1Oxci6ZCoWzELcDbkqpnCHHrPK1dfHhlBa4WUqtK8pqX9OfxbNEQV5BeqJl8mdyS1oUJf3TZbnqU-fAe00uisdHLgAXmN7aFQrBYDqCNcqaAcDx1D5adxbvrpmdf93cXsvodi6wavmCgPyqVNkJ16NDkYGYOpw93ZGQHaoOnG2wGW0i8oW9zAT_6f9G82NwZnrxieOubv9LcJ3hHRvQ%3D%3D)**

name: Juanita at United We Dream Action
subject: jeopardy
body:
In just a couple weeks, the DACA program will turn 12 years old. | | | Peter, in just a couple of weeks, **the DACA program will turn 12 years old.** Back in June 2012, immigrant youth fought like hell to win DACA — a life-saving program that has opened doors to better paying jobs, educational opportunities, and temporary protections from deportation for some undocumented people. But even after 12 years, DACA is _still_ at risk of being overturned in the courts. Our elected officials haven't done anything to fully and permanently protect immigrant people, instead giving credence to more anti-immigrant attacks. **And the protections immigrant youth fought so hard for 12 years ago are in jeopardy.** That’s why we’re taking action around this anniversary. After 12 years of DACA, we’re hosting a week of action to mobilize immigrant youth, activists, and allies around the country to demand more than just band-aid solutions. We’ll be gathering in DC to hold a press conference and apply pressure on Congress to deliver. **But we can’t do it without you.** We’re setting a grassroots fundraising goal of raising **$12,000** leading up to the **12th anniversary** to help lift up our critical work advocating for permanent protections for all 11 million people living under the fear of detention and deportation. **[Will you help us reach our goal and renew our fight for permanent protections before DACA’s 12-year anniversary by chipping in $12 (or more!) today?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6GKGRKiD2A9cpAeztYplruRs2Z9-06-LBQzB15DMQngk8vIFT3sKGAgmcB0zsduocthl0yYg7rl9dB-q_mSFV8BDDch1oJX4A_y2blTrhJn5lqOP3rVi_vhq0QH2nFb78aDdAs4o5l8wYalGvIdVM8tze6ctA-exzhWYAEzqz7CGbDiZBKddRK8pfBpEThlnhjhwtK42jDvRJZjz8hOlCm3Bh_DessO9z6naAW2qNqus7-SUxO6SAyZl_NV1R-Z4yn6cdacVnXgntZBZiyhDY1SO4B_KaYr5nYL43tgSaSb1-f4E9x9FPOCr0EZ8NynLIxwZGOmqcgt-sOVRIe80Gz2hAfBkW6_HrZK6s1PbQBWKEEFMwHfSejKuJ0eYNRTI/46u/hNI0_c6qSGaBt4Wsp83JiQ/h0/h001._W9kB92UwEeWrMgkrUbL06XSSnUA_5P--FkX-FjVrRM)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $12](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6GKGRKiD2A9cpAeztYplruRs2Z9-06-LBQzB15DMQngk8vIFT3sKGAgmcB0zsduocthl0yYg7rl9dB-q_mSFV8BDDch1oJX4A_y2blTrhJh3aYSxFQypsKETe3rMODxbbEhYQytZCxzdbU-zqBmFmT577HEU1nDLi476HgKvwP3JVTyhYr5a3M8tJgeWhGNOoD4-735eRbPHAM5a7niMklqzrDflwy31a_AG4z7agMu0RTq0cBr5SkaU_5CfSkhF93UP8U16qtgDrl0N0c-NnZxtqjf7QUhXniiDU9icUzEEH32kte2nNHNnYmwuzPMlU27Bw9UHHhAhfuSPgyT6omcWLGDumlDZjgTu7mjfnxT-y5F-nLQfvtYIWRUi-dOCzav3oVL5h3FZaiOKGFJSUTQJcF7AMXo2I_mBv-2MXsg/46u/hNI0_c6qSGaBt4Wsp83JiQ/h1/h001.spAMS2lTqAPTppHcaTmb5w5NLNgvyzt1GpZ-AtXoPPo)

When Judge Hanen first struck down the DACA program and closed the program to new applicants, we immediately went on the offense to support DACA recipients. We launched a full-scale effort to challenge the anti-immigrant decision, ensure that applicants knew their rights, and demand that our elected officials do better than band-aid solutions like DACA.
**Now, nearly three years later, our fight is likely headed back to the Supreme Court. That’s the story of DACA, ever since its inception — immigrant youth and allies responding to unrelenting attacks and fighting for our livelihoods.**
We don’t know what the future holds for the program that has been a lifeline for so many undocumented people, but that won’t stop us from demanding more from the elected officials who promised to protect immigrant communities.
A better future with permanent protections for all 11 million is possible, but not without your support, Peter.
**[Will you make a donation to help us reach our $12,000 goal before the 12th anniversary of DACA? Any amount you’re able to contribute will help us keep up the fight for permanent protections at a time when it’s never been more important.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6GKGRKiD2A9cpAeztYplruRs2Z9-06-LBQzB15DMQngk8vIFT3sKGAgmcB0zsduocthl0yYg7rl9dB-q_mSFV8BDDch1oJX4A_y2blTrhJn5lqOP3rVi_vhq0QH2nFb4bqzlvpJbFHL0GsckZAB51_50gjbQwxX68UbOxMdt9BKeoiIwFr4B4jui5NUW8UCxErKSqaWZK-33v8PJVXL3YxNgJNNCJg8QBZKAxYBUE85z5_FZmWhGaM8vyfIQEK5RPA65YzAvS2ZbLql0gDIrsp0GuNgnU1gpqs7ejPKTUoxQn4Bg80CyxmPUjmvvYkSG_0RvDkWFxImtQG88BStGN8DubwAD_P16Ejm_SP16Mm7BOMG-US3XcUsvI59gzuas/46u/hNI0_c6qSGaBt4Wsp83JiQ/h7/h001.2Vo4LwgNN0vZ6WAWFqfPDHu5Kc72mUIIgbzvD2RXCrg)**

clean_body: In just a couple weeks, the DACA program will turn 12 years old. | | | Peter, in just a couple of weeks, the DACA program will turn 12 years old. Back in June 2012, immigrant youth fought like hell to win DACA — a life-saving program that has opened doors to better paying jobs, educational opportunities, and temporary protections from deportation for some undocumented people. But even after 12 years, DACA is still at risk of being overturned in the courts. Our elected officials haven't done anything to fully and permanently protect immigrant people, instead giving credence to more anti-immigrant attacks. And the protections immigrant youth fought so hard for 12 years ago are in jeopardy. That’s why we’re taking action around this anniversary. After 12 years of DACA, we’re hosting a week of action to mobilize immigrant youth, activists, and allies around the country to demand more than just band-aid solutions. We’ll be gathering in DC to hold a press conference and apply pressure on Congress to deliver. But we can’t do it without you. We’re setting a grassroots fundraising goal of raising $12,000 leading up to the 12th anniversary to help lift up our critical work advocating for permanent protections for all 11 million people living under the fear of detention and deportation. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | When Judge Hanen first struck down the DACA program and closed the program to new applicants, we immediately went on the offense to support DACA recipients. We launched a full-scale effort to challenge the anti-immigrant decision, ensure that applicants knew their rights, and demand that our elected officials do better than band-aid solutions like DACA. Now, nearly three years later, our fight is likely headed back to the Supreme Court. That’s the story of DACA, ever since its inception — immigrant youth and allies responding to unrelenting attacks and fighting for our livelihoods. We don’t know what the future holds for the program that has been a lifeline for so many undocumented people, but that won’t stop us from demanding more from the elected officials who promised to protect immigrant communities. A better future with permanent protections for all 11 million is possible, but not without your support, Peter. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | ** Thank you for helping us push for change, Juanita, United We Dream Action | Our most dedicated supporters are chipping in monthly to sustain our fight to secure a pathway to citizenship. Join them and help us win permanent protections in Congress by starting a recurring donation today:** | |

Peter,

Thanks to your incredible support, we hit our May fundraising goal. Your dedication and generosity are the driving forces behind our mission to DEFEAT Republicans and protect our democracy.

**Thank you!**

Every dollar you contributed has been crucial in our fight against the GOP’s dangerous agenda. With your help, we’ve been able to push back against their relentless attacks on our rights, our values, and our future.

name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: Trump has raised $50 million. Help us fight back.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
Last night, Donald Trump announced he had raised more than $50 million for his campaign since his conviction -- a number that will continue to rise. | |
---
🇺🇸 To All Democrats, please do not click away from this important message. ☀️ Last night, Donald Trump announced he had raised more than $50 million for his campaign since his conviction -- a number that will continue to rise.
That's money that will be used not just to try to defeat Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, but to lift up extreme MAGA Republican candidates running at all levels across the country. So we're asking you to donate to the DNC to help us fight back.
If everyone reading this donated $7 today, we would have the resources to fight back and make sure Democrats have what they need to win. Unfortunately, many people will look away from this message. That is why President Biden and Democrats everywhere are hoping you'll step up.
If defeating Trump, electing a Democratic House and Senate, and supporting Democrats running for office everywhere seems worth $7 to you, we're asking you to take a minute to secure the future of this election by making a donation. Thank you. [Please make a donation to the DNC today. Our average online donation is around $30. Many donors give more. Some give less. All that matters is that you are choosing to stand up to Trump and to stand with Democrats today.](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvpOShxPWr9mFhJMw1S-wTtvhltHWfNwNtDIaYBJbNv2OiYGsvOb7Ojyb0iUS8Qi3RKCKw9LgOhA0N1aPgtH-rL_k5gL9bQ6LpTcgRTzzOiDLJmxZea7SERhS1gNrspS5bPTPs66n8uW45W7oeP8pUmEIERHKk6nlFWfDQt-nbdwdSnCFjeqbxNv6OtHFA1YVTzthEPNGU4WQTWmvGyCNunWuNHEswqYyHraHRSi59afWHRdBDLReU0qEhJ8w_JDQAQS56_6yShknzrjkWBra4CpeOwW8WBW-vHDUo31Hs-7H9CvoK1f4M2mUnv3hcmnI52G2MgAyNsFa0MHwOPhuPha_F9TPrVaKF_DZA-Z0YACYgVHgqQxTW80H1oL-y3ysbCpBncTT9UsXcd0n60OYNBUp9SlF5SCuu5z7uLa8OdtA/46u/D-o4YdSAQo2168IWIjpBhw/h0/h001.0gRD850LcYPe2HBuT2rKwWq7IHlhS01KKSJiZ9YHyUA)

clean_body: Last night, Donald Trump announced he had raised more than $50 million for his campaign since his conviction -- a number that will continue to rise. | | 🇺🇸 To All Democrats, please do not click away from this important message. ☀️ Last night, Donald Trump announced he had raised more than $50 million for his campaign since his conviction -- a number that will continue to rise. That's money that will be used not just to try to defeat Joe Biden and Kamala Harris, but to lift up extreme MAGA Republican candidates running at all levels across the country. So we're asking you to donate to the DNC to help us fight back. If everyone reading this donated $7 today, we would have the resources to fight back and make sure Democrats have what they need to win. Unfortunately, many people will look away from this message. That is why President Biden and Democrats everywhere are hoping you'll step up. If defeating Trump, electing a Democratic House and Senate, and supporting Democrats running for office everywhere seems worth $7 to you, we're asking you to take a minute to secure the future of this election by making a donation. Thank you. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | ---|--- | | We're asking, humbly, don't click away. name: Jesse James Mullen
subject: A Great May and a Prideful June
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mullen for Secretary of State
body:
Friends – I want to wish all members of the LGBTQ+ community a Happy Pride Month! Pride Month commemorates the Stonewall Riots of June 1969, a pivotal moment in history when members of the community in New York City stood up against police brutality and discrimination at the Stonewall Inn. This uprising sparked a global movement for LGBTQ+ rights, paving the way for progress and visibility. | | | [](http://links.mullenformontana.com/u/click?_t=96962950e68f455895e83c6431fce0d7&_m=d6a2cb06e2ad4f47937496baa225fdd6&_e=vakdKaKl7GgvQLoOvZ58XD8INuQg9TjYEh8nkZO--MGhPKV_lnhbCAN4aEjNJvyroJy78Qr-0Ahh4ffy51i4_yK1G1MwEEzbYtF14_rKBHAz4Gs17-PGW3gUobXaVUQ3qx6-LTp3G50AoInedhQZPNzsEZUnB87cvyOE54tLk_N-TeM0Ciw-yLHrk86oMgeObvIpais1yUC4kmaE2WNXgnDn06ERX-mCfja7ndIwnjv4P7F_5bn7_GjpjO6Uf8A_j1poslgnhe7amoClmj6SMs_GY187EOo978SN26cX1yjTiZG7dl-YMChIHLMdKvm63lT8HfLbRQOEN6fFdCebr_2TrjVNsSOKTzFXJOeKfEXWPPutudAW355KMgQEmk76km-UbDKydIKC6RLAhBeiqQ%3D%3D) Friends – I want to wish all members of the LGBTQ+ community a Happy Pride Month! Pride Month commemorates the Stonewall Riots of June 1969, a pivotal moment in history when members of the community in New York City stood up against police brutality and discrimination at the Stonewall Inn. This uprising sparked a global movement for LGBTQ+ rights, paving the way for progress and visibility. While we celebrate the Pride Movement’s recent successes, please take a moment to reflect on the sacrifices that brought us here and the work that remains. Even in places like Montana, where the LGBTQ+ community may face unique challenges, Pride remains a beacon of hope and solidarity. From small towns to big cities, Pride events bring people together, fostering a sense of belonging and empowerment. I stand with the LGBTQ+ community today and every day, and I will always fight for the freedom of people to love who they love 🏳️🌈 I also want to thank you all for being a part of this campaign. May was an incredible month, and it’s because of the supporters like you. Over the last few months, we’ve really built up our momentum. We’ve brought in more donations than I thought possible, and we’re gaining ground in the race to boot Montana’s far-right extremist Secretary of State. Montanans are ready for a Secretary of State who knows the struggles of small business owners and who values the sanctity of our free and fair elections. We can win this thing, and when we do, it’ll be because you stepped up and got involved. So, thank you. Thank you all for being a part of our campaign. – Jesse James Mullen [](http://links.mullenformontana.com/u/click?_t=96962950e68f455895e83c6431fce0d7&_m=d6a2cb06e2ad4f47937496baa225fdd6&_e=vakdKaKl7GgvQLoOvZ58XD8INuQg9TjYEh8nkZO--MGhPKV_lnhbCAN4aEjNJvyroJy78Qr-0Ahh4ffy51i4_yK1G1MwEEzbYtF14_rKBHAz4Gs17-PGW3gUobXaVUQ3qx6-LTp3G50AoInedhQZPNzsEZUnB87cvyOE54tLk_N-TeM0Ciw-yLHrk86oMgeObvIpais1yUC4kmaE2WNXgnDn06ERX-mCfja7ndIwnjv4P7F_5bn7_GjpjO6Uf8A_50mzh0IekTEP-nk4AUkwuTxqU1RspKnZgPSVZXUpr9JaQ5e4J1kEIt2lnFjKcOrqo9ui-B86bFUakVlZ0Aetz1tMDDti9yiTUcZ9y_yNz45lOVOJ4fHwDTG4DduVL9zkvccMSvKkFi45sAYJqLUXyA%3D%3D) Montana needs your help to defeat the Far Right and protect our values of caring, community, and free and fair Elections. Your donation will protect election integrity, public land access and build a friendlier secretary of state office for Montanans! [DONATE](http://links.mullenformontana.com/u/click?_t=96962950e68f455895e83c6431fce0d7&_m=d6a2cb06e2ad4f47937496baa225fdd6&_e=vakdKaKl7GgvQLoOvZ58XD8INuQg9TjYEh8nkZO--MGhPKV_lnhbCAN4aEjNJvyroJy78Qr-0Ahh4ffy51i4_yK1G1MwEEzbYtF14_rKBHAz4Gs17-PGW3gUobXaVUQ3qx6-LTp3G50AoInedhQZPNzsEZUnB87cvyOE54tLk_N-TeM0Ciw-yLHrk86oMgeObvIpais1yUC4kmaE2WNXgnDn06ERX-mCfja7ndIwnjv4P7F_5bn7_GjpjO6Uf8A_CDvcodDCqj3aG3X1TeCe23_2GKQo3k-RH0nJHz6sxIjB9F4QCb3k_hxgbHK7hOHJTeU61CzvjOBeGGcKS9coY-D-yAAM8msmmJ67ejD2HTISh8eooUXJDsLzxcHDTGf-yeuSTFbhHh0HYn2N0Fn80A%3D%3D) Paid for by Mullen for Secretary of State

I stand with the LGBTQ+ community today and every day, and I will always fight for the freedom of people to love who they love 🏳️🌈 I also want to thank you all for being a part of this campaign. May was an incredible month, and it’s because of the supporters like you. Over the last few months, we’ve really built up our momentum. We’ve brought in more donations than I thought possible, and we’re gaining ground in the race to boot Montana’s far-right extremist Secretary of State. Montanans are ready for a Secretary of State who knows the struggles of small business owners and who values the sanctity of our free and fair elections. We can win this thing, and when we do, it’ll be because you stepped up and got involved. So, thank you. Thank you all for being a part of our campaign. – Jesse James Mullen Montana needs your help to defeat the Far Right and protect our values of caring, community, and free and fair Elections. Your donation will protect election integrity, public land access and build a friendlier secretary of state office for Montanans! Paid for by Mullen for Secretary of State

Right now, we are facing a national emergency. We need you now more than ever. Trump has always fought for you – | This sham trial was as corrupt as they come. Judge Merchan is a known Trump hater. This case is laughable - nobody else on the planet would have been convicted. This sets a scary precedent moving forward. This was a complete and total weaponization of the judicial system against Joe Biden's political opponent. If this is how the Left thinks they will defeat MAGA, they are very wrong. Let's send the Left a clear message that this corruption only makes us fight harder. We will never stop supporting Trump, defending our country, and fighting to defeat your woke agenda. We will not stop until we get rid of the Radical Corruption in our nation. While this verdict is not what we wanted, the fight continues. We cannot do it without your support. name: R. Gallego
subject: I won’t ever forget it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
I need you with me, and I need you to take this race seriously.
| | |
---
I won’t ever forget it, friend.

Standing on the House floor. Hearing shouts, pounding, breaking glass. Barricading the door and teaching my colleagues how to use their gas masks. Texting my staff, telling them to hide.

I carried a rifle in Iraq; all I had to defend myself on January 6th was a pen. But I was ready to fight.
And after that day, Trump’s loyalists crawled right back to him. Witnessing them reject what they lived through, watching them ignore the testimony of the police officers that defended us that day while they were beaten, bloodied, pepper sprayed, cursed at ... it makes me sick.

Kari Lake thinks the January Sixers are patriots who were “invited in” — she even campaigns with them.

I think anyone who supports those terrorists and traitors shouldn’t be allowed anywhere near the U.S. Senate.

This race in Arizona is just me and her. It’s on us to stop her march to more power and influence. Whoever wins in Arizona is going to determine which party holds the Senate and could even decide whether Trump takes back the White House.

I need you with me, and I need you to take this race seriously.
[**Please split a donation of $5 — that or anything you can give — between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand's to crush Kari Lake’s campaign and defend our democracy. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86080725/476778174/298558665?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk5090-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDEwMGQ5NS0yZTIwLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xoVOBKdl39N74HSXij6UJ9XZFQe57UjIxJr83bsWeUM=)
