| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86080731/476778189/1575385346?refcode=jtk5090-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDEwMGQ5NS0yZTIwLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xoVOBKdl39N74HSXij6UJ9XZFQe57UjIxJr83bsWeUM=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86080733/476778191/1575385346?refcode=jtk5090-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDEwMGQ5NS0yZTIwLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xoVOBKdl39N74HSXij6UJ9XZFQe57UjIxJr83bsWeUM=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86080735/476778193/1575385346?refcode=jtk5090-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDEwMGQ5NS0yZTIwLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xoVOBKdl39N74HSXij6UJ9XZFQe57UjIxJr83bsWeUM=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Christina Bohannan
subject: Thank you, and Happy Pride Month!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christina Bohannan for Congress
body:
As we honor the achievements and resilience of the LGBTQ+ community, let's also remember that there is still much work to be done.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86080951/476778980/182211867?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyN2FiMjI2Yi0yZjIwLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pov3E5mc7KyBCpjYYdqNXNyE1QxUYwcWF4CZkupAp3w=)
Peter,

I wanted to personally thank you for your incredible support. **Thanks to our dedicated grassroots team, we reached our May end-of-month fundraising goal!** I am truly grateful for each and every one of you who contributed to this campaign. Your support is the foundation of our movement, and together, we are making real progress toward flipping IA-01 and creating a better future for all Iowans.

Today also marks the beginning of Pride Month, a time to celebrate the LGBTQ+ community and recognize the strides we've made toward equality and justice. **As we celebrate, we must also remember there are those who are working to take away our rights – including Mariannette Miller-Meeks, who is already airing an ad that disgracefully uses Caitlin Clark’s name to punch down on trans youth athletes.** The fight for LGBTQ+ rights continues, both in Iowa and across the country. We must remain vigilant and committed to ensuring that everyone, regardless of their sexual orientation or gender identity, can live with dignity and equality.

**I am proud to stand with the LGBTQ+ community and to fight for a more inclusive and just society.** Together, we can continue to make progress and build a future where everyone is treated with the respect they deserve.

Happy Pride Month! Let's celebrate our victories, honor the trailblazers who came before us, and keep pushing for a brighter, more inclusive future.

– Christina Bohannan

clean_body: As we honor the achievements and resilience of the LGBTQ+ community, let's also remember that there is still much work to be done. | = Peter, I wanted to personally thank you for your incredible support. Thanks to our dedicated grassroots team, we reached our May end-of-month fundraising goal! I am truly grateful for each and every one of you who contributed to this campaign. Your support is the foundation of our movement, and together, we are making real progress toward flipping IA-01 and creating a better future for all Iowans. Today also marks the beginning of Pride Month, a time to celebrate the LGBTQ+ community and recognize the strides we've made toward equality and justice. As we celebrate, we must also remember there are those who are working to take away our rights – including Mariannette Miller-Meeks, who is already airing an ad that disgracefully uses Caitlin Clark’s name to punch down on trans youth athletes. The fight for LGBTQ+ rights continues, both in Iowa and across the country. We must remain vigilant and committed to ensuring that everyone, regardless of their sexual orientation or gender identity, can live with dignity and equality. I am proud to stand with the LGBTQ+ community and to fight for a more inclusive and just society. Together, we can continue to make progress and build a future where everyone is treated with the respect they deserve. Happy Pride Month! Let's celebrate our victories, honor the trailblazers who came before us, and keep pushing for a brighter, more inclusive future. – Christina Bohannan = Christina Bohannan is a mom, law professor, former engineer, and state representative. She's running to represent Iowa's 1st Congressional District in Congress because she believes everyone deserves a fair shot. = | = | Paid for by Christina Bohannan for Congress Christina Bohannan for Congress PO Box 722 Iowa City, IA 52244 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

body:
The National Lawyers Guild’s Mass Defense Program is providing on-the-ground legal support for students. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEW8LD_ddfJaADUzJwFnKh0VRu9QQ6Alm03gZSLsyDWplkgvw2NVRmVfW9UX__Q0k0Q6H3J1KU4xUXl1BnZirZ1AFd-WG00-mRtGqX54LQbEyFYhUMe09FBMIK1GIqlymVPiUj1ahPQ-_KeOKbKecs4GFW3p26ecXu2AouuutAOHVkV_VTlZAmcSZ1MF0wpMsJctSlWQjyBAifX_KKffk-x3SnX_3FUK-bSlL_rU2NZ8gA/46u/y35aJPqsSRquPFh7CK4aTA/h0/h001.MTid4L4KfAbpxtwXssWUJyo0gFsyQkvfJkvxZuVrK0U)

Friend, I’m a proud member of the Detroit and Michigan Chapter of the National Lawyers Guild, which protects the rights of people fighting for social change. **As repression escalates against students who are calling for an end to the genocide against Palestinians, National Lawyers Guild chapters and members are on the ground in dozens of U.S. cities supporting the right to dissent.** Having developed its Legal Observer Program in 1968 in response to protests at Columbia University, the National Lawyers Guild is now **mobilizing networks of legal support to protect students who are being targeted by their universities and the police.** With lawmakers trying to further criminalize and silence protesters, I wanted to help raise money to power this urgent work. [**Can you donate today to the National Lawyers Guild Mass Defense Program, to support pro-Palestine student activists and protect our right to protest?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMcGINrArzUC06LekdZiDRk22se65-d8ihi1K4yzSJmvdI2NoVhJWnvEFuOT6s55NASAJEcMIYNHnzSulRIUoJ0i-ssQ5v6LfIVTTMntnecCmqpO--Ba1sVDmyZ-n04YUJzwPaSethYVl7vj78URPJraUr3PUk-6DDTWC1nQqLB_3wV9zN0_pWpRcBHHiPwp5Qy_TkLWjjGkc8Qrsw6XhqtRmZePHpsIwfHBXSqeD0RsL7bYhk_Z4r8zakkSuJRHh4zoBb1RJ6lpC_9DP0CSyzfPiqe7xrp8j665p_Uz6Svz45wm8pVPWpxUnzSheH1PfWR0YxgCHA_fKMAnq-VW4AZFoEdxu9JfVITHDMZ9GrB-XESiu4mpsp-0CxR4RvlSaag/46u/y35aJPqsSRquPFh7CK4aTA/h1/h001.VIgksHIoU3-daWGhc4a5BheUrTkJ3WVfdt2uz-gELIs) | [DONATE TO NATIONAL LAWYERS GUILD](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMcGINrArzUC06LekdZiDRk22se65-d8ihi1K4yzSJmvdI2NoVhJWnvEFuOT6s55NAYBCrng6oWmSJf0X27GldIxnLufyD3ykpMCv7uV8wWIYi9eHOqg3QIp05iXUS-YMNwkXmmdHk20Ecy1504ZXA4_D-w8Q8bV7l4HcZ4NBop78R9yTws--wGj4fh9rAw28HcrqKhLS_23pfnrX3lngWV1dP-QDLd22SzSh-ieTkzY9u14nKrXvPhVHWG00jGGyPVC5viSrNndeRG4hc80Xxzl6E-up5QPDryugNUkOZzuFMKxV0NjLdG2nbzULr13v5GoinpYkNaU_o07IxdTNfM3tXAwBlBBbqDptTqBTX9mmqyWCgDM9K3stcCwcw72S7A/46u/y35aJPqsSRquPFh7CK4aTA/h2/h001.9ok_Ln0ToD1b4Y4U9kvQx5XoEFdkT3tOUp6wHv31too)

[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMcGINrArzUC06LekdZiDRk22se65-d8ihi1K4yzSJmvdI2NoVhJWnvEFuOT6s55NAcVUd1eKWhaDgFTb3tXCqtnZKKJN7gjpWetSWhEnrGz46bmWyms0aUtJcP86S1in8Nh1mGobnVYwsSOKYcx_jmgwmdKSkhaJ4vj3d_wkbuRhdsdfsrsxixs5CEzzakfOntt4HhKl-3iHFHYl3eBHIbFAfFyRmLHhn_D-4NSYe_xwbEAAD-0HgDiLx3AyfXA2jw4riZvXLz3gx2H2K4csDR-tmtjXhWe8NpIIvfQAVJ-j_nDhAgY-aTnapDPHz5IhNL5DyOfMMUp_h3VFokroWS-e2-o18cx7CZ7CqAS7ftyUCFtaYKf8o-PtTlpMssm8zQ/46u/y35aJPqsSRquPFh7CK4aTA/h3/h001.Nz-pMtyvuRrENwTiOFP82SZBFgkeSoic3lMjPaYnux8)
In my district, I’ve had the opportunity to spend time at my alma mater Wayne State University’s Gaza solidarity encampment, where I urged the school’s president to meet with her students and tried to make sure that students are protected and safe. For example, I stood in front of a police car that tried to drive through a crowd of students.
**Students are putting their bodies on the line to demand that their universities divest from weapons manufacturers that are sending bombs to destroy hospitals and murder innocent children in Gaza.**
As students face violent crackdowns for protesting to save lives, many government leaders and media outlets are smearing and condemning students—rather than condemning Israel’s human rights abuses. It’s disgraceful.
**We must listen to and defend these students, and continue building the movement for Palestinian liberation.**
Right now, the National Lawyers Guild (NLG) is supporting and training NLG members to assist students with disciplinary proceedings, training activists about their rights and about how to become Legal Observers, and providing Legal Observer support to help arrested activists and to document police behavior in defense of the right to protest.
[**Please donate today to help power the National Lawyers Guild’s Mass Defense Program and provide on-the-ground legal support for students putting their bodies on the line to stop the genocide of Palestinians.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMcGINrArzUC06LekdZiDRk22se65-d8ihi1K4yzSJmvdI2NoVhJWnvEFuOT6s55NAWl4pG5f7ZyorvEeuzxXm4ehQvOv_FSoqeRGad6XuyQe_sD8I3wEOQ4cCvWUPKnFK36j7NLNXG4EVja-YLxZW4vNjByAq-HYuo33HwEPK876a0xRkpECEuP6z5SD_ofDSt4Z9YUSZ-wPTLY8CC1Kzc_FR-JcE9JcNCwE4XF7ay-JlAYzjIVHxKN--obtllS3vzLTVQTXh5ft9LM34kBugRsZ2e-QwzM_W1rOdVInT3LR8h8CeG_JHFD0U_2rz7AlHY5gOInMezBYnvHVaJik8riqAXtspepEW7GQNZQC1tuMdUBhg3DWLM1-bjU8Z6sLqA/46u/y35aJPqsSRquPFh7CK4aTA/h4/h001.k6Vbdj6uTjL6Bw-Gn0cw9QJtoKEXHuSGB9IlRLlPC8s)
[DONATE NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMcGINrArzUC06LekdZiDRk22se65-d8ihi1K4yzSJmvdI2NoVhJWnvEFuOT6s55NAf2PBOrsn3PurNA4DAjpxVYYmgXtFCIex6nc0jXAkMWZBYL-1hxlPAe7HQ-57kVGgGgCPCChMgb5TX_CIp7ubu3WhQxDcaJtdVb6NFF7HvVZ8B1J8DFDhLqBlUE1J6D1TXuv-jkM2h58tdCKqmOF9pb_YpBv0H7FmuU6xN90GuYytrhd0lZ0CaZ7gGcZCAmElHzyklrrb3Gy4jDiMXTV6iC4boAPLBtOO04EcXz_wJkPOvsD_RJwqPy0GWqQELqbx2Lr_B5pFl1iLBeAZPrZIGAXU7q_pLPvH8eRVal2maMS-mMWxIfkSTd4rT7glG_cpA/46u/y35aJPqsSRquPFh7CK4aTA/h5/h001.oCnehsHSV6p3rME2WnAxZopVNgqlmQTEy5FC2srk9yk)

Thank you for continuing to build progressive power for the world we all deserve, where all people can live with dignity and safety.
In solidarity,
Rashida

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Happy Pride Month!
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR BY
MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
As the first openly gay, Black member of Congress, I am deeply honored to celebrate this month with you.
Happy Pride Month, folks!

As the first openly gay, Black member of Congress, I am deeply honored to celebrate this month with you.

I can’t express how much the world we live in today feels so far from the world I lived in growing up closeted. I wish I could tell that little boy growing up in the suburbs that he’d later serve as living proof of the ideal that it does, indeed, get better.

There’s so much for us to celebrate—and keep fighting for. Because there’s a world out there where no one has to question whether it is safe to show up as they are. A world where a kid like me growing up poor, Black, and gay can have the confidence to achieve anything he or she or they put their mind to.

**We need leaders in Congress who understand the struggles of the LGBTQ+ community and who will always stand in support of equality for everyone.**

**[I’m ready to return to Congress to be that leader, but I need your help. Will you chip in to help me flip NY-17 blue so I can continue the fight for LGBTQ+ While we have made significant strides in the fight for LGBTQ+ equality, we still have a long way to go. **The progress we’ve achieved is being undone by far-right politicians, and the challenges we face today remind us of the importance of standing together.**

Our fight for equality is far from over. Discrimination, violence, and legislative attacks against LGBTQ+ individuals persist, and we must continue to push for comprehensive protections and equal rights for all. **I am ready to return to Congress to be the voice my community needs, advocating tirelessly for LGBTQ+ rights and equality.**

But I can’t do this alone. I need your help to get back to Congress and continue our fight. **[So, will you pitch in $10 (or more) to help us reach our end-of-month goal and win this race?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86081505/476781239/132774807?ms=em24_240601_pride_fnd_gq_act___mj_ettx&refcode=em24_240601_pride_fnd_gq_act___mj_ettx&source=em24_240601_pride_fnd_gq_act___mj_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240601_pride_fnd_gq_act___mj_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=uf4xnOSBmIDbyqBErjWPGtbvxfoaaplbLhnwwd4CMDc9BZJz2LXZyPWqZqqHx3BnKmZCMDo1Y52VgFttheUugWIUHbXbl8fmcgNPTUS/6ng=&refcode2=fd5911ff-2f20-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDU5MTFmZi0yZjIwLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iqqxTfKtIfp-EqzHhsWYlpdP2kVUT4roqFxueVM8rGI=)**

clean_body: As the first openly gay, Black member of Congress, I am deeply honored to celebrate this month with you. Happy Pride Month, folks! As the first openly gay, Black member of Congress, I am deeply honored to celebrate this month with you. I can’t express how much the world we live in today feels so far from the world I lived in growing up closeted. I wish I could tell that little boy growing up in the suburbs that he’d later serve as living proof of the ideal that it does, indeed, get better. There’s so much for us to celebrate—and keep fighting for. Because there’s a world out there where no one has to question whether it is safe to show up as they are. A world where a kid like me growing up poor, Black, and gay can have the confidence to achieve anything he or she or they put their mind to. We need leaders in Congress who understand the struggles of the LGBTQ+ community and who will always stand in support of equality for everyone. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- While we have made significant strides in the fight for LGBTQ+ equality, we still have a long way to go. The progress we’ve achieved is being undone by far-right politicians, and the challenges we face today remind us of the importance of standing together. Our fight for equality is far from over. Discrimination, violence, and legislative attacks against LGBTQ+ individuals persist, and we must continue to push for comprehensive protections and equal rights for all. I am ready to return to Congress to be the voice my community needs, advocating tirelessly for LGBTQ+ rights and equality. But I can’t do this alone. I need your help to get back to Congress and continue our fight. = In solidarity, Mondaire Mondaire Jones is running for Congress to finish the work he started last term. He's ready to fight to lower costs for residents of the Hudson Valley, defend our democracy, raise wages, and protect reproductive rights for all. And he's doing it without a penny from corporate PACs. = = **= ** PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX #873, SLEEPY HOLLOW, NY 10591

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: Here’s The Truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie Moreno for Senate
body:
Joe Biden and the radical left aren’t after President Trump; they’re after YOU, the American People. |
---
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=5bd0c67aad514c94a24bc28682d07bf8&_e=iO0X5yt00uY0ZMkO02cXZXnevvqziVhsuBUuWJnUXwidQTTEL1HWiRmSQ2P3fqaeB_lXra3aBZW-CWX-LOrt587fUQKQH19soUdIGH7zYNPB5fPDnu0skI7Qc3tGOb2YUpQUy74htHERDaBiOIP7GgiCv8xnspGjC3Fc3Tvv4xwfdQ_24_NUNxTMVABNmzs74JbcIEcbbefI07bMiT9AHxeB-8vI5jFsEKcvSI4shLiI1j7jS-Srvnw-yEICtY6VwD8NKH4WCxHPBOdUhZEgIqcy6XG5TvuzYxYpJWno-Pw_66ObPVb8pKtlq3uz8E3HgP6S8Bnmt9vKkcZgq-hvTt67bXljn2CVkuYnbDSk1J-_fw-ho-YnHJv7VEGxgFJgM5uXRhI3dZ9baymUT6ynNc2p2TdL9icdbI8AZMZ3UXU%3D)

Well Fellow patriot,

The Democrats have succeeded in their years-long crusade against my father. **_This is a complete and total outrage._**

The guilty verdict brought on by a radical, Soros-backed Democrat in a kangaroo court in New York City will forever be a stain on our nation's history. The case was rigged from the start. [**We’ve got to have your support if we’re going to fix our fractured nation.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=5bd0c67aad514c94a24bc28682d07bf8&_e=iO0X5yt00uY0ZMkO02cXZXnevvqziVhsuBUuWJnUXwidQTTEL1HWiRmSQ2P3fqaeB_lXra3aBZW-CWX-LOrt587fUQKQH19soUdIGH7zYNPB5fPDnu0skI7Qc3tGOb2YUpQUy74htHERDaBiOIP7GgiCv8xnspGjC3Fc3Tvv4xwfdQ_24_NUNxTMVABNmzs74JbcIEcbbefI07bMiT9AHxeB-8vI5jFsEKcvSI4shLiI1j7jS-Srvnw-yEICtY6VwD8NKH4WCxHPBOdUhZEgIiXLRaBxlmyfGhJG6qaLKQDJmzkpjs4Go3IO0o8AEQ5tnQzOZaHImcGeEjVKPd5O7lghkSqpQwqFH31pmHp7J9rKZzwtXfPrPSCGSpjqKa0-Z2Ulhxnn6hdC1gMIFaEXXpvMbHkTjrHI3rsTaQAEe_0%3D)

**⇨ First, Alvin Bragg literally campaigned on the conviction of my father. He didn’t care about truth or justice – only his and Joe Biden’s personal vendetta and political aspirations.

⇨ Then, Bragg and his leftist cronies completed their mission, pushing through a wrongful conviction based on flimsy evidence and outright lies. This was a third-world country sham trial. _For God’s sake, Putin does this stuff!_

⇨ Now, they have the audacity to schedule his sentencing just DAYS before the Republican National Convention. _This is a blatant attempt to interfere with the upcoming election and silence MILLIONS of Americans who stand with President Trump._**

_This is what a Banana Republic looks like, folks._

[ **STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP** ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=5bd0c67aad514c94a24bc28682d07bf8&_e=iO0X5yt00uY0ZMkO02cXZXnevvqziVhsuBUuWJnUXwidQTTEL1HWiRmSQ2P3fqaeB_lXra3aBZW-CWX-LOrt587fUQKQH19soUdIGH7zYNPB5fPDnu0skI7Qc3tGOb2YUpQUy74htHERDaBiOIP7GgiCv8xnspGjC3Fc3Tvv4xwfdQ_24_NUNxTMVABNmzs74JbcIEcbbefI07bMiT9AHxeB-8vI5jFsEKcvSI4shLiI1j7jS-Srvnw-yEICtY6VwD8NKH4WCxHPBOdUhZEgIhZ5Rjhitdbi1f2dmK47VLw9FGDAy3M5e8ALln3xmRDKhBYkihV8xkN0Um82NfMmZcvNDP8XsnTeFQk41Aytj67oqaEGRKxi-unGdsQ2mipm-vyIyhHD-nNM0AFw-ZC2YicxAFhtqu4wse04wix9Y5s%3D)
What’s done is done; all we can do now is fight back, Friend.

[**That is why I am personally calling on you to support not only my father in this critical election year but also America First patriots like Bernie Moreno in Ohio.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=5bd0c67aad514c94a24bc28682d07bf8&_e=iO0X5yt00uY0ZMkO02cXZXnevvqziVhsuBUuWJnUXwidQTTEL1HWiRmSQ2P3fqaeB_lXra3aBZW-CWX-LOrt587fUQKQH19soUdIGH7zYNPB5fPDnu0skI7Qc3tGOb2YUpQUy74htHERDaBiOIP7GgiCv8xnspGjC3Fc3Tvv4xwfdQ_24_NUNxTMVABNmzs74JbcIEcbbefI07bMiT9AHxeB-8vI5jFsEKcvSI4shLiI1j7jS-Srvnw-yEICtY6VwD8NKH4WCxHPBOdUhZEgIksohra1ISOacuO6ZCrd0nBkJ6ge1z7VLvAtOgwx4DVttpv5PWKsVjoL4umJyopG2vcWGskgrmrEK8PAfGxcUCEwT9JzUixRt9sRDfqxfcTE2r40rW4uwrGf4qPmJ-P1lIO6P911i_KumM0vREJrYYE%3D)

_**Bernie gets it.**_ _He understands that Joe Biden and the radical left aren’t after President Trump; they’re after YOU, the American People._

**As your next Senator, I know he will stand shoulder to shoulder with my father and fight the good fight.** [**So please, chip in whatever you can now so that we can ensure the true verdict is decided by the American People on Election Day, November 5th.**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=5bd0c67aad514c94a24bc28682d07bf8&_e=iO0X5yt00uY0ZMkO02cXZXnevvqziVhsuBUuWJnUXwidQTTEL1HWiRmSQ2P3fqaeB_lXra3aBZW-CWX-LOrt587fUQKQH19soUdIGH7zYNPB5fPDnu0skI7Qc3tGOb2YUpQUy74htHERDaBiOIP7GgiCv8xnspGjC3Fc3Tvv4xwfdQ_24_NUNxTMVABNmzs74JbcIEcbbefI07bMiT9AHxeB-8vI5jFsEKcvSI4shLiI1j7jS-Srvnw-yEICtY6VwD8NKH4WCxHPBOdUhZEgIkUM-51GbEWZAfDgKyQoq7u3CVcV4HaMVqmZZFPquCnGZqcCQEHx4lWurRrr8Lc3xnUeqrWa9ZZjMAO4mR_FVIBAlKWQKcSp2yKbWvSKq5tHcpitm5Y5r_NqoG29k1vAPb0cQF-JUOKvCoS4S9oOzpE%3D)

For America,

Donald Trump Jr.

**Meet Bernie Moreno:** | [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=5bd0c67aad514c94a24bc28682d07bf8&_e=iO0X5yt00uY0ZMkO02cXZXnevvqziVhsuBUuWJnUXwidQTTEL1HWiRmSQ2P3fqaeB_lXra3aBZW-CWX-LOrt587fUQKQH19soUdIGH7zYNPB5fPDnu0skI7Qc3tGOb2YUpQUy74htHERDaBiOIP7GgiCv8xnspGjC3Fc3Tvv4xwfdQ_24_NUNxTMVABNmzs74JbcIEcbbefI07bMiT9AHxeB-8vI5jFsEKcvSI4shLiI1j7jS-Srvnw-yEICtY6VwD8NKH4WCxHPBOdUhZEgIuerVZhYcGd8PDYgcV2paxNayXrzL8LbExRsZEucBbFIlQz0EFl6qCJWgGRBxiafzc3Xm34MRQkTrVlTfGalFtHbFMiAyPwmoaVVbZ2HBr35qJXrOjVeycKPuyXfAhJ9ot78iciuy59--FvjQ9em3Q0%3D) Bernie Moreno fights for the American Dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American Dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

This is a complete and total outrage. The guilty verdict brought on by a radical, Soros-backed Democrat in a kangaroo court in New York City will forever be a stain on our nation's history. This was a third-world country sham trial. For God’s sake, Putin does this stuff! ⇨ Now, they have the audacity to schedule his sentencing just DAYS before the Republican National Convention. This is a blatant attempt to interfere with the upcoming election and silence MILLIONS of Americans who stand with President Trump. This is what a Banana Republic looks like, folks. As your next Senator, I know he will stand shoulder to shoulder with my father and fight the good fight. For America, Donald Trump Jr. Meet Bernie Moreno: | Bernie Moreno fights for the American Dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American Dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18. In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board. After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation. clean_body: Full steam ahead. | We made it, y’all! Thanks to your incredible support, we powered through our end-of-month push like champions. I want to extend a huge thank you to every one of you. Your dedication is what keeps this campaign strong against Marsha Blackburn and her deep-pocketed pals. But, folks, while it's tempting to take a breather and celebrate our hard work, the truth is we can’t afford to slow down. We’re nearly 5 months out from one of the most pivotal elections in history, and in just a few weeks, we face a crucial end-of-quarter deadline. Here’s the deal: Right after we wrap up June, our fundraising numbers go public. This isn’t just another report — these numbers are a major signal to Marsha Blackburn, her wealthy cronies, and everyone watching that our grassroots force is strong, our supporters are passionate, and our momentum? It’s just revving up. = Here's the thing — I’ve promised to run this campaign without a dime of corporate PAC money. That means no secret funds from Big Oil, no checks from the gun lobby, no backing from big pharma. Just us, the people, powering forward. While Marsha Blackburn leans on her corporate buddies and top Trump donors to pad her campaign, we're banking on someone far more powerful: you. Our grassroots movement is full of hardworking folks committed to turning Tennessee blue and ensuring Democrats strengthen our hold in the Senate. This is our moment to prove the pundits wrong, to show our opponents that we’re a force to be reckoned with, and to remind our allies that we’re in it to win it. We're more than ready to make a big impact this quarter and power our momentum. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = I can’t thank you enough. Gloria Johnson = | = Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. Send donations via check to: Gloria for Tennessee 73 White Bridge Rd #103-353 Nashville, TN 37205

name: Dan Goldman
subject: We began this journey two years ago today.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Dear Peter, Today marks two years since I first announced my campaign for Congress. Looking back, I’m truly amazed at how far we’ve come together. **[I would be grateful if you’re able to make a quick donation of any amount to help me keep up the fight we began two years ago today. Your contributions are the driving force for our shared progress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86082396/476783532/916371601?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240601_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWQ0OTliMi0zMDIwLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XBJ_jYtyyzO8wFLX7MTzoCDdDD9fef6rJgNhPUFG0HY=)** — I first ran for Congress because it was clear that our democracy was under attack. The events of January 6th at the Capitol were the beginning — not the end — of the MAGA assault on our elections and our democracy. **And the American people deserve leaders who are willing to stand up to extremists and fight for what's right.** Thanks to your unwavering support, we’ve made some important strides for our democracy. When Rep. George Santos colluded with Republican leaders to defraud the voters in New York's 3rd congressional district, I led the charge to expel him from Congress even before I was sworn in. While Rep. Elise Stefanik spreads conspiracy theories and sides with anti-democratic insurrectionists, I will continue to hold her accountable by calling her out — or, as was necessary, introducing a resolution to censure her for her extremist remarks. When House Republicans abused the official authority of Congress to try to impeach President Biden and Secretary Mayorkas, I aggressively exposed those investigations as the baseless, lawless partisan stunts they were. **But let me be clear — our work is far from over.** With the threat of a second Trump presidency looming over our country, convicted felon Donald Trump and his MAGA enablers pose a greater existential threat to our democracy than ever before. Republicans’ attacks on the rule of law have dangerously escalated after a jury of 12 Americans found Trump guilty of 34 felonies. And it promises to get worse. If Republican leaders won’t stand up against these extremists, then our only other choice is to vote them out this November. **So today, on the second anniversary of the launch of my first campaign, I assure you that I am just getting started.** **[If you’re with me, please consider making a contribution of any amount today:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86082398/476783534/916371601?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240601_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWQ0OTliMi0zMDIwLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XBJ_jYtyyzO8wFLX7MTzoCDdDD9fef6rJgNhPUFG0HY=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86082400/476783536/916371601?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240601_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWQ0OTliMi0zMDIwLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XBJ_jYtyyzO8wFLX7MTzoCDdDD9fef6rJgNhPUFG0HY=)

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86083768/476787361/-1997846893?refcode=jtk1469-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjdhZmZjOC0zMjIwLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MUySF65QxtzO5tSW_2avCk1YTL4_XhVFB2tfeN-z5xo=)

It's happened again, Peter: Powerful and corrupt men have taken over the headlines.

I'm far from shocked. Ever since I took my oath as attorney general and swore to do everything in my power to finally bring the most corrupt actors to justice, they have not stopped trying to take me down.

**But here’s the thing: It doesn’t matter which office they once held or how much money they have behind them, I will never be silenced. I will put my head down and go to work for the great people of New York, without fear, without favor, every day.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86083771/476787362/-2022193277?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1469-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjdhZmZjOC0zMjIwLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MUySF65QxtzO5tSW_2avCk1YTL4_XhVFB2tfeN-z5xo=)
In the five years I’ve been in office, I’ve stayed true to my mission of holding the shady forces who have ruled our nation for generations accountable. I knew that standing up to these people and groups was going to earn me enemies. I knew that after decades of elected officials turning a blind eye, my mission would put a target on my back. But I also knew that New York’s working families deserved a champion – and I would do it all a thousand times over.

But I’m nowhere near done fighting for the voiceless and vulnerable, _especially_ now that these powerful and corrupt actors have shown their true colors. These men think they can rattle me and scare me off my path, but the truth is, they have only reaffirmed why I went into this work in the first place.

**But Peter, I can only continue to fight for New York with YOUR support. So please:**
**[With New York’s most powerful and corrupt trying to bully me into submission and silence, will you rush a $5 donation right now to help me stand tall against their attacks?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86083773/476787363/-2022193277?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1469-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjdhZmZjOC0zMjIwLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MUySF65QxtzO5tSW_2avCk1YTL4_XhVFB2tfeN-z5xo=)**

Fellow American, Primary Day is days away and **unless I can raise an additional $9,428 before midnight, I’m not sure I’ll have the resources to win.** I’ve spent the entire afternoon reviewing the numbers with my finance team, and here’s the short of it:

1. A few years ago, this seat was Blue, **and we barely flipped** – meaning our race is a top target for Pelosi because she knows it’s a purple district.
2. We have a strong team on the ground, _and a big chunk of our fundraising budget goes towards buying pizza for volunteers, providing yard signs to folks, and keeping this campaign running._
3. When we miss our weekly goals, even by a couple of hundred bucks, **we have to pull back on all our campaigning efforts** – and we really can’t afford to backpedal with the election just _**a few**_ days away.

[** HELP NANCY ➞ **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=6ce58c97e71a41689d15c0ca65eef2f7&_e=3KJgsySVbDJ_GeAsn2JEMAZR-irXwUmsjFkUXYT9A1q5zQ3ILVS4ihTuw-7jPqn_uSzy9jtIFYYsF7t6fzsY3LQlo7jq0_1LbcnREXp8_pYTdThBwtGsct8pZI3dMHdlZHjpSf5twCG3gKfANG89--JENzp_-d74fxq83qgna5ZryT2uhaRl-eJhcpdUxt8SreN5UC54k_8KgCUXQxCzmBLFVjipT0K2WydvVNZaUe-pbmU8FMf-SL9kkgmr36VreaOAOfkwrNXRzzzIbh-GYyV39xYit_q4XbFGHr8CqkNfxFHF6BEOAvG63O7G8naWb3kEzd7SyR7RdfVtzt2kWfnR_Yxd05ygi9M6Ths9PrTJUPUiaKuwOx020FfkNSyV)
So, now you see why I had to reach out. I truly wouldn’t ask for your help if I didn’t need it, but your generous donation makes a huge impact in a race like mine.

I need 49 donors to step forward to help reach our goal this week, can I count on you?

You can donate here --> [**https://secure.winred.com/team-mace/refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=6ce58c97e71a41689d15c0ca65eef2f7&_e=3KJgsySVbDJ_GeAsn2JEMAZR-irXwUmsjFkUXYT9A1q5zQ3ILVS4ihTuw-7jPqn_uSzy9jtIFYYsF7t6fzsY3LQlo7jq0_1LbcnREXp8_pYTdThBwtGsct8pZI3dMHdlZHjpSf5twCG3gKfANG89--JENzp_-d74fxq83qgna5ZryT2uhaRl-eJhcpdUxt8SreN5UC54k_8KgCUXQxCzmBLFVjipT0K2WydvVNZaUe95FpKLL-fnR_RYTHkqns0XsIuxU_8f2G51SaKtXghTDUgboSeQIeCPaY4d0JUZgFo1uQRbQgx-g05t7bo-8oiI6MCc_3JaIaEbWToU3nEqFA_erUlEal_NnSQz_jhSL2yjQrlLaioWRleuTTfR_57k)

[** SUPPORT NANCY MACE ➞ **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=6ce58c97e71a41689d15c0ca65eef2f7&_e=3KJgsySVbDJ_GeAsn2JEMAZR-irXwUmsjFkUXYT9A1q5zQ3ILVS4ihTuw-7jPqn_uSzy9jtIFYYsF7t6fzsY3LQlo7jq0_1LbcnREXp8_pYTdThBwtGsct8pZI3dMHdlZHjpSf5twCG3gKfANG89--JENzp_-d74fxq83qgna5ZryT2uhaRl-eJhcpdUxt8SreN5UC54k_8KgCUXQxCzmBLFVjipT0K2WydvVNZaUe-NeRsLbr2MZoMusLjFgZzSB-2OsxQaeoRhCvMzQ--R7VLltThtQVD6xF60rsXRba0kh4DNf2nQCsELxENEqXnvzDbwdYCer-uHmdCecI1npjOq-9Tvkfu-2_4VccR2vDrwn-CClosTc8LAqXBoK_Sg)
My team and I have a follow-up meeting to discuss the budget next Friday at 12pm, so please help out before then.

Thanks for all you’re doing.

Gratefully,

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=6ce58c97e71a41689d15c0ca65eef2f7&_e=3KJgsySVbDJ_GeAsn2JEMAZR-irXwUmsjFkUXYT9A1q5zQ3ILVS4ihTuw-7jPqn_uSzy9jtIFYYsF7t6fzsY3LQlo7jq0_1LbcnREXp8_pYTdThBwtGsct8pZI3dMHdlZHjpSf5twCG3gKfANG89--JENzp_-d74fxq83qgna5ZryT2uhaRl-eJhcpdUxt8SreN5UC54k_8KgCUXQxCzmBLFVjipT0K2WydvVNZaUe-QOkz0lDQfMjYA5ETksuL1j-0Ouy7o3KySgnQaqxIBV19Ps4Sptppxh9uFyRfb0F1UvZQERbvRd9Btw6ZESafJvYqTGIejIOmhE8SPtCzNs3UWackSOMMbVznWsG4hG0-xYQxySTWWrWGhHBw74Rqi)
Nancy Mace

P.S. I know money is tight, but truly one dollar can make a difference in a campaign like mine because these races come down to the last minute and the last dollar. So, if you only have a dollar to spare, please know how thankful I am for your support, and I hope to continue to make you proud in Congress.

| |
# About Nancy
---
Congresswoman Nancy Mace grew up in the Lowcountry. She is the daughter of a retired Army General and retired school teacher. She is a proud mother of two, the first female to graduate from The Citadel's Corps of Cadets, and a tough conservative who wants to save our country from the radicals who hate America! In 2020, she took SC-01 back from the Democrats and now, is fighting tooth and nail to keep it Red. [**JOIN NANCY**](go.txting.io/mEWDMy)

body:
This month is personal for me

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86084788/476791057/-112884332?refcode=wrpr_hdr&ms=240601_ew_pride&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTQyY2E1ZTItMzQyMC1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=v4gF5R_Y0l6ZoJZ-LxXGWNiZq6Z37JEmWCPaSGtCLCo=)
---
Happy Pride Month, Peter! This is a month to be intentional about our acknowledgment of the LGBTQ+ community, their contributions to society, and combating the discrimination that people continue to face for their sexual orientation or gender identity. **As a member of the LGBTQ+ community, this month is important to me.** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86084789/476791058/1938203091?refcode=240601_ew_pride_img&ms=240601_ew_pride&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTQyY2E1ZTItMzQyMC1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=v4gF5R_Y0l6ZoJZ-LxXGWNiZq6Z37JEmWCPaSGtCLCo=)** I have experienced firsthand the judgment, hateful comments, and discrimination based on who I love that I know almost everyone in the LGBTQ+ community has had happen to them, too. That is one of the biggest reasons I am running for Congress. To help make our country a place that is welcoming and accepting of all people, no matter any aspect of their identity. I vow to never stop fighting to make our country a more inclusive place for all. **[If you're ready to help deliver more LGBTQ+ representation in Washington, please make a contribution to my campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86084790/476791061/-112884332?refcode=240601_ew_pride_l1&ms=240601_ew_pride&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTQyY2E1ZTItMzQyMC1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=v4gF5R_Y0l6ZoJZ-LxXGWNiZq6Z37JEmWCPaSGtCLCo=)** **[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86084791/476791068/-112884332?refcode=240601_ew_pride&ms=240601_ew_pride&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTQyY2E1ZTItMzQyMC1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=v4gF5R_Y0l6ZoJZ-LxXGWNiZq6Z37JEmWCPaSGtCLCo=)** Thank you, — Eric
| Eric Wilson is a Democrat, project manager, and housing professional by trade. He's got real-world experience working in health insurance and real estate - and has seen how our current system has let so many down. He's running for Wisconsin's 3rd to bring a fresh perspective and fight for those who've been left behind.

**Can you make a contribution today to help flip this seat and give Wisconsin's third the representation it deserves?** **[Contribute Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86084792/476791075/-112884332?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=542ca5e2-3420-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ms=240601_ew_pride&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTQyY2E1ZTItMzQyMC1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=v4gF5R_Y0l6ZoJZ-LxXGWNiZq6Z37JEmWCPaSGtCLCo=)** **[GIVE Monthly](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86084793/476791082/-112884332?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=542ca5e2-3420-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ms=240601_ew_pride&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTQyY2E1ZTItMzQyMC1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=v4gF5R_Y0l6ZoJZ-LxXGWNiZq6Z37JEmWCPaSGtCLCo=)** **[Meet Eric](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86084794/476791089/-504541945?ms=240601_ew_pride&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTQyY2E1ZTItMzQyMC1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=v4gF5R_Y0l6ZoJZ-LxXGWNiZq6Z37JEmWCPaSGtCLCo=&emci=74473d4d-eb1e-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=542ca5e2-3420-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=22611996)**

clean_body: This month is personal for me | | = Happy Pride Month, Peter! This is a month to be intentional about our acknowledgment of the LGBTQ+ community, their contributions to society, and combating the discrimination that people continue to face for their sexual orientation or gender identity. As a member of the LGBTQ+ community, this month is important to me. = I have experienced firsthand the judgment, hateful comments, and discrimination based on who I love that I know almost everyone in the LGBTQ+ community has had happen to them, too. That is one of the biggest reasons I am running for Congress. To help make our country a place that is welcoming and accepting of all people, no matter any aspect of their identity. I vow to never stop fighting to make our country a more inclusive place for all. = = Thank you, — Eric | Eric Wilson is a Democrat, project manager, and housing professional by trade. He's got real-world experience working in health insurance and real estate - and has seen how our current system has let so many down. He's running for Wisconsin's 3rd to bring a fresh perspective and fight for those who've been left behind. Can you make a contribution today to help flip this seat and give Wisconsin's third the representation it deserves? = = Paid for by Wilson for Wisconsin Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . Wilson for Wisconsin 923 South Hastings Way #352 Eau Claire, WI 54701 United States

body:
There is no crime and there never was!

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=667f146b8fac44c8a695e73c9d33837f&_e=HVVr5pdssB4Cpn-ZRQIL8wYTKWhxRRtNO7KqyVG2g9by4myF994_aP--n1fG1dMQnU3LWesVEl9hLBzYegdsKzjq6bdpCJ4xOmySRlac1DnUSwSL5idN-2YHK7THHKgHInRedoByU1OXGHIztAOjYcVhq-tk4bwcAYnYh4Tw6rkQJMnIumYTRfCJcRSqnM4HGzbEMOSkO5OLvj-v635WiGTDrkXjZwvmfWjH1Ez1kYYCXHLqPZuhJ-FTN0RNbZq2HUuw9J7sEZsHSdnPZGwC4Jz-O7r_gMYpXQvjT5DOnJZwJOJ0BJnSvROSu8deRlnvSNmpA0Y4kvvMGiQCVm1f6JkOWFvuMKlNE5X1tB3NfA-TilSUhRQ5JwupW7vgj-Jfp6gvhuEi-hxzZA79ojMce_tYOwQ4PII05gGW0Hm05dQU3u2E8K57LrsgkA4sUBT4)

Well Fellow patriot,

The Democrats have succeeded in their years-long crusade against my father. **_This is a complete and total outrage._**

The guilty verdict brought on by a radical, Soros-backed Democrat in a kangaroo court in New York City will forever be a stain on our nation's history. The case was rigged from the start. [**We’ve got to have your support if we’re going to fix our fractured nation.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=667f146b8fac44c8a695e73c9d33837f&_e=HVVr5pdssB4Cpn-ZRQIL8wYTKWhxRRtNO7KqyVG2g9by4myF994_aP--n1fG1dMQnU3LWesVEl9hLBzYegdsKzjq6bdpCJ4xOmySRlac1DnUSwSL5idN-2YHK7THHKgHInRedoByU1OXGHIztAOjYcVhq-tk4bwcAYnYh4Tw6rkQJMnIumYTRfCJcRSqnM4HGzbEMOSkO5OLvj-v635WiGTDrkXjZwvmfWjH1Ez1kYYCXHLqPZuhJ-FTN0RNbZq2HUuw9J7sEZsHSdnPZGwC4OOkMp3ZZiRYaVq4pOPLHdcyAD8Y4zZ08QV2d5-i3h9lzpGXKJzLDKpXokrU9LF_uVvsFHGzTbZ9Z7SCeRLz-90Tni-egOdngku_zEOUovNNVndF1mtlYrLBp084XbdI0Znv6qTDrIh4QdIvYyjTG4DFXdn76gmd1NgBdfpDP0VW)

**⇨ First, Alvin Bragg literally campaigned on the conviction of my father. He didn’t care about truth or justice – only his and Joe Biden’s personal vendetta and political aspirations.

⇨ Then, Bragg and his leftist cronies completed their mission, pushing through a wrongful conviction based on flimsy evidence and outright lies. This was a third-world country sham trial. _For God’s sake, Putin does this stuff!_

⇨ Now, they have the audacity to schedule his sentencing just DAYS before the Republican National Convention. _This is a blatant attempt to interfere with the upcoming election and silence MILLIONS of Americans who stand with President Trump._**

_This is what a Banana Republic looks like, folks._

[ **STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP** ](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=667f146b8fac44c8a695e73c9d33837f&_e=HVVr5pdssB4Cpn-ZRQIL8wYTKWhxRRtNO7KqyVG2g9by4myF994_aP--n1fG1dMQnU3LWesVEl9hLBzYegdsKzjq6bdpCJ4xOmySRlac1DnUSwSL5idN-2YHK7THHKgHInRedoByU1OXGHIztAOjYcVhq-tk4bwcAYnYh4Tw6rkQJMnIumYTRfCJcRSqnM4HGzbEMOSkO5OLvj-v635WiGTDrkXjZwvmfWjH1Ez1kYYCXHLqPZuhJ-FTN0RNbZq2HUuw9J7sEZsHSdnPZGwC4FmE7gj9LJsMllOIBE6u2POU5R2H05zrA51jaW6W4p08C2gGEbe-nvsoG2RcRaM5YMfQPEvCXQttIhbreQgrDGfWIEQLuP4q2WCix7ApgKWgsVE_OUTq3ohhLNLJ2LW5Tekrg68Uf-S1gR8WEo_mbD77DQkWFbMOr0Ikzv55uKPP)
What’s done is done; all we can do now is fight back, Friend.

[**That is why I am personally calling on you to support not only my father in this critical election year but also America First patriots like Bernie Moreno in Ohio.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=667f146b8fac44c8a695e73c9d33837f&_e=HVVr5pdssB4Cpn-ZRQIL8wYTKWhxRRtNO7KqyVG2g9by4myF994_aP--n1fG1dMQnU3LWesVEl9hLBzYegdsKzjq6bdpCJ4xOmySRlac1DnUSwSL5idN-2YHK7THHKgHInRedoByU1OXGHIztAOjYcVhq-tk4bwcAYnYh4Tw6rkQJMnIumYTRfCJcRSqnM4HGzbEMOSkO5OLvj-v635WiGTDrkXjZwvmfWjH1Ez1kYYCXHLqPZuhJ-FTN0RNbZq2HUuw9J7sEZsHSdnPZGwC4KPYPhrI5DrFzPzXFK4C5Qol9GqqBpr7TJxUFd_zonmGCQk4XQTRWgEzVwkCnxbEhcUBiUSIqUqORYpUhKqZCdImTZoZwtBpOERuJRDhD77-3rM91f28QyrWgNkCHeeiHpqj-A_AB4wMs9EzG9s7F0G4Qotk5BGD7gcf1IxF_AND)

_**Bernie gets it.**_ _He understands that Joe Biden and the radical left aren’t after President Trump; they’re after YOU, the American People._

**As your next Senator, I know he will stand shoulder to shoulder with my father and fight the good fight.** [**So please, chip in whatever you can now so that we can ensure the true verdict is decided by the American People on Election Day, November 5th.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=667f146b8fac44c8a695e73c9d33837f&_e=HVVr5pdssB4Cpn-ZRQIL8wYTKWhxRRtNO7KqyVG2g9by4myF994_aP--n1fG1dMQnU3LWesVEl9hLBzYegdsKzjq6bdpCJ4xOmySRlac1DnUSwSL5idN-2YHK7THHKgHInRedoByU1OXGHIztAOjYcVhq-tk4bwcAYnYh4Tw6rkQJMnIumYTRfCJcRSqnM4HGzbEMOSkO5OLvj-v635WiGTDrkXjZwvmfWjH1Ez1kYYCXHLqPZuhJ-FTN0RNbZq2HUuw9J7sEZsHSdnPZGwC4K5acLynLR7us7P5XYta2lGvYbIfnJxw04KIs2ABRyYQQ5jEQxH5is7fkYgBRCN6stpYmXh2UvP9Q5PPDEz09DDOizV0pdkMI2i4RfVbGZOkzO0X-1pOY8t-SyKs1amg6YFgZK5-om5B2gbdS8qK7DH4SrtrnL4uhwB77YySJ4JJ)

For America,

Donald Trump Jr.

**Meet Bernie Moreno:** | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=667f146b8fac44c8a695e73c9d33837f&_e=HVVr5pdssB4Cpn-ZRQIL8wYTKWhxRRtNO7KqyVG2g9by4myF994_aP--n1fG1dMQnU3LWesVEl9hLBzYegdsKzjq6bdpCJ4xOmySRlac1DnUSwSL5idN-2YHK7THHKgHInRedoByU1OXGHIztAOjYcVhq-tk4bwcAYnYh4Tw6rkQJMnIumYTRfCJcRSqnM4HGzbEMOSkO5OLvj-v635WiGTDrkXjZwvmfWjH1Ez1kYYCXHLqPZuhJ-FTN0RNbZq2HUuw9J7sEZsHSdnPZGwC4I4jc5QkoIK7pA73K1j4IWtc5rcm-pD5hB31EVZGc2Tuk0gn9ltBeRH4WxJtmHhAcVv-f5qGW95DMiOWYWQcVmqTRsDxopU-LNtkUT8YiF-7glQrayXmZedMrqHPEbD9Pv-r6UfzoCJ-7hmkZgSLnfzrbYyXCxdYpDWuKDRzJIsf) Bernie Moreno fights for the American Dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American Dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

[ ** Join Bernie ➞ **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=667f146b8fac44c8a695e73c9d33837f&_e=HVVr5pdssB4Cpn-ZRQIL8wYTKWhxRRtNO7KqyVG2g9by4myF994_aP--n1fG1dMQnU3LWesVEl9hLBzYegdsKzjq6bdpCJ4xOmySRlac1DnUSwSL5idN-2YHK7THHKgHInRedoByU1OXGHIztAOjYcVhq-tk4bwcAYnYh4Tw6rkQJMnIumYTRfCJcRSqnM4HGzbEMOSkO5OLvj-v635WiGTDrkXjZwvmfWjH1Ez1kYYCXHLqPZuhJ-FTN0RNbZq2HUuw9J7sEZsHSdnPZGwC4H1wVwmBgx07_fVd2BJm_EoHzSNzejGryf6x9o4l03yTPSrOQGl-Eo9FnJUn4aPoMZQiyLsqNVsGzS09WvLvXRQzHx4asZ_rbePTj7jQ_qh0_pQgFmQWRrKE6dWH1hrRxRY6oZRdPFsCTgAJfyNwNK2QeXHqddKcfnLywlk_uRWJ)

clean_body: I am personally calling on you to support not only my father in this critical election year but also America First patriots like Bernie Moreno in Ohio. | Well Fellow patriot, The Democrats have succeeded in their years-long crusade against my father. This is a complete and total outrage. The guilty verdict brought on by a radical, Soros-backed Democrat in a kangaroo court in New York City will forever be a stain on our nation's history. The case was rigged from the start. ⇨ First, Alvin Bragg literally campaigned on the conviction of my father. He didn’t care about truth or justice – only his and Joe Biden’s personal vendetta and political aspirations. ⇨ Then, Bragg and his leftist cronies completed their mission, pushing through a wrongful conviction based on flimsy evidence and outright lies. This was a third-world country sham trial. For God’s sake, Putin does this stuff! ⇨ Now, they have the audacity to schedule his sentencing just DAYS before the Republican National Convention. This is a blatant attempt to interfere with the upcoming election and silence MILLIONS of Americans who stand with President Trump. This is what a Banana Republic looks like, folks. What’s done is done; all we can do now is fight back, Friend. Bernie gets it. He understands that Joe Biden and the radical left aren’t after President Trump; they’re after YOU, the American People. As your next Senator, I know he will stand shoulder to shoulder with my father and fight the good fight. For America, Donald Trump Jr. Meet Bernie Moreno: | Bernie Moreno fights for the American Dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American Dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18. Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America. In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board. After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation. Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First. Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has. FOLLOW BERNIE ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Bernie Moreno for Senate Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

| I’ll try to keep this short.

As we begin what’s likely to be another busy month on the ground in West Michigan, I wanted to thank you for all your support in the past few months.

We have a lot of work to do ahead of Election Day in 5 months, and your support is making it possible. Republicans are already ramping up their spending, and it’s become clear that the path to taking back the House runs through West Michigan.

I hope you’ll continue to support my campaign in the coming weeks and months. Strong grassroots support will make the difference between a BLUE or RED House.

Appreciate your support,

Hillary

clean_body: As we begin what’s likely to be another busy month on the ground in West Michigan, I wanted to thank you for all your support in the past few months. | = | I’ll try to keep this short. As we begin what’s likely to be another busy month on the ground in West Michigan, I wanted to thank you for all your support in the past few months. We have a lot of work to do ahead of Election Day in 5 months, and your support is making it possible. Republicans are already ramping up their spending, and it’s become clear that the path to taking back the House runs through West Michigan. I hope you’ll continue to support my campaign in the coming weeks and months. Strong grassroots support will make the difference between a BLUE or RED House. name: No Dem Left Behind
subject: American History was made this week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC
body:
Trump is now a convicted felon, but this is going to motivate the MAGA base more than we have ever seen.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/maga-os?refcode=long)
---
|
---
|
# It's Official, Trump is a Convicted Felon
---
| [ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/maga-os?refcode=2025)
---
Donald Trump has been convicted on all 34 counts, making him the first former President to be **convicted as a felon.** This conviction is a huge step towards accountability and justice for America, but with it comes an **overwhelming fundraising surge by the MAGA base.** The Trump campaign claimed Friday morning that they saw a **$34.8 million fundraising boost** within the first 12 hours of the verdict being announced. The MAGA base, undeterred by the verdict, are seeing this as a rallying point to inject substantial financial support to counteract the perceived political targeting of Trump. This scenario poses a significant challenge as we approach the 2024 presidential election with a **convicted felon leading the Republican ticket.** As MAGA gears up to back Trump, we must escalate our efforts to safeguard democratic values and ensure that this surge in fundraising does not overshadow the fundamental principles of justice and accountability. It's imperative that we not only highlight the implications of this fundraising phenomenon but also actively work to counter its impact. [**Your engagement is more critical than ever as we strive to uphold the essence of democracy and counter MAGA's authoritarian ambitions. Together, we can confront these challenges and ensure our nation's principles remain intact. Your support is crucial in this pivotal fight to defend our values, our future, and America itself.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/maga-os?refcode=2025)

name: Ty Pinkins
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ty Pinkins for Congress
body:
Wanted to say thanks for an incredible May

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86088442/476800691/1023996456?refcode=RE_EM_C_240601_logo&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTA5NDgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzk5MWIxODctM2EyMC1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-y29GlwpiroK4V1EUEF0bj_kEXDLkDkUK7hZyjj9YqU=)
Hey Peter,

I’ll keep it short - I wanted to reach out to say thank you for your support last month. May was an incredible month for our campaign.

* We’re talking to our neighbors across the state and spreading the important message of putting people over politics.
* I attended the Mississippi State Democratic Convention and connected with fellow Mississippians over our shared values and work.
* Our team continues to sign up the most committed volunteers I’ve ever met.
* I hit over 100 miles in my 800 mile advocacy run across Mississippi!

And, **thanks to everyday folks like you, we hit our fundraising goal for the month** to continue this crucial work to bring our common sense solutions to the Senate. I am so proud of the momentum we’re building, and excited to see it continue to grow this summer.

I’m so grateful for your support.

-Ty Pinkins

* * *
| The son of a tractor driver, Ty doesn’t come from a wealthy family. He was born and raised in the small town of Rolling Fork, and is a proud son of the Mississippi Delta.

Frustrated by the lack of action from lawmakers on the issues facing people in Mississippi–and believing that the hard-working voters of Mississippi deserve much better–Ty Pinkins decided to run for office: the United States Senate in 2024.

[You can support Ty's campaign for U.S. Senate here:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86088443/476800692/1023996456?refcode=RE_EM_C_240601_bioboxlnk&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTA5NDgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzk5MWIxODctM2EyMC1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-y29GlwpiroK4V1EUEF0bj_kEXDLkDkUK7hZyjj9YqU=)

clean_body: Wanted to say thanks for an incredible May = Hey Peter, I’ll keep it short - I wanted to reach out to say thank you for your support last month. May was an incredible month for our campaign. We’re talking to our neighbors across the state and spreading the important message of putting people over politics. I attended the Mississippi State Democratic Convention and connected with fellow Mississippians over our shared values and work. Our team continues to sign up the most committed volunteers I’ve ever met. I hit over 100 miles in my 800 mile advocacy run across Mississippi! And, thanks to everyday folks like you, we hit our fundraising goal for the month to continue this crucial work to bring our common sense solutions to the Senate. I am so proud of the momentum we’re building, and excited to see it continue to grow this summer. I’m so grateful for your support. -Ty Pinkins * | The son of a tractor driver, Ty doesn’t come from a wealthy family. He was born and raised in the small town of Rolling Fork, and is a proud son of the Mississippi Delta. Frustrated by the lack of action from lawmakers on the issues facing people in Mississippi–and believing that the hard-working voters of Mississippi deserve much better–Ty Pinkins decided to run for office: the United States Senate in 2024. = = Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. name: Seth
subject: I am so appreciative
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress
body:
Seth is in Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.sethmagaziner.com/p/9_n7o1XMskam_GoKXFDAdg2?unsubscribedata=fFl%2FNPVJRQyR0MR1ezUYusFeKYedXb0WhWnStgHV6CMCQ47SfdWyVn33ShUq2rsIUwiE3B3DXkn1%2FdyZI0WP2m1YDzw7WilqNO4xvKeqqrKWcMkcu3W8VqI20xtfqu188D7MkXVLcjlaTzVdivcowbNjT7GO3PtetOo7c7TdO59oMWCZR9N0NtugEhDZWLdXMj4vAiFBCBhsyoX6tWO6KKGHOfpuaz0M81usRMm9aJ32eiTncsZEnLlTeRCfRGP1IZV68bzwXUlFGhHhsnSiOIC1nkzL0%2BTk9c1CaOg6PfiG6YhrocN%2FntUh4ZDv25%2ByIdgDLf8W0qCUnKN5HyfSUgj33wGxk%2BrELcXGtjlONQeaTt7XDlIbdLFtnxv5BfnsYgN%2BfxBwPzSlZDEN%2FMaVNz%2FZ2qqbaAsO5nqYWsnxumo4v4VTBVw2BeNZ6nd4lpAu)

---
Peter,

I wanted to thank you for the support you showed our campaign throughout May. We had a great fundraising month, and I’m so appreciative of this entire grassroots team for standing with us as we keep building up our campaign ahead of November.

We won in 2022 thanks to the strength of this grassroots team, and I know it’s that strength that’ll carry us to victory again this year.

Thank you for standing with me in this fight. It’s supporters like you who are the most important members of our team.

Onward,

Seth

_P.S. name: Nancy Mace
subject: Budget discussions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress
body:
My team and I have a follow-up meeting to discuss the budget next Friday at 12pm, so please help out before then. |
[ ](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=a1d3d7a2b15c4a37b0fe1403d579e858&_e=E2qvK61iBclCPx982fEp5rg5ToutUHj5C6Mb91WtHXgY6jm1ss-TuMO3MN69O3dP3xyA5nqmdMS7Qi1uYTTXRSbtuIwcaNDR5C0yCjEJJ6rXilbJEtZQtPGhMKCKulsx8KV7ShReqPnW4F4T0xwbpRXTdwgBCTEScAy4ORcCKMCXPPrFa-ddCg5M5qh0MaLt-Gjv07tvuvPldjlndT3KiFmg3HpBXPzuZ5awmuyIBggNu19Rf83QUriWxzdvjsrVjCp496DaeI5B8DE4al0B-NAe0ZHiejODN1c9UoYP2mYtihvJkzXEXJW2QuFbTe7iltJakgdCebL6qUnOdkNeizrCd9qvvLPB3fRMk3PlFxyv919CkE2d0fieAQEmyvko)
---
Fellow American, Primary Day is days away and **unless I can raise an additional $9,428 before midnight, I’m not sure I’ll have the resources to win.** I’ve spent the entire afternoon reviewing the numbers with my finance team, and here’s the short of it:

1. A few years ago, this seat was Blue, **and we barely flipped** – meaning our race is a top target for Pelosi because she knows it’s a purple district.
2. We have a strong team on the ground, _and a big chunk of our fundraising budget goes towards buying pizza for volunteers, providing yard signs to folks, and keeping this campaign running._
3. When we miss our weekly goals, even by a couple of hundred bucks, **we have to pull back on all our campaigning efforts** – and we really can’t afford to backpedal with the election just _**a few**_ days away.

[** HELP NANCY ➞ **](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=a1d3d7a2b15c4a37b0fe1403d579e858&_e=E2qvK61iBclCPx982fEp5rg5ToutUHj5C6Mb91WtHXgY6jm1ss-TuMO3MN69O3dP3xyA5nqmdMS7Qi1uYTTXRSbtuIwcaNDR5C0yCjEJJ6rXilbJEtZQtPGhMKCKulsx8KV7ShReqPnW4F4T0xwbpRXTdwgBCTEScAy4ORcCKMCXPPrFa-ddCg5M5qh0MaLt-Gjv07tvuvPldjlndT3KiFmg3HpBXPzuZ5awmuyIBgiNBuGgQj-nKLu-6zFbsc1ZK8koqXpwBsYObHG5LYaknt0FJV_Wxjbn1wUjPfrcsbWCTDuQLErWjif2QE3GN11RmLj84dKgdl12CUdcvvKoP5yji0kiEH9rXGA0HVxB9Goezbwe5ghUAYMMRz-MPk77)
So, now you see why I had to reach out. I truly wouldn’t ask for your help if I didn’t need it, but your generous donation makes a huge impact in a race like mine.

I need 49 donors to step forward to help reach our goal this week, can I count on you?

You can donate here --> [**https://secure.winred.com/team-mace/refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=a1d3d7a2b15c4a37b0fe1403d579e858&_e=E2qvK61iBclCPx982fEp5rg5ToutUHj5C6Mb91WtHXgY6jm1ss-TuMO3MN69O3dP3xyA5nqmdMS7Qi1uYTTXRSbtuIwcaNDR5C0yCjEJJ6rXilbJEtZQtPGhMKCKulsx8KV7ShReqPnW4F4T0xwbpRXTdwgBCTEScAy4ORcCKMCXPPrFa-ddCg5M5qh0MaLt-Gjv07tvuvPldjlndT3KiFmg3HpBXPzuZ5awmuyIBgiEsHonRep4_E-E2VUlJJEG3cOC5ztEc3xILo3Jwpwghfbi6vlbSXgWL3tF293TE-Va0daUPpz4Ify2dw5WU-9XeG_qiDf2dSgMXYLQk1vk26yLPIOEk933o2FXFnfGUlUlZAkMfNK0Ad8781puYm2v)

[** SUPPORT NANCY MACE ➞ **](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=a1d3d7a2b15c4a37b0fe1403d579e858&_e=E2qvK61iBclCPx982fEp5rg5ToutUHj5C6Mb91WtHXgY6jm1ss-TuMO3MN69O3dP3xyA5nqmdMS7Qi1uYTTXRSbtuIwcaNDR5C0yCjEJJ6rXilbJEtZQtPGhMKCKulsx8KV7ShReqPnW4F4T0xwbpRXTdwgBCTEScAy4ORcCKMCXPPrFa-ddCg5M5qh0MaLt-Gjv07tvuvPldjlndT3KiFmg3HpBXPzuZ5awmuyIBgi0la47k1nLS9CNCcASF_04BG5YLshOb4CpNQUYfbauK9Ll6m10-JerrZAxOczgcH4jSNPm_J00hjYvyWFgnxWtAiY1ReD_zUqial2ItASidK8WH9jjFfRxfC4a2xHKMCMOh-CdXpCHHRRqBqbMwjpA)
My team and I have a follow-up meeting to discuss the budget next Friday at 12pm, so please help out before then.

Thanks for all you’re doing.

Gratefully,

[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=a1d3d7a2b15c4a37b0fe1403d579e858&_e=E2qvK61iBclCPx982fEp5rg5ToutUHj5C6Mb91WtHXgY6jm1ss-TuMO3MN69O3dP3xyA5nqmdMS7Qi1uYTTXRSbtuIwcaNDR5C0yCjEJJ6rXilbJEtZQtPGhMKCKulsx8KV7ShReqPnW4F4T0xwbpRXTdwgBCTEScAy4ORcCKMCXPPrFa-ddCg5M5qh0MaLt-Gjv07tvuvPldjlndT3KiFmg3HpBXPzuZ5awmuyIBggMbfclWdI6twhIjT_stCxdIz3KgMTVDAOEgFeOF0sP67d5-KiIutyYMfXfirYks7EVgJHk5IdfmL_V94OK2D-GbYCRwIWXCKjzbZVa_VjGs1dK2zq-SFyyoIIGHCwsXyxYv95VWGnblChX8a_7t4xI)
Nancy Mace

P.S. I know money is tight, but truly one dollar can make a difference in a campaign like mine because these races come down to the last minute and the last dollar. So, if you only have a dollar to spare, please know how thankful I am for your support, and I hope to continue to make you proud in Congress.

| |
# About Nancy
---
Congresswoman Nancy Mace grew up in the Lowcountry. She is the daughter of a retired Army General and retired school teacher. She is a proud mother of two, the first female to graduate from The Citadel's Corps of Cadets, and a tough conservative who wants to save our country from the radicals who hate America! In 2020, she took SC-01 back from the Democrats and now, is fighting tooth and nail to keep it Red. [**JOIN NANCY**](go.txting.io/mEWDMy)

When we miss our weekly goals, even by a couple of hundred bucks, we have to pull back on all our campaigning efforts – and we really can’t afford to backpedal with the election just a few days away. So, now you see why I had to reach out. I truly wouldn’t ask for your help if I didn’t need it, but your generous donation makes a huge impact in a race like mine. I need 49 donors to step forward to help reach our goal this week, can I count on you? You can donate here --> My team and I have a follow-up meeting to discuss the budget next Friday at 12pm, so please help out before then. Thanks for all you’re doing. Gratefully, Nancy Mace P.S. I know money is tight, but truly one dollar can make a difference in a campaign like mine because these races come down to the last minute and the last dollar. So, if you only have a dollar to spare, please know how thankful I am for your support, and I hope to continue to make you proud in Congress. | | About Nancy Congresswoman Nancy Mace grew up in the Lowcountry. She is the daughter of a retired Army General and retired school teacher. She is a proud mother of two, the first female to graduate from The Citadel's Corps of Cadets, and a tough conservative who wants to save our country from the radicals who hate America! In 2020, she took SC-01 back from the Democrats and now, is fighting tooth and nail to keep it Red. go.txting.io/mEWDMy | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress Nancy Mace for Congress | 295 Seven Farms Drive, Suite C-186, Charleston, SC 29492

“I know we all have to die, but it seems like since the hospital closed, there’s a lot more people dying.” That’s what people in red state rural areas are experiencing since their local hospitals closed. Over 60 million Americans in rural areas, often older and in poorer health, face healthcare access challenges with little to no safety net. In the last 18 years, [192](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMa0dbP87jXNqxH1c_n6JmdQ2mv43QE4a5EQFFFebK3U6ZwSawg7Q8CLCjfO1cOSDKa1VbUGkqUzxEcrxVNTbrU5O88BtdfikCE83ZcoAqCX5sDSPd_rqFS5vt7sfgQx0DfBxSXb7WipFry45RIAXVnYpLlhbjQg6HMhtCstOcFKYRMkwcoUrdIS7YWKOmB50aqOgpEWTvWC4T5Xmi_MFzo4j8CkC1lzhOtJiHUSUv2w8zYFWuc0QUZd6XTf-JCIXXGp6dVAiegyHY814M-tWF4gmVG7V6yOfJYfuGl0bCjGcfmHuO6Nurz7Xi8TCXTTS_u6msMBr0E7xLi3VuuUuGdi-iT6s-68spuFP7xIvq-dy6ZN0y_4qC_e_Qf4HrbrGqw3QVFB3RcMMnHD4wmHcolK3xBYUsXnrz-S-cvq76r1n/46u/ZkUcgLC-QviPl2FFMyk9CA/h2/h001.Iq6jeNDc4J027rn4WrIEfINPGbUmtZ6-KggDqR5TnS0) rural hospitals have closed or stopped providing inpatient care. **Southern, Republican-led states lead in closures**** _because they refuse to expand Medicaid._****At Cedar Key Progress, we support Southern Democrats who will fight to expand Medicaid and save rural hospitals.** [**Will you chip in to help us turn the South blue?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquatmgZTEMuLQ1bf-_rXJuOd8kpyuJ-vdi6QSKQA6hF-w03tLv4o7tURs6EDwQp34ML90pMPRrgEQnuItHDKvVsMkSMK2vghLyRdFIVzqOSQ8bwX99raLIk6xxHFxjn2EK2EuTDrBecZOJSocc4-osiFimUzNiZz3IWjcZQ_rjpuNN28VbN7-x8OhE40dQtVS-OB3iszx-tWHJnojF4O4oZ8CZCpyREK4tcKFlOquC7EHsF2EvcKybEr0Hqujo2GUgtsqknb6GK35_7R7-ROLGpSTbzoeBKp94_LFxN5DJ06jpVE9uth6gIlW2MfEytMgYyG97wzKf3atXo03xnHshdByhp5Mg1Ag77Gy4JzMcDFg7Fw62bIqLK9DXD7nio8shk7SXc7oQW_LMzkHbiHIIybkV7L7ET8hwGpc0_SbAF8A/46u/ZkUcgLC-QviPl2FFMyk9CA/h3/h001.-fNetiX2q5rzkTk_ew6VFOaaoj4tzjQKOlNyrBGavFE) **** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

Over 60 million Americans in rural areas, often older and in poorer health, face healthcare access challenges with little to no safety net. In the last 18 years, rural hospitals have closed or stopped providing inpatient care. Southern, Republican-led states lead in closures because they refuse to expand Medicaid.At Cedar Key Progress, we support Southern Democrats who will fight to expand Medicaid and save rural hospitals. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. President Biden and the Democrats are fighting to expand Medicaid which would keep rural hospitals open! Donald Trump and the Republicans' plan to dismantle the Affordable Care Act, Medicare, and Social Security would devastate rural hospitals, stripping millions of their health care from Medicaid expansion. Healthcare is on the ballot this year. People living in rural areas are losing access to**quick, proper emergency care during life events like heart attacks, strokes, and childbirth. Thanks for your support. -Cedar Key Progress | Cedar Key Progress support Democrats in competitive Southern districts who are building a diverse, inclusive, and just future. To donate by check, send to: Cedar Key Progress c/o Left Ledger 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- Paid for by Cedar Key Progress and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to Cedar Key Progress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . Folks, June marks the beginning of hurricane season. Floridians aren't strangers to the threat of hurricanes, uplifting communities and displacing families. **We need to take their threat seriously.** Forecasters are predicting an especially dangerous hurricane season this year. They've even determined that Florida has a 44% chance of a major hurricane making landfall on its coastline — higher than any other state. I'm not saying this to alarm you, folks — I'm saying it so that you're prepared. Food, water, medicine, and batteries are among the most essential items that you'll need in the event of a major hurricane. Please listen to your local authorities as they provide guidance for your safety — I cannot stress this enough. As our state's former Director of Emergency Management, I can tell you firsthand that decisions for your safety aren't made lightly. Our team worked hard to mitigate disasters, and when record-level hurricanes ripped through our state, I led the response effort. We rebuilt and came out stronger than we were before. We need to face the science, too: climate change will only worsen future hurricane seasons. Folks, I promise I didn't mean to ruin your weekend! I simply want you to be prepared. We're all better off when we're safer. Thanks for taking the time to read. \- Jared
| | Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P.O. Box 8784, Coral Springs, FL 33065

Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle. clean_body: | = Hey there, We're just two months away from the July primary, and we need your help. We need your help to boost our efforts, support Democrats through the primary, and mobilize voters to get out and vote on or before July 30th.= Arizona will be the nation's top battleground state in 2024. Just a few seats stand between us and a blue state legislature. Only five seats are keeping Democrats from taking the House majority. And Arizona's next senator could be the difference maker in expanding or losing our Senate majority. The Arizona GOP is extreme and doesn't represent the majority of Arizonans. They are working in lockstep with Donald Trump and the extreme right to corrupt our democracy. That's why we're reaching out to you today. We need your support to fight against these extremism in the GOP, election deniers, and conspiracy theorists. Growing up in Western Pennsylvania, I learned early on what it meant to be a fighter, to stand up for others when they couldn't stand up for themselves. My experiences — caring for my brother with muscular dystrophy, supporting my family after my father went to jail, and taking on powerful special interests and corruption as Auditor General — have shaped me and my commitment to public service.
My entire life has been about fighting for others. As Auditor General, I fought to ensure justice for survivors of sexual assault, worked tirelessly to protect our children, stood up for women's rights, and rooted out corruption, fraud and abuse.
**Now, I want to continue fighting for you as your next Attorney General.**
There are extremists out there – like Donald Trump and my opponent – who are actively working to take away our rights. They want to ban abortion, limit voting rights, and upend our democracy. You deserve an Attorney General who will fight to defend your rights whenever anyone tries to take them away.
That’s why I’m running for Attorney General, and it’s why I need your help now. Because if we’re going to defeat political extremism in PA, we’re going to have to stand together to get the job done.
[_**Please, chip in $1 or more today to help this pro-choice, pro-democracy movement win big in November — the stakes are too high to sit on the sidelines →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86091436/476806945/-1397060137?refcode=email_060124_One-year&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWI1MDdlNi00MDIwLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7c4pzdVof64KhOOXoIwJjX14uGT3kBXhLJLebSDukTQ=)
