name: Heather G.
subject: I'm gay
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Hi friend — Here’s something you may not know about me: **I’m gay.** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/69740?t=6&akid=14936%2E878179%2Eqirn4R) Pride Month is a time when we are supposed to be celebrating the countless qualities that make people beautifully different.

But this year, it’s tough to celebrate when extremist Republicans are doubling down on their hateful bills to target LGBTQ+ people like me.

They’re banning gender-affirming care for trans kids.

They’re targeting drag shows.

They’re silencing discussions about pronouns and LGBTQ+ history in schools.

They’re allowing religious entities to discriminate against LGBTQ+ people.

They’re forcing trans people to use bathrooms that don’t correspond to their gender identity...**and so much more.

**The recent uptick in anti-LGBTQ+ bills is not only heartbreaking; but also illustrates how long of a way we have to go to secure equal rights and protections for LGBTQ+ folks like me. And that starts with voting out every single homophobic, bigoted Republican at the ballot box.**

[The Voter Protection Project is dedicated to replacing these same Republicans with Democrats who are dedicated to guaranteeing equality for _all_ LGBTQ+ people. If you support our mission, will you chip in anything you can in honor of Pride Month to help us continue our work? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/69740?t=7&akid=14936%2E878179%2Eqirn4R)** | [CONTRIBUTE $7 NOW »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/69740?t=8&akid=14936%2E878179%2Eqirn4R)
---
Here’s what Republicans don’t want you to know: **80% of Americans support anti-discriminatory laws that support LGBTQ+ people.**

_But they’ll suppress the right to vote to ensure they can stay in power so they can keep fueling their anti-LGBTQ+ agenda._

I’m fed up with watching folks in my community be targeted, silenced, and attacked for choosing to live as their authentic selves.

[If you are too, will contribute to the Voter Protection Project today? Every dollar donated to this email will go towards combating Republicans’ attacks on the ballot box while electing Democrats who will push for LGBTQ+ protections. »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/69740?t=9&akid=14936%2E878179%2Eqirn4R)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/69741?t=10&akid=14936%2E878179%2Eqirn4R)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/69742?t=11&akid=14936%2E878179%2Eqirn4R)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/69743?t=12&akid=14936%2E878179%2Eqirn4R)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/69744?t=13&akid=14936%2E878179%2Eqirn4R)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/69740?t=14&akid=14936%2E878179%2Eqirn4R)
Thanks and happy Pride Month!

—Heather G.
Executive Director
_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=14936%2E878179%2Eqirn4R). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=14936%2E878179%2Eqirn4R).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=14936%2E878179%2Eqirn4R) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=14936%2E878179%2Eqirn4R). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=14936%2E878179%2Eqirn4R)

subject: Guilty.

body:
Don’t even get us started about his dirty deals with Big Oil.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86092294/476809276/1328794144?refcode=ea.5e4195de-4120-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.5e4195de-4120-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVlNDE5NWRlLTQxMjAtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=S4hufl81RgZQ1aNcAcJ-kyN097IlNAer97DOGI2-sVE=&emci=0311ccd6-4120-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=5e4195de-4120-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=4823105)
---
**G U I L T Y.** That's right, team. Former President Donald Trump has been convicted by a jury of his peers on 34 felony counts related to his "hush money" trial; he now stands as the first former president in U.S. history to be a convicted felon. This trial exposed what we have always known: **Trump’s corruption knows no bounds, and he will _do anything_ to gain power.** But this isn't just about hush money. It’s about a pattern of deceit and greed that extends far beyond his actions in this case. **Just last month, Trump sat down with Big Oil executives and presented them with a quid pro quo: give his campaign $1 billion, and he’ll reverse President Biden’s environmental policies on DAY ONE of his second term.** Yes, you read that right. In a room full of billionaires who’ve made their fortunes on the back of a burning planet, Trump was making dirty deals to sell out our future for his own political gain. And a couple of weeks later, two Big Oil billionaires, Harold Hamm, “the Fracking King” and Kelcy Warren, the tycoon behind the Dakota Access Pipeline, made good on that promise by throwing a _massive_ fundraiser for Trump in Texas. It's clear that Donald Trump's corruption runs deep, and his alliance with the fossil fuel industry is a direct threat to our climate and our future. **And despite his recent conviction, Donald Trump still has a very real chance of winning the presidency, and with it, inflicting irreversible damage to our planet.[The Jane Fonda Climate PAC is fighting back by supporting candidates at every level of government across the country who will do everything they can to hold bad actors like Trump accountable for _all_ of the harm they've caused. Can we count on you to make a $34 contribution today to power our work?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86092297/476809277/2105508926?amount=34&refcode=ea.5e4195de-4120-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.5e4195de-4120-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVlNDE5NWRlLTQxMjAtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=S4hufl81RgZQ1aNcAcJ-kyN097IlNAer97DOGI2-sVE=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**DONATE $5**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86092301/476809282/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.5e4195de-4120-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.5e4195de-4120-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVlNDE5NWRlLTQxMjAtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=S4hufl81RgZQ1aNcAcJ-kyN097IlNAer97DOGI2-sVE=) | [**DONATE $34**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/86092304/476809287/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=34&refcode=ea.5e4195de-4120-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.5e4195de-4120-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVlNDE5NWRlLTQxMjAtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=S4hufl81RgZQ1aNcAcJ-kyN097IlNAer97DOGI2-sVE=)

name: David Hogg, Leaders We Deserve
subject: You may not agree with this…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
The real threat is the itch that so many people have for one charismatic leader to fix all of our problems.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20240601-1&t=1&akid=757%2E587540%2EMVYrZm)
Peter,
**This might be a bit of a hot take, but the biggest threat to the future of American democracy is not the convicted felon Donald Trump.** And it’s not the MAGA Republicans in Congress and state legislatures who enable him, either.
The real threat is the itch that so many people have for one charismatic leader to come along who’s perfect in every way and will magically fix all of our problems. Just one good guy who’s “not owned by anyone” and can fix everything.
Because when you really think about it, that’s not the description of a leader in a healthy and functioning democracy. **It’s the description of a dictator.**
So we can’t end this threat just by defeating Donald Trump in November or outliving him as our candidates will (_Thank God!_). What we need is a long-term investment in our democracy — by electing the best possible people to serve in government and defend our democracy. Not by having one person who comes along to fix it all at the cost of our democracy, but 30 of our nation's best and brightest young people to protect our democracy by showing that, while the system is broken, it’s not impossible to make it better. People who don’t take corporate money and who actually fight for their constituents.
I know this will work because I am already seeing it. Just the other day when I was door knocking with Leaders We Deserve endorsed candidate Molly Cook's campaign — I knocked on the door of a 20-year-old named Kai. When I told him about Molly and the election he said she sounds great, but “what corporations are funding her?” I was able to say none are — because as a Leaders We Deserve endorsee she agrees to not take corpprate money. I immediately saw his face shift from a look of suspicion to excitement. He then said, “I don’t usually vote in elections for state legislature, but she sounds awesome.” I got his phone number for the campaign to make sure he got out and had no problems voting, and he did! **Molly won by only 74 votes.**
**That’s why Leaders We Deserve is focused on building up young leaders who can fight back against this threat, today and for decades to come. And to fight the threat hopelessness and apathy pose to our democracy.**
But we can’t do our work without your support, Peter. We don’t take corporate donations — we rely on grassroots donations. Please consider making a donation so I can focus more on the work an less on editing emails at 30,000 feet as I am doing right now!
**[If you’re ready to help us elect each of the fantastic 13 young progressive leaders we’ve endorsed across the country, pitch in $5 today to support our work. The future of American democracy really is on the line.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240601-1?refcode=em20240601-1&amount=5&refcode2=757_587540_MVYrZm&akid=757%2E587540%2EMVYrZm)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240601-1?amount=5&refcode=em20240601-1-757&refcode2=757_587540_MVYrZm&akid=757%2E587540%2EMVYrZm)**
Thanks,
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20240601-1&t=2&refcode2=757_587540_MVYrZm&akid=757%2E587540%2EMVYrZm)**

subject: Happy Pride Month! Join Hill Harper in Celebrating Love and Equality 🌈

body:
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/421?t=1&akid=1259%2E62735%2Ewc2ldV)
Hey, Peter, it’s Hill —
**Happy Pride Month! 🌈[
](https://act.hillharper.com/go/1600?t=2&akid=1259%2E62735%2Ewc2ldV)**
As we come together to celebrate the incredible diversity and strength of the LGBTQ+ community, I am filled with hope and determination. This month, we honor the trailblazers who have fought for equality and the vibrant community that continues to inspire us all.
Pride is more than just a celebration; it's a call to action. It's a reminder that while we have made significant strides, the fight for full equality and acceptance is far from over. Discrimination, violence, and inequality still plague our society, and it's up to us to continue the march towards justice.
I'm Hill Harper, and I am running for the U.S. Senate because I believe in a future where everyone, regardless of their sexual orientation or gender identity, can live freely and authentically. A future where love and equality are not just ideals but realities.
This Pride Month, I am reaffirming my commitment to:
**Fight for Comprehensive LGBTQ+ Rights:** Ensuring equal protection under the law for all LGBTQ+ individuals.
**Support Transgender Rights:** Advocating for the rights of transgender people, including access to healthcare, education, and employment without discrimination.
**Combat Hate Crimes:** Strengthening laws and resources to prevent and respond to hate crimes targeting the LGBTQ+ community.
But I can't do it alone. **[I need your support to bring these changes to the Senate. Please consider supporting my campaign today with $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford.](https://act.hillharper.com/go/1601?t=3&akid=1259%2E62735%2Ewc2ldV) **Your contributions fuel this campaign and allow us to talk to voters all across Michigan about important issues like equality for all regardless of their sexual orientation or gender identity.
Together, we can create a nation where everyone is celebrated for who they are. Let's make this Pride Month not just a celebration, but a movement towards real change.
Thank you for your support. Wishing you a joyous and empowering Pride Month!
-HH
[](https://act.hillharper.com/go/1026?t=4&akid=1259%2E62735%2Ewc2ldV)
**[P.S. - Check out a video I recorded today from my coffee shop where we proudly display the Pride flag not just during Pride month but all year round.](https://act.hillharper.com/go/1601?t=5&akid=1259%2E62735%2Ewc2ldV)**
* * *
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bax_hh_email?refcode=bax_hh_emailfooter&t=6&refcode2=1259_62735_wc2ldV&akid=1259%2E62735%2Ewc2ldV)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

To give by check:
Hill Harper for Michigan

Lansing, MI 48901

name: Colin Allred for Senate
subject: “Ted Cruz refuses to commit to accept 2024 election results”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Did you see Ted Cruz's interview?
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
We all saw with our own eyes what happened after the 2020 election: Ted Cruz cheered on the mob on January 6, led the objection to the election results certification, and then hid in a supply closet.
And spoiler alert: He's ready to do it again.
We can’t let him. This November is our chance to finally hold him accountable by kicking him out of the Senate for good.
Polls currently show him and Colin Allred TIED in Texas, but this is shaping up to be the most expensive race in the country. So please, will you chip in $100, $50, $10, or whatever to Colin’s campaign and Serve America to help Colin defeat Ted Cruz and bring real, pro-democracy leadership to Texas? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Ted Cruz has proven time and again to be the single most divisive politician in Washington. From leading the charge on the 2012 government shutdown to ushering in an era of extreme hyper-partisanship and pitting Americans against each other with dangerous, extremist rhetoric. Ted isn't just Texans' problem – he's ALL AMERICANS’ problem.
Ted Cruz's refusal to commit to accepting election results is exactly the kind of rhetoric that led to January 6, and another six years of him in the Senate is a danger our democracy simply can’t afford.
As a former voting rights lawyer, Colin knows firsthand how critical it is that we all remain committed to protecting our democracy and ensuring that something like January 6 never happens again. Texans deserve a leader who respects our democracy – and Colin will unequivocally accept the results of this election.
If you agree that Ted Cruz's extreme, anti-democracy rhetoric needs to go, please chip in now to Colin and Serve America to help us defeat him. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Thanks for joining us in the fight to protect our democracy,
Team Allred
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]

Friend — Republicans here in Florida have one leading philosophy, and that's to _take_ our rights and freedoms away.
From Ron DeSantis' abortion ban — one of the most extreme in the entire nation — to attacks on voting rights, the GOP is intent on controlling everything according to their right-wing ideology. **Not even our kids' book are off limits: Ron DeSantis is leading the charge to ban books, censor what our kids learn, and rewrite history according to his own untruthful interpretation.**
Thankfully, we have Democrats like Debbie Mucarsel-Powell fighting for our education system, and she's determined to fight for our public schools, librarians, and teachers — because politicians shouldn't be censoring our schools and interfering in what our kids learn.
**But in a fight this urgent, it's critical that grassroots Democrats like you speak out. So we've launched an urgent poll****and are counting on 9,450 responses****, including yours, friend. Tell us:**
**DO YOU SUPPORT BOOK BANS?**

name: Lanon Baccam
subject: Phase 2: Loading…
body:
www.lanonbaccam.com [www.lanonbaccam.com]
Peter,

I want to start by saying thank you to all who have chipped in their hard-earned dollars to support our campaign last month.

We are working hard every day galvanizing grassroots support for this campaign and growing our movement to unseat Zach Nunn on November 5. And Peter, we couldn’t have made such incredible strides without your support.

June is a major checkpoint on the road to unseating Zach Nunn. From our fundraising, to the number of folks we turn out on our first election day next Tuesday, National Republicans will be watching our campaign like a hawk.

And with Republican Super PACs already planning to spend millions in IA-03, we know that Zach Nunn can turn to his party leaders for a cash infusion at a moment’s notice.

Folks, we’re entering June in a great spot. But we also know that our campaign — and Zach Nunn’s — are really going to start ramping up after this month’s primary. As we start preparing for the next phase of this race, your continued support will be crucial.

Thank you again for your continued support,

— Lanon Baccam

P.S. If you’ve been meaning to but have not had a chance to make a small contribution, you can do so here and help us gear up for the next phase of our campaign. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/LBIA-03-Email-June2024-FR-June?&refcode=E8787-20240601-EOMThankYou-SL-DeadlineEOM&amount=25]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbia-03-email-May2024-fr-May?refcode=E8787-20240601-EOMThankYou-footer-DeadlineEOM&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbia-03-email-May2024-fr-May?refcode=E8787-20240601-EOMThankYou-footer-DeadlineEOM&amount=25]
Lanon Baccam is a veteran, a lifelong Iowan, and now, he's running to restore principled, effective leadership in Washington. The 2022 election in Iowa’s Third was decided by less than seven-tenths of a percent - that's why CNN's Anderson Cooper has called this race a toss-up. Right now, we have a real opportunity to flip this district from red to blue — but we need your help to finish this fight and take back the House in 2024.
DONATE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbia-03-email-May2024-fr-May?refcode=E8787-20240601-EOMThankYou-footer-DeadlineEOM&amount=25]
Lanon's campaign to flip Iowa's Third Congressional District and take back the House is fueled by grassroots supporters like you, Peter. We want to make sure you're getting our latest updates, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can click here to unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/s5InDMXi8EC0qnjjUXh5Pg2?unsubscribedata=BEGXEAlI9Xz6cHFXC5VtMOzDqgPuqj4CFs4TJD3fxPCwHoAOkhjLFk2SPd9ovBqeit3Seq1GXCkulHSrch5nZBoEg8ua5oL3JdeNp4y%2Bs9wys9tmSTFLL1OEpLE0rg7rxXKRm%2B4pS%2BNJw1qV5M3yHblxF%2BvR7xuT1L5HWiIpwzDCNevCyxE5s2qoiqvXcZv8Ks0eHVVahi8mVZewVbXl%2Bd1sWO3pmRuyzYI8TOyiq9%2BSlkLe47wZftx%2Bt9CVSv1JruBpX0ObKOOSdu%2Bj4MGV9MvLo%2B25kqFLQ8y2uTY1f5tV4dhxfsVVpJ%2Bge%2BOGIH%2FOAT%2BDGsKs2cHSQ7bi%2B1VK0EZoHSLpyX5Tx4hT8fPGS%2F9F4EhwvGatBJd7OKOHR0qlQdi7nc67Lr61c2Y%2FHclIWNkiOknkVOIaaMJ%2FRAF0vLLKLBg6xo%2BusQg3Q9iUruLS .

* Independents outnumber Republicans __and__ Democrats nearly 2 to 1.

But that’s not all.
In my new video, I explain the results of the most comprehensive Presidential Poll taken to date–to over 26,000 Americans–with a margin of error of almost zero.
It is critical you watch my new [video](http://www.kennedy24.com/may31?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=weekly_newsletter_6_1_24_a1&n=5) and see for yourself how I can win the White House.

body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis — House GOP
Speaker Mike Johnson is bringing Netanyahu over to give a speech in
Congress. Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer signed the invite letter
too. And it’s unclear where some Democratic party leaders stand on
Netanyahu’s speech, even as the Israeli military bombs civilian tent camps
and kills tens of thousands of Palestinians.

It’s clear where Bernie stands. Bernie said Netanyahu’s speech is a
terrible idea and that he would boycott the speech.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17895?t=1011&akid=6102%2E5885482%2EdS-2X2 ][IMG]

Netanyahu has led the onslaught on the Palestinian people, cut off aid,
and broken international humanitarian law. No Democrat should show up to
his speech and Schumer should make every effort to stop this speech.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17896?source=email-20240601&t=1012&akid=6102%2E5885482%2EdS-2X2 ]Add your name: Majority Leader Schumer and all Democrats should OPPOSE
Netanyahu giving a speech before Congress!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17896?source=email-20240601&t=1013&akid=6102%2E5885482%2EdS-2X2 ]ADD YOUR NAME

Netanyahu’s atrocities in Gaza have become a cynical political tool for
Republicans like Mike Johnson. The GOP cares more about logging political
points than taking any sort of moral position on what the Israeli military
is doing in Gaza. The leader of war crimes in Gaza, destruction, and mass
starvation has no place in front of Congress.

There’s no doubt Netanyahu will use a Congressional speech to spread lies
and lash out at Democrats, just like he did the last time he addressed
Congress. It’s exactly what Republicans want and Democrats should fight it
at every turn.

It shouldn’t just be Bernie saying he’ll boycott a Netanyahu speech to
Congress, it’s all Democrats — especially the Democrat leading in the
Senate, Chuck Schumer.

clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] Peter Willis — House GOP Speaker Mike Johnson is bringing Netanyahu over to give a speech in Congress. Senate Majority Leader Chuck Schumer signed the invite letter too. And it’s unclear where some Democratic party leaders stand on Netanyahu’s speech, even as the Israeli military bombs civilian tent camps and kills tens of thousands of Palestinians. It’s clear where Bernie stands. Bernie said Netanyahu’s speech is a terrible idea and that he would boycott the speech. [ ][IMG] Netanyahu has led the onslaught on the Palestinian people, cut off aid, and broken international humanitarian law. No Democrat should show up to his speech and Schumer should make every effort to stop this speech. [ ]Add your name: Majority Leader Schumer and all Democrats should OPPOSE Netanyahu giving a speech before Congress! [ ]ADD YOUR NAME Netanyahu’s atrocities in Gaza have become a cynical political tool for Republicans like Mike Johnson. The GOP cares more about logging political points than taking any sort of moral position on what the Israeli military is doing in Gaza. The leader of war crimes in Gaza, destruction, and mass starvation has no place in front of Congress. There’s no doubt Netanyahu will use a Congressional speech to spread lies and lash out at Democrats, just like he did the last time he addressed Congress. It’s exactly what Republicans want and Democrats should fight it at every turn. It shouldn’t just be Bernie saying he’ll boycott a Netanyahu speech to Congress, it’s all Democrats — especially the Democrat leading in the Senate, Chuck Schumer. [ ]Add your name: Democrats must say loud and clear that they reject Netanyahu’s planned address to Congress. When we organize, we win. name: Jill Stein 2024
subject: 3 MORE STATES!!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jill Stein for President 2024
body:
Jill now has 279 potential Electoral Votes, and counting.

| | | [ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ballot_access_update_june_1st&n=1)
---
Peter,****
---
We are on the ballot in 3 more states as of the end of May, bringing our total to 23 states where voters will have an alternative to the parties of war and Wall Street. **_Our people, peace, planet campaign is on the move!_** In Georgia, a new law was put in place that will allow Jill to be on the ballot by virtue of her becoming the Green Party nominee in August. In Washington state, volunteers have gathered over 1,200 signatures in just a few weeks and are adding to that number daily. In Delaware, we are nearing the threshold of 770 registered Greens to get us on the ballot. In Ohio, we have close to 8,000 signatures and should be turning in even more than that by the end of June. In Nevada, we have turned in 27,000 signatures, more than twice the required number. In Alaska, we will be submitting 6,000 signatures this week. In Idaho, the Secretary of State has approved our petition, confirming that Jill will be on the ballot there. Illinois and Indiana are our next two deadlines and we are pulling out all the stops to make sure we succeed. Ballot access has been the biggest expense of our campaign but these costs are necessary if we want to give voters a pro-worker, anti-genocide, climate action candidate in November. **_Our fundraising goal to cover these costs is $500,000 in June for Illinois and Indiana._** **_Can you give Jill a boost today with a $_****23**** _dollar donation in honor of the_****23**** _states where we currently have ballot access and help us hit our critical fundraising_**** _goal for June?_**
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?amount=23&e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ballot_access_update_june_1st&n=2 "DONATE $23") [DONATE $23](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?amount=23&e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ballot_access_update_june_1st&n=2)
---
Thank you so much for your support in this fight! We couldn’t do it without you! **-The Jill Stein 2024 team** PS - _The fight to get on the ballot in New York isn’t over! See Jill's latest update on our New York ballot access fight[here](https://www.jillstein2024.com/r?u=PFt0RQJG8CjCGB0W6jg0LG-pmkYeT4NN2KK09BEs9O4GVW767XteKW0-7_cXkjTKKkZq-DOjoPqCJ-tJGZd3QA&e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ballot_access_update_june_1st&n=3). Stay tuned for important updates **AND** check out the latest ballot access map update. It now includes the ability for supporters to register Green or register to vote in every state!_
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/r?u=BFwwhTAHJNQLkngxVomgakAnPpfzwc0Lda1AFOHNqTeB4MP2jzSnFFDvSFCfPet2&e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ballot_access_update_june_1st&n=4 "Ballot Access Map") [Ballot Access Map](https://www.jillstein2024.com/r?u=BFwwhTAHJNQLkngxVomgakAnPpfzwc0Lda1AFOHNqTeB4MP2jzSnFFDvSFCfPet2&e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ballot_access_update_june_1st&n=4)

I'm so incredibly grateful to you, Peter.

Thank you for being by my side in yet another battleground race in Nevada that will decide Senate control. Your grassroots support means the world to me.

That's why I wish I had better news to share: **Unfortunately, my finance team just told me we didn't reach our May fundraising goal last night.**

Now that _The Cook Political Report_ downgraded my race to a “toss up,” we know that the fight ahead isn't going to be easy – especially with dark money groups like the Koch network pouring _millions_ into Nevada to defeat me. **But with folks like you on my team, I know we can get our fundraising back on track and have a real shot at keeping Nevada and the Senate blue.**

body:
My name is Patrick Stauffer, and I’m the Chief Financial Officer at the Democratic National Committee. | |
---
Hey Derek, My name is Patrick Stauffer, and I’m the Chief Financial Officer at the Democratic National Committee. My job is to make sure we are not only raising enough money to elect Joe Biden and Democrats everywhere, but to help make sure the donations we receive are spent in the most cost-effective way. Today, I'm writing to ask you to make a donation to the DNC. Now I’m sure you didn't wake up this morning, jump out of bed and scream “Today is the day I am donating to the DNC!” but I hope you will. **Yesterday, Trump announced he raised more than $50 million after his conviction -- this is an all-hands-on-deck moment for Democrats everywhere.** $7, that's the ask. $7 to help reelect Joe Biden. $7 to help Democrats take the House and defend the Senate. $7 to elect Democrats everywhere – from school boards to state houses to the White House. No donation is too small, I know that better than anyone. All that matters is that you are chipping in. The number of donations we'll receive from Democrats like you will take care of the rest. [Can you please use this link to contribute $7 (or whatever you can afford) directly to the Democratic National Committee to help elect Democrats across the country?](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvpOShxPWr9mFhJMw1S-wTtvhltHWfNwNtDIaYBJbNv2OiYGsvOb7Ojyb0iUS8Qi3Ts5joF2w3PZ48a7NUHCdODY0YDMXC1_mhDkm8m4hnxv4778wkA17T6zRm7QXo9xhW7svkzbjpEywrjmfbguSbt_UG3PVd_uQqGXKJvgrsh9VYJQq4inioccY6l_uUxJUmDWVFgOzyfoHxz-1lzMKzzUZ5uzoNVjo5BYN6wPxzCP8i0knT-lB8w6dWTe2gWaMWNVce7qwjBO0loW3FG7xsx2EByHFdtUaD7R6mb6WAHUUisN6HOOUhVibnZgQJUfxTUM2uHKpR6oyshnQ_QjiJOyru_mc-V2hhSUYnBFha7hA/46u/0oISkTqiR-qd6HTuCoby1Q/h0/h001.Gx7kIjeYWJuIVLjK8d5qx88Z_i5p8YOJh85SGz0Lzdo)

clean_body: My name is Patrick Stauffer, and I’m the Chief Financial Officer at the Democratic National Committee. | | Hey Derek, My name is Patrick Stauffer, and I’m the Chief Financial Officer at the Democratic National Committee. My job is to make sure we are not only raising enough money to elect Joe Biden and Democrats everywhere, but to help make sure the donations we receive are spent in the most cost-effective way. Today, I'm writing to ask you to make a donation to the DNC. Now I’m sure you didn't wake up this morning, jump out of bed and scream “Today is the day I am donating to the DNC!” but I hope you will. Yesterday, Trump announced he raised more than $50 million after his conviction -- this is an all-hands-on-deck moment for Democrats everywhere. $7, that's the ask. $7 to help reelect Joe Biden. $7 to help Democrats take the House and defend the Senate. $7 to elect Democrats everywhere – from school boards to state houses to the White House. No donation is too small, I know that better than anyone. All that matters is that you are chipping in. The number of donations we'll receive from Democrats like you will take care of the rest. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | ---|--- | | Thank you for your support. When Democrats win in November, please know the donation you made today was a big reason why. name: Janelle Bynum
subject: Is Lori Chavez-DeRemer going to stand by her man?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JANELLE BYNUM FOR CONGRESS
body:
Did you catch me on the news, friend?

Yesterday, I went on to talk about the 2024 election and the impact it will have not just for Oregon, but for this country.

My opponent, Lori Chavez-DeRemer gave Trump a full-throated endorsement, and now that he's a 34-time convicted felon, my question is, is she going to stand by her man?

Is she going to stand by Oregonians, or is she going to stand by her man?
Is she going to play party politics, or is she going to stand by her man?
Is she going to stand up for the rule of law or stand by her man?

I, unfortunately, think we know the answer. With these extremists in Washington, willing to do anything to stay in power, we’ll never see progress on issues that would help families across Oregon.

If Democrats are going to take back the House Majority in November, defeating Lori Chavez-DeRemer and winning OR-05 is one of our best opportunities to do that.

So, friend, can I count on you to stand by me? To stand for truth and justice? To stand and fight with me for working class Oregonians? Chip in now to stand with me and help flip this seat and deliver on progress for this state and country.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bynumq22024?refcode=em_fr_2024.06.01_b1_jb_all

Thank you,
Janelle

Janelle Bynum is running to represent Oregon's Fifth Congressional District. With a reputation as a tireless champion for real progress, Janelle has worked in the State Legislature to safeguard our rights, lower costs, and create pathways to success for the next generation. Oregon's 5th District is one of the most competitive – and most flippable – seats in the country. Janelle has what it takes to win, but she can't do it without you. Will you make a grassroots donation today?
DONATE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bynumq22024?refcode=em_fr_2024.056.01_b1_jb_all-nd&amount=5]

Janelle Bynum is running for in Oregon's 5th Congressional District. To learn more, please visit JanelleBynum.com [https://www.janellebynum.com/] .
PAID FOR BY JANELLE BYNUM FOR CONGRESS
Janelle Bynum For Congress
10121 SE Sunnyside Road
#300
Clackamas, OR 97015
United States [#]

name: Adam Schiff
subject: The federal judiciary
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=6593%2E5257348%2EazjCRe ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, the
New York Times recently reported that conservative Supreme Court Justice
Samuel Alito (or, in his telling, his wife) flew insurrectionist flags at
their homes in Virginia and New Jersey following the January 6th attack on
the Capitol.

Conservative Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas’ wife attended Trump’s
Stop the Steal rally on January 6th and coordinated with Trump Chief of
Staff Mark Meadows about how to steal the election.

Following Trump’s appointments of Neil Gorsuch, Brett Kavanaugh, and Amy
Coney Barrett, for the first time in American history, a majority of
current Supreme Court justices have been appointed by presidents who lost
the popular vote.

And in a shocking political gift to Donald Trump, they have delayed
hearing the Justice Department’s January 6th case. And as we all know,
justice delayed is justice denied.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=june2024_abs_em.iyuBSf&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240601_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=1&t=1004&akid=6593%2E5257348%2EazjCRe ]This is what a far-right MAGA takeover of the federal judiciary looks
like. I need your help to win our race, defend the Senate, and defeat
Trump to restore balance and sanity to the courts. Please,
Derek, chip in
$1.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

$50

$100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=june2024_abs_em.iyuBSf&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240601_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=6593%2E5257348%2EazjCRe ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Ever since the 2020 election, Democrats have steadily been fighting back
to restore balance to the Supreme Court. The Biden Administration recently
surpassed the Trump Administration’s pace of judicial confirmations with
their 200th federal judicial appointment last week, including 127 women,
and unprecedented diversity among Black, Hispanic, Asian, Native Hawaiian,
and Pacific Islander jurists confirmed to the bench.

As a former Assistant U.S. Attorney, I never could have imagined the
current politicization of the Supreme Court under Donald Trump and Mitch
McConnell. And I cannot emphasize enough the importance of not only this
presidential election, but winning our race in California and defending
the Senate majority as well.

Derek, with so
many court proceedings and competing narratives, I’ll make this as clear
as I can:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=june2024_abs_em.iyuBSf&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240601_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=6593%2E5257348%2EazjCRe ]Defeating Trump this November and defending the Senate majority is our
only option. His supporters have proven time and again that no Trump
transgression or felony conviction is enough to lose their support. And if
he wins, he may never see accountability. Chip in any amount to help stop
him.

Thanks for your support.

— Adam

Hello Peter,

I hope this message finds you well. We're excited to invite you to join us for a special rally supporting Mark Burns for Congress.
This event is a fantastic opportunity to show your support for Mark and connect with fellow President Donald Trump supporters in
Laurens County.

Event Details:

* Date: Saturday, June 1st

* Time: 6:00 PM

* Location: Irene's of Laurens | 900 E. Main St. C. Laurens, SC

At this rally, you'll have the chance to meet Mark Burns, ask him questions about his campaign, and learn more about how he plans
to serve Laurens County and beyond. Plus, we'll be giving away free signs to show your support!

But wait, there's more Every attendee will receive a complimentary meal, courtesy of our generous hosts at Irene's of Laurens.
It's going to be a great afternoon of fellowship, food, and politics!

Please respond to this email, letting us know how many are coming with you.

We look forward to seeing you there and working together to support Mark Burns for Congress. Let's make our voices heard and stand
united in our support for conservative values and leadership.

Thank you for your continued dedication and support.

Best regards,

Team Burns

We're kicking things into high gear, friend!
With only five months to go until Election Day – and the general election against our opponent, Bernie Moreno (R), officially underway – the stakes have never been higher. **That's why we're putting everything we've got into winning this race.

Here are just a few things we've rolled out in the past few weeks:**
* We launched a brand-new website to connect with supporters and make it as easy as possible for new folks to join Team Sherrod. 💻
* We're opening field offices across Ohio to recruit volunteers, knock on doors, and talk to voters. 🏢
* We went live with new TV ads to reach voters with our pro-worker message and compete with the GOP's nasty attack ads. 📺
* And we just dropped new merch just in time for the summer heat! 👕

But here's the deal, friend – everything we're doing takes resources. And thanks to supporters like you, we've been able to come this far. **But to compete with our self-funding opponent and the GOP's dark-money megadonors, we need folks like you chipping in early and often so we can keep it up.**
**[That's why we need to ask: Will you chip in $5 or more right now? Thanks for your support.

– Team Sherrod
**Please read on for a personal message from Sen. Sherrod Brown:** Friend – thank you for being a part of our grassroots movement and for sharing our commitment to the Dignity of Work. Fighting for workers means building an economy that prioritizes the needs of workers over tax breaks for billionaires and corporations. No matter who you are or what kind of work you do, I promise to fight for you. But I need your help: Experts say I'm one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection and Senate control could come down to Ohio. body:
| American Patriot,

**_I 'm getting nervous._**

Despite my attempts to reach out to you time and time again, you have yet to respond to any of my messages.

It's especially concerning to me that you're the _only Republican_ in your area who's not engaging with your email.

**_Are you abandoning hope?_**

Please, don't give up so soon. The fight's not over until we lose grassroots support from voters like you.

So, I'll leave you with this challenging question: _Where do your priorities lie?_

Take a look at what I sent you, **[and consider making a difference for conservative campaigns in danger of collapse.](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=9a3828666c924301a916f38925e74d2a&_e=0gkCZtki8XXNIWxDxqZtT1IDQWBY6aU_ZoB1zI-CuKJ9dkuA9B5Rxuf9R84tbpxWEp5MJMGAJBALxHFkFfgwEiyHudbqQD_FjH-cvgj2zZMyzIxeps1OxraLPKWwz2eL3apTpKVk341uldocQufBhBqekDe_oZ--MmiGw7KU6A-DeQy7vwk2PcIi3cB5s3PmUedv4ghJ7c_wxHg6T3Ofoq3FXEh4F_6-sRcEotW4BTrhHg9arlKPORe2QP6zIfXexIXx6vfe3eFfiBuWy7P4p5zvpN5TGcqZz3FZm9IIFTL-KjsuD1k_0NPFS2R4RUi1)**

\- Jim Banks

--\- Begin forwarded message --\-

_Fellow Patriots, I'm afraid I have BAD news._

_Before I reach out to**Trump** and **J.D. Vance,** can you step in?_

_Here's the situation: My most recent major fundraising deadline just passed, and my finance team broke the news to me:**we were 19 donations short.**_

_This would have been a huge blow, but we've found a way to extend the deadline by 24 hours through**[this special donation link.](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=9a3828666c924301a916f38925e74d2a&_e=0gkCZtki8XXNIWxDxqZtT1IDQWBY6aU_ZoB1zI-CuKJ9dkuA9B5Rxuf9R84tbpxWEp5MJMGAJBALxHFkFfgwEiyHudbqQD_FjH-cvgj2zZMyzIxeps1OxraLPKWwz2eL3apTpKVk341uldocQufBhBqekDe_oZ--MmiGw7KU6A-Fx_W1W-WscS8R4mfhgaDWzFYVCl2Q3g28z0XBwsH9m8FXhg1TGidCV4YgAGkcZTKc6xtyhOQy-nz0uxrA7U_fL0yPbNKO9UEuWHhvzdUSYwIkraBZ_H-Y5-gn2a9fVaUSKjv4D0swqGiMtyHKU9cI)**_

_While it's impossible to add anything more to my report...we have one more chance to make our internal goal and get back on track._

_So, as a personal favor to me -- will you stop what you're doing and make a special, one-time donation? Even if it's **only $5 ...** it will be the difference between completing our mission and surrendering._

**_Getting the seemingly little things right matters when you're up against a determined enemy._**

_My campaign, though under most people's radar right now, will be pivotal in determining who has the Senate majority, and our country is depending on your help to deliver us a victory. The Democrats know this and are already preparing to spend millions to defeat me._

**_[Please stand with me before 11:59 PM.](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=9a3828666c924301a916f38925e74d2a&_e=0gkCZtki8XXNIWxDxqZtT1IDQWBY6aU_ZoB1zI-CuKJ9dkuA9B5Rxuf9R84tbpxWEp5MJMGAJBALxHFkFfgwEiyHudbqQD_FjH-cvgj2zZMyzIxeps1OxraLPKWwz2eL3apTpKVk341uldocQufBhBqekDe_oZ--MmiGw7KU6A9ydV36USbg1Dhq7RtYmA9SwYPQp-Znvhu-s5dpet0v2bE94tJZ72HDSnYlH6W6ltuzkO5FV6wtPIxESX7-7A01d3denTPnH2yqaKjVqMEBvusdLjYaRy5Cs5zRZWa8rQi1mfFFq8ClAqlbPzHDhMCO)_**

**The Chair of the Democratic National Committee DNC Jaime Harrison “The 2024 election will be the first time Alaska voters elect a president using ranked-choice voting...****Harrison told Alaska Democrats that with ranked-choice voting, Biden “really has a chance to win this state.”**
---
#### **RCV Election in 2022 cost the State of Alaska 328% of what a normal previous election costs.**
---
---
|
---
**\- Total for RCV Implementation: $3,540,105.70**** ****\- Total for RCV Implementation and Regular Election: $8,592,620.83**** ****\- Special Election: $2,500,385.58**** ****\- Total RCV Implementation + Regular Election Costs + Special Election Costs: $11,093,006.41**** ****\- 328% Increase in Election Costs compared to election costs from 2010-2020, which used closed primaries and plurality or FPTP voting.**** ****\- RCV Election in 2022 cost the State of Alaska 328% of what a normal election costs.**
---
|
---
**Top 4 Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) with Jungle Primary Eliminated 3rd Party Candidates in the General.****Alaska had the lowest voter turnout in Alaska's History in 2022 Using Jungle Primary and Ranked Choice Voting for the first and second time.**
---
|
---
**The State Also Spent $2.5 Million on the US House Special Election in 2022 and $3.5 Million of setup costs for Ranked Choice Voting.****A total State of Alaska Investment of $11 Million, which is 328% of the Average Election Costs from 2010-2020.**
---
**Let's do some digging on the Pro-RCV group here in Alaska. Disclaimer from their most recent newsletter.****The Pro-RCV group appears to be the “Dark Money” they were so worried about, Arabella Advisors and 1630 Fund are about as “Dark Money” as “Dark Money” gets.**_**Their new Incorporation is their top donor.**__**Then "Article Four from Virginia"**__**Then "1630 Fund in Washington D.C."**_
---
This is who is funding the [#RankedChoiceVoting](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=665bbfa6ae4822330b39f5b4&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fhashtag%2FRankedChoiceVoting%3Fsrc%3Dhashtag_click&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_665bbeafd423e578b9f09935&l=en-US&s=-6nzjCfH7bHhGWumZX8v1_7YbGY%3D) group in Alaska 1630 Fund Swiss billionaire whose personal goal is to “(re)interpret the American Constitution in the light of progressive politics” has donated hundreds of millions of dollars to a left-wing group that is dumping millions into state ballot initiatives, a new report from Americans for Public Trust (APT) revealed. Hansjörg Wyss, through his Berger Action Fund, has donated $243 million to the Sixteen Thirty Fund, which “uses its war chest ... to support massive get-out-the-vote drives, issue advocacy campaigns bolstering President Biden’s agenda, liberal pet projects from abortion to immigration, and attack ads against Republican lawmakers,”
---
---
|
---
Swiss billionaire Hansjörg Wyss has been channeling substantial funds into American state ballot initiatives through the 1630 Fund aka Sixteen Thirty Fund, a progressive advocacy group.As reported by Americans for Public Trust, Wyss’s donations, which total around $243 million to the group, have been instrumental in influencing policies across various states, with a significant focus on Michigan. Since 2017, nearly $34 million has been funneled into Michigan to, among other goals, "rewrite the state’s election laws." This massive infusion of cash aims at bolstering liberal causes from immigration to abortion and enhancing Democratic voter turnout. Such activities have sparked controversy and legislative responses aimed at curbing foreign influence in American electoral processes.https://thefederalist.com/2024/04/18/dark-money-group-backed-by-foreign-billionaire-has-dumped-100-million-into-state-ballot-initiatives/1630 Fund is currently funding multiple ballot initiatives in Alaska, including Alaskans For Better Elections AKBE who brought Ranked Choice Voting to Alaska. Also including the recent push for a higher minimum wage. At some point, one must question when the regulators and government officials, elected to safeguard citizens, become tools manipulated by these malicious actors to act against the citizens they are meant to protect.(e.g. we have been attacked 4 times so far 3 times using state offices, we have been spied on, harassed, and our reputations damaged nationwide all because we were trying to address an election system we didn't feel was a good fit for Alaska)I hope you take this threat to your State Seriously, they are incredibly well funded and they are hell bent on making changes to the State of Alaska. This is one of those cases of too big to fail, where you will attack Alaskans and regular people, but applying these rules to a Swiss Billionaire is outside your job and expectations. As a citizen it saddens me to learn that millionaires and billionaires have more influence on a state and the way the state operates than the people who live here.Phil IzonPer State Statutes:**Sec. 15.13.068. Expenditures and contributions by foreign-influenced corporations and foreign nationals.
** (a) A foreign-influenced corporation or foreign national may not, directly or indirectly, in connection with an election under this chapter, make a contribution or expenditure or make an express or implied promise to make a contribution or expenditure.

(b) The provisions of this section prohibit a foreign-influenced corporation or foreign national from making a contribution or expenditure in connection with a state election only to the

clean_body: Please share this with as many people as you can. Share with 5-10 people. | | | | | My first book is available on on our | Get a Copy of My New Book Please let me know what you think, my first book about Ranked Choice Voting was 320 pages. This one is only 100 pages and it can be read in a couple hours. | | | | | | The Chair of the Democratic National Committee DNC Jaime Harrison “The 2024 election will be the first time Alaska voters elect a president using ranked-choice voting...Harrison told Alaska Democrats that with ranked-choice voting, Biden “really has a chance to win this state.” RCV Election in 2022 cost the State of Alaska 328% of what a normal previous election costs. | \- Total for RCV Implementation: $3,540,105.70 \- Total for RCV Implementation and Regular Election: $8,592,620.83 \- Special Election: $2,500,385.58 \- Total RCV Implementation + Regular Election Costs + Special Election Costs: $11,093,006.41 \- 328% Increase in Election Costs compared to election costs from 2010-2020, which used closed primaries and plurality or FPTP voting. \- RCV Election in 2022 cost the State of Alaska 328% of what a normal election costs. | Top 4 Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) with Jungle Primary Eliminated 3rd Party Candidates in the General.Alaska had the lowest voter turnout in Alaska's History in 2022 Using Jungle Primary and Ranked Choice Voting for the first and second time. | The State Also Spent $2.5 Million on the US House Special Election in 2022 and $3.5 Million of setup costs for Ranked Choice Voting.A total State of Alaska Investment of $11 Million, which is 328% of the Average Election Costs from 2010-2020. Let's do some digging on the Pro-RCV group here in Alaska. Disclaimer from their most recent newsletter.The Pro-RCV group appears to be the “Dark Money” they were so worried about, Arabella Advisors and 1630 Fund are about as “Dark Money” as “Dark Money” gets.Their new Incorporation is their top donor.Then "Article Four from Virginia"Then "1630 Fund in Washington D.C." This is who is funding the group in Alaska 1630 Fund Swiss billionaire whose personal goal is to “(re)interpret the American Constitution in the light of progressive politics” has donated hundreds of millions of dollars to a left-wing group that is dumping millions into state ballot initiatives, a new report from Americans for Public Trust (APT) revealed. Hansjörg Wyss, through his Berger Action Fund, has donated $243 million to the Sixteen Thirty Fund, which “uses its war chest ... to support massive get-out-the-vote drives, issue advocacy campaigns bolstering President Biden’s agenda, liberal pet projects from abortion to immigration, and attack ads against Republican lawmakers,” | Swiss billionaire Hansjörg Wyss has been channeling substantial funds into American state ballot initiatives through the 1630 Fund aka Sixteen Thirty Fund, a progressive advocacy group.As reported by Americans for Public Trust, Wyss’s donations, which total around $243 million to the group, have been instrumental in influencing policies across various states, with a significant focus on Michigan. Since 2017, nearly $34 million has been funneled into Michigan to, among other goals, "rewrite the state’s election laws." This massive infusion of cash aims at bolstering liberal causes from immigration to abortion and enhancing Democratic voter turnout. Such activities have sparked controversy and legislative responses aimed at curbing foreign influence in American electoral processes. Fund is currently funding multiple ballot initiatives in Alaska, including Alaskans For Better Elections AKBE who brought Ranked Choice Voting to Alaska. Also including the recent push for a higher minimum wage. At some point, one must question when the regulators and government officials, elected to safeguard citizens, become tools manipulated by these malicious actors to act against the citizens they are meant to protect.(e.g. we have been attacked 4 times so far 3 times using state offices, we have been spied on, harassed, and our reputations damaged nationwide all because we were trying to address an election system we didn't feel was a good fit for Alaska)I hope you take this threat to your State Seriously, they are incredibly well funded and they are hell bent on making changes to the State of Alaska. This is one of those cases of too big to fail, where you will attack Alaskans and regular people, but applying these rules to a Swiss Billionaire is outside your job and expectations. As a citizen it saddens me to learn that millionaires and billionaires have more influence on a state and the way the state operates than the people who live here.Phil IzonPer State Statutes:Sec. 15.13.068. Expenditures and contributions by foreign-influenced corporations and foreign nationals. (a) A foreign-influenced corporation or foreign national may not, directly or indirectly, in connection with an election under this chapter, make a contribution or expenditure or make an express or implied promise to make a contribution or expenditure. **I NEED you to read this, friend!**

Jacky Rosen’s Senate race in Nevada could determine whether the GOP wins back Senate control – and _The Cook Political Report_ just downgraded it from “Lean Democrat” to a “Toss Up”!
I’m going to give it to you straight: Keeping Nevada and the Senate blue isn’t going to be easy. Jacky's extreme GOP opponent is already breaking fundraising records, and dark-money groups like the Koch network are pouring millions into Nevada to flip it red.

**That’s why I’m calling on every single Democrat to throw their full support behind Jacky right now. That includes YOU, friend!**
After 50 years of working in politics, I can tell you that Jacky has what it takes to win. But to do that, she desperately needs the same kind of massive grassroots support that helped Democrats eke out a victory in Nevada and defend the Senate in the last election – a real nail-biter that came down to just 7,928 votes.

clean_body: We need all Dems to fight! | | | I NEED you to read this, friend! Jacky Rosen’s Senate race in Nevada could determine whether the GOP wins back Senate control – and The Cook Political Report just downgraded it from “Lean Democrat” to a “Toss Up”! I’m going to give it to you straight: Keeping Nevada and the Senate blue isn’t going to be easy. Jacky's extreme GOP opponent is already breaking fundraising records, and dark-money groups like the Koch network are pouring millions into Nevada to flip it red. That’s why I’m calling on every single Democrat to throw their full support behind Jacky right now. That includes YOU, friend! After 50 years of working in politics, I can tell you that Jacky has what it takes to win. But to do that, she desperately needs the same kind of massive grassroots support that helped Democrats eke out a victory in Nevada and defend the Senate in the last election – a real nail-biter that came down to just 7,928 votes. name: Lucas Kunce
subject: An update from the campaign trail:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Here’s what I’ve been up to the last two weeks.
#
Hi Peter,
It’s Lucas Kunce here. I’m the 13-year Marine veteran running to replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate.
When I decided to build this movement, it was important to me to meet with Missourians from all parties, all walks of life, and all corners of the state — and that’s exactly what I’ve been doing. **So today, I wanted to give you an update on what I’ve been up to lately:**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/51515?refcode=em20240601-5655&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5655%2E614464%2EOL_Bow)
I attended the Midwest States Conference of Machinists, where I had the opportunity to speak about my priorities in the Senate — like passing the PRO Act, investing in our communities, and putting American workers first.
Workers like them are our greatest asset. They keep our country strong and secure, and I’m proud to have their support.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/51515?refcode=em20240601-5655&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5655%2E614464%2EOL_Bow)
Last week, we packed a room full of people from all over mid-Missouri at a town hall in Columbia — not too far from where I grew up.
The crowd was fired up about taking this U.S. Senate seat back for real Missourians! They’re tired of having a U.S. Senator who has spent six years voting against investment in Missouri, and I’m humbled that they share my vision for rebuilding our state.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/51515?refcode=em20240601-5655&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=5655%2E614464%2EOL_Bow)
Finally, I joined Marine Corps League Simpson-Hoggatt Detachment #984 for their 82nd Annual Memorial Day Service earlier this week to remember all the men and women who have given their lives in service to our country.
It's hard to think about how many Marines we have lost — overseas, but also back home to training accidents, suicides, and substance use — including the many who were lost during my time in Afghanistan. Our duty to them isn’t just to honor them today and to send more to war tomorrow — it’s to serve the communities that they signed up for here at home.
I’ve been grateful to meet so many people all across the state this month, and I look forward to meeting even more in June. If you live in Missouri — no matter where you live, or who you voted for before — I hope to meet you too.
See you on the trail,
Lucas Kunce

clean_body: As you read this, Donald Trump's supporters are fired up and likely setting fundraising records for his campaign. | | | Here is the truth: Despite a jury finding Donald Trump guilty, there is still only one way to keep Donald Trump out of the Oval Office: At the ballot box. Convicted felon or not, Trump will be the Republican nominee for president. But there is one other certainty -- as you read this, Donald Trump's supporters are fired up and likely setting fundraising records for his campaign. That's money he will use to try to get back into the White House to carry out his threats of revenge and retribution against his political opponents. So while the MAGA Right comes to the aid of Trump, Joe Biden -- and those who care about democracy -- need you. name: Jill Stein
subject: Reporter: “How many more charred corpses does he have to see?”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jill Stein for President 2024
body:
| | | [ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rafah_update&n=1)
---
Peter,

This week the media turned its full and undivided attention to the guilty verdict rendered by a Manhattan jury against former president Donald Trump.

Much was said about the historic nature of this verdict – _and it was historic._ That trial marked the first time in our nation’s history that a criminal president has been held accountable for his criminal conduct.

**Very few in the media are talking about the criminal conduct of American presidents who illegally invaded other countries, illegally bombed civilians, or the current president who is funneling billions in weapons to a war criminal to carry out a genocide.

** But that’s beginning to change.

On Wednesday, Ed O’Keefe, the Senior White House and political correspondent for CBS News, posed a striking question to National Security Council spokesperson John Kirby. Watch:
---
[ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rafah_update&n=2)
---
**O’Keefe apparently struck a nerve. Because two days later – and eight months too late – Biden outlined his three-point plan to end what he calls “the war in Gaza” in a televised address.

** Biden’s plan hinges on concessions by Hamas in a ceasefire agreement that Hamas already accepted almost a month ago – and which Israel explicitly rejected.

Yet the president offered _no plan_ for getting Israel to comply with this agreement, no conditions on continuing military aid, no real threat of withdrawal of U.S. support for Israel’s ongoing genocide.

****Instead of lobbing more empty threats, we must double down to remove the _American_ war criminals from power as soon as humanly possible. That’s what this campaign is about.

**While Palestinians are in a fight for their lives, our nation is in a fight for its soul. Right now, both are losing. Our campaign is the ONLY one that will be on the ballot across the country this November fighting for people, planet, and peace.

****[We still have major expenses coming up to get on the ballot in states like Illinois, and we need to ramp up our fundraising this month substantially. Please give what you can today to keep us in the fight.](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rafah_update&n=3)**

When we win, we hold the war criminals to account. And we WILL free Palestine.

In solidarity and gratitude,

Jill
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rafah_update&n=4 "Support Jill Today!") [Support Jill Today!](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rafah_update&n=4)
---
* * *

name: Team Cornel West 2024
subject: Support Equality: Learn and Contribute to the ERA
body:
"Equality of rights under the law shall not be denied or abridged by the United States or by any State on account of sex." - ERA

| | | [ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=equal_is_equal&n=1)
---
---
Dear Peter, Equality under the law is fundamental to justice. Dr. Cornel West and Dr. Melina Abdullah are staunch advocates for the Equal Rights Amendment (ERA), which aims to ensure that all individuals have equal rights regardless of sex. **"Equality of rights under the law shall not be denied or abridged by the United States or by any State on account of sex." - Equal Rights Amendment** The ERA seeks to provide a constitutional guarantee against sex discrimination, reinforcing the principle that equal means equal. To understand more about the ERA and its importance, watch this compelling video with Kamala Lopez - Founder of [Equal Means Equal](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=C9Xlyb6GnnxWDmeVPeVuscv1Vb0ol3E1vykQfruWVC0&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=equal_is_equal&n=2) along with Drs. West & Abdullah.
---
[ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=_X1YtK1E-fhMWLMPEV96fehIbS-wRUfCcemrFPMltiwuFeRfRrid_Pv9zRNFU-kM-eoM1kAbIykIBCXzRpsJHcnUDkI6lfahzKiNa0RmXcI&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=equal_is_equal&n=3)
---
**Key Points from the Video:**
* **Importance of the ERA:** The ERA is essential for protecting rights related to equal pay, bodily autonomy, LGBTQ rights, pregnancy rights, and contraception.
* **Historical Context:** The ERA has been fully ratified since 2020, but bureaucratic obstacles have prevented its formal recognition as the 28th Amendment.
* **Current Advocacy Efforts:** The video calls for urgent action to pressure President Biden to direct the US archivist to publish the ERA, ensuring it is recognized and enforced.

---
| [](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=_X1YtK1E-fhMWLMPEV96fehIbS-wRUfCcemrFPMltiwuFeRfRrid_Pv9zRNFU-kM-eoM1kAbIykIBCXzRpsJHcnUDkI6lfahzKiNa0RmXcI&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=equal_is_equal&n=4 "WATCH FULL INTERVIEW") [WATCH FULL INTERVIEW](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=_X1YtK1E-fhMWLMPEV96fehIbS-wRUfCcemrFPMltiwuFeRfRrid_Pv9zRNFU-kM-eoM1kAbIykIBCXzRpsJHcnUDkI6lfahzKiNa0RmXcI&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=equal_is_equal&n=4)
---
---
## **Join the Movement!**
---
**Join Us in These Key Efforts:**
* **Publishing of the ERA:** Ensure that equality under the law is guaranteed by the U.S. Constitution.
* **Addressing Gender Disparities:** Promote laws and policies that eliminate gender-based discrimination in all areas of life.
* **Protecting Rights:** Strengthen protections against sex discrimination in employment, education, and other sectors.

---
---
---
[ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/donate?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=equal_is_equal&n=5)
---
**How You Can Help:**
* **Donate:** Support a campaign committed to publishing the Equal Right Amendment on day one.

---
| [](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/donate?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=equal_is_equal&n=6 "DONATE NOW") [DONATE NOW](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/donate?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=equal_is_equal&n=6)
---
* **Learn More:** Explore the West-Abdullah Gender Justice platform, a platform in support of equal rights for all.

---
| [](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/gender_justice?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=equal_is_equal&n=7 "PLATFORM") [PLATFORM](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/gender_justice?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=equal_is_equal&n=7)
---
Together, we can ensure that equal truly means equal for everyone. **In eternal love and solidarity,**
The West-Abdullah 2024 Campaign Team
---
Cornel West for President · 8253A Backlick Rd., PO Box #1577, Newington, VA 22122, United States
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com · [Unsubscribe](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/unsubscribe?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=equal_is_equal&n=8)
---

Key Points from the Video: Importance of the ERA: The ERA is essential for protecting rights related to equal pay, bodily autonomy, LGBTQ rights, pregnancy rights, and contraception. Historical Context: The ERA has been fully ratified since 2020, but bureaucratic obstacles have prevented its formal recognition as the 28th Amendment. Current Advocacy Efforts: The video calls for urgent action to pressure President Biden to direct the US archivist to publish the ERA, ensuring it is recognized and enforced. | "WATCH FULL INTERVIEW" Join the Movement! Join Us in These Key Efforts: Publishing of the ERA: Ensure that equality under the law is guaranteed by the U.S. Constitution. Addressing Gender Disparities: Promote laws and policies that eliminate gender-based discrimination in all areas of life. Protecting Rights: Strengthen protections against sex discrimination in employment, education, and other sectors. How You Can Help: Donate: Support a campaign committed to publishing the Equal Right Amendment on day one. | "DONATE NOW" Learn More: Explore the West-Abdullah Gender Justice platform, a platform in support of equal rights for all. | "PLATFORM" Together, we can ensure that equal truly means equal for everyone. In eternal love and solidarity, The West-Abdullah 2024 Campaign Team Cornel West for President · 8253A Backlick Rd., PO Box #1577, Newington, VA 22122, United States

Hello,
It’s hard to explain what it feels like to turn on the TV or get on social media and see ads attacking your dad with lie after lie.
When Dad decided to run against Lauren Boebert in 2022, my parents tried to warn my sister and me what would happen. It’s one thing to imagine what it’ll feel like; it’s another to experience it. Especially when the attacks got really, really nasty.
My dad, Adam Frisch, barely lost in 2022 to Lauren Boebert. It was just 546 votes. I really thought he might pull it off when things went to a recount. But unfortunately, we lost in the closest race in the country.
Now, Dad’s scared off Boebert – and I _know_ he’s going to win this seat in 2024. But the Super PAC attacks have already started...
His campaign has set a goal of raising another $10,000 before midnight tonight, and I wanted to send an email to see if you could chip in to help Dad win this critical seat.
[**It means a lot to our entire family that people like you have got his back. the future of Social Security is on the line

**_BREAKING NEWS:_ The Supreme Court heard a case that could END Social Security! **
Friend, Republicans have spent years scheming to destroy Social Security. **And now, Trump's far-right majority on the Supreme Court could be preparing to OVERTURN this critical legislation.**
Over the past 88 years, Social Security has helped hundreds of millions of Americans pay their bills and retire with dignity. Today, 67 million people receive benefits — _that's 1 in every 5 Americans!_
Social Security is, without a doubt, one of the most important — and popular — pieces of legislation ever passed. **But now, the future of this vital program rests in the hands of far-right radicals on the Supreme Court. **
These extremists have already made it clear that they have no respect for precedent or the will of the American people. We cannot sit on the sidelines and watch as they strip away our benefits.**We have to make our voices heard NOW. Please, respond before 11:59 p.m. tonight to tell us:**

We cannot sit on the sidelines and watch as they strip away our benefits.We have to make our voices heard NOW. Please, respond before 11:59 p.m. tonight to tell us: Should the Supreme Court Protect Social Security? | | | | | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Adam Schiff
subject: 24-year-old me could not have imagined this...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
| | |
---
Hi friend, can I tell you a quick story about this photo?
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/86104658/476837678/-1984759417?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1313-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjMzNTBlNzItNmQyMC1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=UwVJb4EgB73TMPG5IIU0PCAoj2K-qLSNRNY1tmV7mks=)
That's me in 1985 — just 24 years old at my law school graduation, fresh off a student research assistant job for Professor Laurence Tribe, thinking that I had just completed the toughest challenge of my academic career. Well, up to that point, anyway. (The bar exam was still a few weeks away).
Some years later, I would become an Assistant United States Attorney, and successfully prosecute the first FBI agent charged with espionage, Richard Miller, for spying for the Soviet Union.
As a new graduate of law school, I could never have imagined I would handle a case like that.
Or that I would later investigate a president who also betrayed our country...
...lead his impeachment and Senate trial...
...serve on the January 6 Committee...
...get kicked off the Intelligence Committee by a craven Speaker of the House for doing the above...
...and get censured by extreme partisan MAGA House Republicans under the personal threat of that corrupt president.
Life leads us in uncertain and fortuitous ways. I’m fortunate that at a time when our country has been in trouble, and our democracy at risk, I have been in a position to help do something about it.
In the Senate, I hope to do even more.

clean_body: | | | Hi friend, can I tell you a quick story about this photo? = That's me in 1985 — just 24 years old at my law school graduation, fresh off a student research assistant job for Professor Laurence Tribe, thinking that I had just completed the toughest challenge of my academic career. Well, up to that point, anyway. (The bar exam was still a few weeks away). Some years later, I would become an Assistant United States Attorney, and successfully prosecute the first FBI agent charged with espionage, Richard Miller, for spying for the Soviet Union. As a new graduate of law school, I could never have imagined I would handle a case like that. Or that I would later investigate a president who also betrayed our country... ...lead his impeachment and Senate trial... ...serve on the January 6 Committee... ...get kicked off the Intelligence Committee by a craven Speaker of the House for doing the above... ...and get censured by extreme partisan MAGA House Republicans under the personal threat of that corrupt president. Life leads us in uncertain and fortuitous ways. I’m fortunate that at a time when our country has been in trouble, and our democracy at risk, I have been in a position to help do something about it. In the Senate, I hope to do even more. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and Debbie Mucarsel-Powell will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks for reading! — Adam | * | | | = Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.

subject: We can all agree on this

body:
| We value your support.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=2728%2E35263%2ExerPLh)
How’s your inbox looking, Peter? If it looks anything like ours, we’re sure there are plenty of spam emails — from misleading senders, with deceptive subject lines, featuring fear mongering content. And email providers like Gmail are cracking down: [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-240504.JYDrgT&refcode=AU_STB_CL_GEN_NOA_AT_20240601_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2728%2E35263%2ExerPLh) We can all agree less spam is good! But to tell you the truth, these changes are also having an impact on our campaign’s ability to reach our supporters. Email is one of the most powerful tools our campaign has— it allows us to share important campaign updates with our supporters, get your valuable feedback, and ask for support, when we need it. Tammy can’t write herself seven-figure checks like her self-funding opponent can, so losing out on reaching supporters like you could have major implications on our ability to stay competitive in this race. **What if we told you that just by clicking a link in this email (****[like this one, which will take you to one of our recent campaign ads!](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-240504.JYDrgT&refcode=AU_STB_CL_GEN_NOA_AT_20240601_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=2728%2E35263%2ExerPLh)), you could help us reach more people and keep growing our grassroots team to reelect Tammy?** **[You better believe it, Peter, because that’s all we’re asking you to do today. Click this link to help us ensure our emails continue to land in your inbox, and check out of our latest campaign ads touting Tammy’s work to protect hard-earned retirement benefits.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-240504.JYDrgT&refcode=AU_STB_CL_GEN_NOA_AT_20240601_AM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=2728%2E35263%2ExerPLh)** | | [CLICK HERE](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-240504.JYDrgT&refcode=AU_STB_CL_GEN_NOA_AT_20240601_AM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=2728%2E35263%2ExerPLh)

Thanks for being a part of this grassroots campaign.

name: The Team at No Dem Left Behind
subject: Happy Pride Month 2024!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC
body:
This is an important to celebrate the vibrant history of the LGBTQ+ community and highlight the activism pushing for positive change around the world.
---
| | | |
---
| | | |
---
| | | |
## Happy Pride Month 2024!
---
|
---
Pride Month starts today! It is important that we take this time to celebrate the vibrant history of the LGBTQ+ community and the strides made around the world towards equality. Pride Month's origins trace back to the first anniversary of the Stonewall Riots in 1970, symbolizing a pivotal moment in the fight for LGBTQ+ rights. The month-long celebration honors the progress made since those tumultuous times but also underscores the ongoing struggles these communities face. This is a valuable time to reflect on the positive changes made towards equality after decades of activism and hard work. However, this year's festivities unfold against a concerning backdrop of numerous state laws in the U.S. that target LGBTQ+ rights. This year, amidst the colorful parades and joyous celebrations, there is a shadow cast by the increasing legislative attacks on transgender rights in several U.S. states. Recent laws have significantly impacted the lives of many by restricting access to sports, healthcare, and other public accommodations. Globally, the situation remains dire in many places, with severe penalties for LGBTQ+ individuals in over 60 countries. This harsh reality reminds us of the necessity of continued advocacy and vigilance. As we gather in solidarity this Pride Month, let's also commit to action. It's crucial to support organizations fighting for LGBTQ+ rights and participate in advocacy efforts to protect and extend these hard-won freedoms. **The fight for equality is far from over, and your support is more critical than ever. Let us stand together this Pride Month and beyond, to ensure a future where everyone can live openly and safely as themselves.**
| If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
