body:
Secure the border > >

| [](http://links.newspatriot.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=fe76fd4821094fbf9a9626703625f1a4&_e=Lx4NOZWsGq3KnT8Sts6iwWJR4UYx-ooYf743nCEi2-Dkxk4mOSUg5RXX85BDJV52SXq6EEXBO4xO1ilJT7dBTEmVFtNJjqdD4uf781TPLQNGLVkj1-e-YIXo9l6eZwdGIGa_Ti5RD9Yssj2JMDOTNKEsng5DTuodHrAajhkzfaxt2DNv0OLNsYwcGBOtLun-1UkGk4xZ2MnYvZw3fAYwXA0DI55GEr7BgT7Zsrxt5WcU9wbHDZpmT12TvgvNwjVTS7mf6IzdkehfvQJULJZrtifpcUI0iN1vaoO82-EK0sBcBMmpNyjR8T7z1JuorKEuoYw0bUCs6-EkQ11MkCqKZUAxaDn2ToqX1mKSGrLjtiZJaQrUs-zKzd4wdxrIlLOdSCLIJhbIL_jwT7FxJhem3w%3D%3D)

Friend,

[**Our nation's borders are not secure.**](http://links.newspatriot.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=fe76fd4821094fbf9a9626703625f1a4&_e=Lx4NOZWsGq3KnT8Sts6iwWJR4UYx-ooYf743nCEi2-Dkxk4mOSUg5RXX85BDJV52SXq6EEXBO4xO1ilJT7dBTEmVFtNJjqdD4uf781TPLQNGLVkj1-e-YIXo9l6eZwdGIGa_Ti5RD9Yssj2JMDOTNKEsng5DTuodHrAajhkzfaxt2DNv0OLNsYwcGBOtLun-spMaPQODNd5hjDLQIuzejD3M0zUlrdb_RbsZ-Dj_NzcqoM6B7ADYFDrP34qqh-Gw9nsBfB_XxEoIPpozBoWI9bRRCqG0IPxsjdpdodZb9PGNVfowLIvhvhfXlKBUsG4AY3LLKtjQ9RWMSBdktEJoVd6wFej4joPdCYWw7w9xzB9p3ye47zKqhWSH6wr1iE4im0uUHgyOrb5F2G4QsDLuIA%3D%3D)

As the Chairman of the Committee on Homeland Security, I work hard every day to bring accountability to President Joe Biden and his administration's open-border policies that have left our communities at risk. Congress, according to the Constitution, has written the laws. Secretary Mayorkas and President Biden refuse to execute those laws.

In President Biden's America, we have:
➡️ Open Borders
➡️ Increased Crime
➡️ A Fentanyl Epidemic
➡️ Soaring Inflation

Just to name a few.

Secretary Mayorkas has also failed to enforce our nation's laws, which has emboldened dangerous individuals to cross the border illegally. This administration's border policies put the most vulnerable at risk.

It's time to take action. We must secure the border.

If you are able, please donate any amount now to help me continue fighting for you.
| [**DONATE NOW**](http://links.newspatriot.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=fe76fd4821094fbf9a9626703625f1a4&_e=Lx4NOZWsGq3KnT8Sts6iwWJR4UYx-ooYf743nCEi2-Dkxk4mOSUg5RXX85BDJV52SXq6EEXBO4xO1ilJT7dBTEmVFtNJjqdD4uf781TPLQNGLVkj1-e-YIXo9l6eZwdGIGa_Ti5RD9Yssj2JMDOTNKEsng5DTuodHrAajhkzfaxt2DNv0OLNsYwcGBOtLun-1UkGk4xZ2MnYvZw3fAYwXA0DI55GEr7BgT7Zsrxt5WcU9wbHDZpmT12TvgvNwjVTegepBXwi5gYRiIy7SH5JvNvkJEATb1Csnp-wxRqYhlipwqtESyrEoQPNReIAHp9jo4pJVlXPjpBgvWbQMGAeNFAN_g0Ha-cvzL9gWuZQ13C9qw8dlDkVCZ2QH4ygqfU6BITn6upkSdtoWpb5cPVdQg%3D%3D)
---

Thank you,
[](http://links.newspatriot.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=fe76fd4821094fbf9a9626703625f1a4&_e=Lx4NOZWsGq3KnT8Sts6iwWJR4UYx-ooYf743nCEi2-Dkxk4mOSUg5RXX85BDJV52SXq6EEXBO4xO1ilJT7dBTEmVFtNJjqdD4uf781TPLQNGLVkj1-e-YIXo9l6eZwdGIGa_Ti5RD9Yssj2JMDOTNKEsng5DTuodHrAajhkzfaxt2DNv0OLNsYwcGBOtLun-spMaPQODNd5hjDLQIuzejD3M0zUlrdb_RbsZ-Dj_NzdTmYHBeen9d-Ai5pu05P3tWGefLXzgndSWGRn0cmCSmk7Oyt3AlFO4_mwmgQcS62cYQt-dH41Surwmwoiq4OfgFD0lYg_lLJ_36YurML7GTsaMn074UJNb1PJuK-qqgrGdi6jNUy_CnL8rdm8SBjV5rgFnmk6JJEyetz5NNt-0pQ%3D%3D)

name: Tony Johnson
subject: Get your copy of the 2024 Index of U.S. Military Strength
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-dYMXfIiKtGvvog)
---

[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.) Fellow Conservative,

Right now, America's biggest adversaries are working to surpass our nation's military capabilities. And critical problems exist in many areas of the world:
* Countries like Iran act deceitfully and use their military to bully other countries.

* Rogue states like North Korea and Syria pose direct threats to their regions and America's security.

* And the leaders of countries like China and Russia have proven they will do whatever they can to increase government control and state surveillance of their citizens.

On top of all this, our country's military equipment--including planes, tanks, and ships--is decades-old and years past its useful service.

With information like this, you would think our elected leaders would push to ensure a strong future for our nation's military. But some of them are actually looking to reduce America's defense spending. Apparently, they would rather prioritize issues like climate change.

That's why I'm emailing you today.

I'm told that you are a conservative who wants to ensure that our country remains a beacon of hope, opportunity, and liberty for all the world. And I understand that you are just as concerned as I am about the future of America's defense.

[So, today, I want to make sure you get a FREE copy of The Heritage Foundation's _2024 Index of U.S. Military Strength_.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._l6zR2zlLw55Bhw)

We publish this report to help decision-makers in government see how conditions have evolved in the past year and where American strengths, challenges, and opportunities for improvement lie.

But we also make this important resource available to the general public, so that you are aware of how well--or poorly--the government is handling this sacred task.

In addition to all of this, you can use this Index to explore topics like:
* Understanding risk in the great competition with the Chinese Communist Party.

* What we risk if we fail to fully modernize the U.S. nuclear deterrent.

* How prioritizing climate change and DEI training weakens America's military.

**You can get instant access to your FREE guide right now using this secure link:** [https://secured.heritage.org/us-military-strength-ebook/](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.).

There's some eye-opening information in here, so I really hope you'll get your copy today. And you can share it with anyone you think would benefit from it.

**[Use this link to get your _2024 Index of U.S Military Strength_ today! >>](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)**

Best,

Tony Johnson
Director of Membership
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---
Freedom First Project P.O. Box 523692 Springfield, VA 22152 If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MTUzLTg1NTFjMjc4YjRiNjRhMjA4OThiM2I5YzM4Nzc0ZDQyIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/LBxc_NJKlX2ETbtGg8DQDw) to unsubscribe.
---
